hypothesis: Wannan kwari ya zama dole don ƙirƙirar sandbars da rairayin bakin teku, wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin wuraren zama na namun daji.
reference: Wannan danshi ya zama dole don ƙirƙirar linta da rairayin bakin teku, waɗanda suka yi aiki a matsayin mazaunin namun daji.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
hypothesis: A sakamakon haka, kifaye guda biyu sun mutu, kuma wasu biyu suna cikin haɗari, har da kifi mai suna humpback chub.
reference: Sakamakon haka, nau'in kifaye biyu sun ɓace, wasu biyu kuma suna cikin haɗari, da suka haɗa da chub mai ƙusumbi.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
hypothesis: Ko da yake matakin ruwa zai ƙaru ne kawai bayan ambaliyar, jami'ai suna fatan zai isa su maido da sandbars da suka lalace a gefen kogin.
reference: Duk da cewa Yawan ruwan zai daga kadan bayan ambaliyar, maaikatan na fatan cewa zai isa daidai kimar dawo saman kasar bakin rafin.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
hypothesis: Ba a ba da gargadin tsunami ba, kuma a cewar hukumar kimiyyar ƙasa ta Jakarta, ba za a ba da gargadin tsunami ba domin girgizar ƙasa ba ta cika ƙa'idar ƙarfin 6.5 ba.
reference: Duk da cewa ba alalmun gargadin guguwa, kuma a cewar hukumar ta Jakarta geophysics, ba za a yi gargadin guguwa ba saboda girgizar ba ta cika adadin da ake bukata na lamba 6.5 ba.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
hypothesis: Ko da yake babu barazanar tsunami, mazauna sun soma firgita kuma suka soma barin kasuwancinsu da gidajensu.
reference: Duk da cewa babu barazanar guguwar tsunami, mazauna sun fara firgita kuma sun fara barin kasuwancinsu da gidajensu.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
hypothesis: Ko da yake Winfrey ta yi kuka a lokacin da ta yi ban kwana, ta bayyana wa magoya bayanta cewa za ta dawo.
reference: Kodayake Winfrey ta kasance cikin hawaye a yayin ban kwana, amma ta bayyana wa magoya bayanta cewa za ta dawo.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
hypothesis: "Wannan ba zai zama gaisuwa ba. Wannan shi ne rufe wani babi da kuma bude wani sabon".
reference: Wannan ba zai zama ban kwana ba ne. Wannan shine rufewar babin sura da bude wani sabo.”

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
hypothesis: Sakamakon karshe na zaben shugaban kasa da na majalisa a Namibia ya nuna cewa an sake zaben shugaban kasa mai ci, Hifikepunye Pohamba, da babbar dama.
reference: Sakamako na karshe daga zabukan shugaban kasa da na ‘yan majalisa na ƙasar Namibia ya nuna cewa an sake zaɓar shugaban kasa mai ci, Hifikepunye Pohamba, da rata mai yawa.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
hypothesis: Jam'iyyar da ke mulki, Kungiyar Jama'ar Afirka ta Kudu maso Yamma (SWAPO), ta riƙe rinjaye a zaɓen majalisa.
reference: Jam'iyya mai mulki, Ƙungiyar Jama’ar Kudu maso Yammacin Afirka (SWAPO ) ta Kudu maso Yamma ta sake samun rinjaye a zabukan 'yan majalisar.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
hypothesis: Wannan hatsarin ya faru ne a tsaunukan tsaunuka, kuma an yi imanin cewa sakamakon wuta ne.
reference: Hadarin ya faru ne a saman tsaunuka, kuma ana jin cewa sakamakon wuta ne.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
hypothesis: Ƙoƙarin da ake yi na neman wurin da abin ya faru yana fuskantar mummunan yanayi da kuma yanayin da ba shi da kyau.
reference: ƙoƙarin da ake don gano wurin da jirgin ya fadi yana samun cikas daga rashin kyan yanayi da kuma yanki mai wahalar shiga.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
hypothesis: Kungiyar kiwon lafiya ta Mangola, Médecins Sans Frontières da kuma Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun ce wannan shi ne mafi munin barkewar cutar da aka samu a kasar.
reference: Mangola, kungiyar tallafin kiwon lafiya, Sans Medecines Frontieres da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun ce ita ce barkewar cuta mafi muni da aka yi a kasar.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
hypothesis: Mai magana da yawun kungiyar Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman ya ce: "Angola na fuskantar mafi munin annobar da ta taba barkewa kuma halin da ake ciki a Angola ya ci gaba da zama mara kyau", in ji shi.
reference: Kakakin kungiyar ta Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman ya ce “Angola na fuskantar barkewar cutar mafi muni da aka taba gani kuma lamarin ya ci gaba da munana a Angola,” in ji shi.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
hypothesis: Wasan ya fara ne da karfe 10:00 na safe tare da yanayi mai kyau kuma ban da ruwan sama na tsakar safiya wanda ya sauƙaƙe da sauri, rana ce mai kyau don wasan rugby na 7.
reference: An fara wasannin ne da karfe 10:00 na safe tare da yanayi mai kyau kuma banda yayyafin safiya wanda da sauri ya warware, ya kasance cikakkiyar rana don wasan rugby na 7.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
hypothesis: Kasar Afirka ta Kudu da ke da matsayi na farko a gasar ta fara ne a kan hanya mai kyau lokacin da ta samu nasara mai kyau ta 26 - 00 a kan Zambiya da ke da matsayi na 5.
reference: Afirka ta kudu masu darajar farko a gasar sun fara da kafar dama yayin da suka sami cikakkiyar nasara 26 - 00 akan ‘yan wasan Zambia masu daraja ta 5.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
hypothesis: Ƙwarewarsu ta kāre kansu, da yadda suke kula da ƙwallon ƙafa da kuma aiki mai kyau da suke yi a matsayin ƙungiya sun sa su fita dabam kuma ya bayyana sarai cewa wannan ita ce ƙungiyar da za a doke.
reference: Tsarin su na kariya, da kwarewa wajen amfani da hannu da kuma hadin kan su ya sanya suka bambanta kuma alama ya nuna cewa abokan wasan su zasu sha kaya.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
hypothesis: Jami'an birnin Amsterdam da gidan kayan gargajiya na Anne Frank sun bayyana cewa itacen yana dauke da kumburi kuma yana da haɗari ga lafiyar jama'a yayin da suke jayayya cewa yana cikin hatsarin fadawa.
reference: Jami'ai a birnin Amsterdam da na cibiyar ajiye kayan tarihi ta Anne Frank, sun bayyana cewa bishiyar ta kamu da gansa kuka, abinda ke da hadari ga lafiyar jama’a sakamakon bishiyar na daf da karyewa.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
hypothesis: An shirya a kashe shi a ranar Talata, amma an cece shi bayan hukuncin kotun gaggawa.
reference: An yanke cewa za’a sare ta ranar Talata, amma sai wani hukunci gaggawa na kotu ya ceci lamarin.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
hypothesis: Dukan ƙofofin kogon, da aka kira " 'Yan'uwa Bakwai", suna da diamita aƙalla mita 100 zuwa 250 (328 zuwa 820 feet).
reference: Dukkan ginshikan kogon, da aka yi wa suna “ ‘Yan uwa mata guda bakwai”, akalla sun kai mita 100 zuwa 250 (kafa 328 zuwa 820) a fadinsu.

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
hypothesis: Hotunan infrared sun nuna cewa yawan zafin jiki a dare da rana ya nuna cewa wataƙila koguna ne.
reference: Hotunan infrared suna nuna cewa bambancin zafin jiki daga dare da rana yana nuna cewa mai yiwuwa koguna ne.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
hypothesis: "Suna da sanyi fiye da ƙasa da ke kewaye da su a rana kuma suna da zafi a dare.
reference: “Suna da sanyi fiye da kewayan farfajiyar ckin rana kuma suna yin dumi da dare.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
hypothesis: Halin su ba shi da daidaito kamar na manyan koguna a duniya da sau da yawa suna da yawan zafin jiki, amma ya jitu da cewa waɗannan ramuka ne masu zurfi a ƙasa", in ji Glen Cushing na Ƙungiyar Astrogeology ta Hukumar Kula da Yanayin Duniya ta Amirka (USGS) da kuma Jami'ar Arewacin Arizona da ke Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: Halayyar ɗumi ba tsayayye ba ce kamar manyan koguna a cikin ƙasa waɗanda galibi su ke riƙe zafin jiki na yau da kullun, amma ya yi daidai da waɗannan kasancewarsu ramuka masu zurfi a cikin ƙasa,” in ji Glen Cushing na kungiyar Nazarin Albarkatun Ƙasa ta Amurka (USGS) Ƙungiyar Nazarin Taurari da kuma na Jami’ar Arewacin Arizona da ke a Flagstaff, Arizona.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
hypothesis: A Faransa, jefa kuri'a ta kasance al'ada mai ƙarancin fasaha: masu jefa kuri'a suna ware kansu a cikin rumfa, suna sanya takarda da aka buga a gaba wanda ke nuna ɗan takarar da suka zaɓa a cikin ambulaf.
reference: A Faransa, zaɓe ya kasanace wani abu mai ƙarancin fasahar zamani: masu zaɓe na keɓe kansu a cikin wani akwati, suna saka wata bugaggiyar takarda da ke nuna ɗan takararsu a cikin wata ambulan.

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
hypothesis: Bayan da jami'ai suka tabbatar da asalin mai jefa kuri'a, mai jefa kuri'a ya jefa kwandon a cikin akwatin zabe kuma ya sa hannu a takardar jefa kuri'a.
reference: Bayan jami'ai sun tantance asalin masu jefa kuri'a, mai jefa kuri'ar ya jefa ambulaf a akwatin murfin kuma ya sanya hannu a takardar kada kuri'a.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
hypothesis: Dokar zabe ta Faransa ta tsara tsarin aiki sosai.
reference: Dokar zaɓen Faransa ta tsara yadda ake gudanar da zaɓe bisa matuƙar bin ƙa’ida.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
hypothesis: Tun daga shekarar 1988, akwatunan jefa kuri'a dole ne su kasance masu bayyane don masu jefa kuri'a da masu lura su iya shaida cewa babu takardun shaida a farkon jefa kuri'a kuma ba a ƙara takardun shaida ba sai dai na masu jefa kuri'a da aka ƙidaya kuma aka ba da izini.
reference: Tun daga 1988, dole ne akwatunan zabe su kasance ana ganin abin da ke cikinsu domin masu jefa ƙuri'a da masu sa ido su iya shaidar cewa babu wasu ambulan a ciki a farkon kada kuri'un da kuma cewa ba a kara wasu ambulan ba sai dai wadanda aka kidaya kuma daga masu zaɓe da aka tantance.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
hypothesis: 'Yan takara za su iya aika da wakilai don su shaida kowane ɓangare na aikin. A maraice, masu sa kai suna ƙidaya kuri'u a ƙarƙashin kulawa mai tsanani, bisa ga takamaiman hanyoyin.
reference: 'Yan takarar na iya aika wakilai don su shaida kowane bangare na aikin. Da yamma, masu aikin sa kai suna kidaya kuri'u a karkashin kula mai karfi, suna bin takamaiman hanyoyin.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
hypothesis: ASUS Eee PC, da aka ƙaddamar a duniya don adana farashi da dalilai na aiki, ya zama batun zafi a watan IT na Taipei na 2007.
reference: ASUS Eee PC, wanda aka ƙaddamar da farko a fadin-duniya don ceton-farashi ƙasa da dalilai na aiki, ya zama babban magana a cikin shekarar 2007 Watan Taipei IT.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
hypothesis: Amma kasuwar masu amfani da kwamfutar tafi-da-gidanka za ta bambanta sosai kuma ta canza bayan ASUS ta sami lambar yabo ta 2007 ta Taiwan Sustainable Award ta Shugaba Yuan na Jamhuriyar Sin.
reference: Amma kasuwar sayen ɗaiɗai ta kwamfutar hannu za ta banbanta ƙwarai kuma ta canja bayan Mai Zartarwa Yuan na Tarayar Ƙasar Sin ya bai wa ASUS lambar girman Taiwan Sustainable Award a 2007.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
hypothesis: Shafin yanar gizon tashar ya bayyana wasan kwaikwayon a matsayin "tsohon gidan wasan kwaikwayo na rediyo na makaranta tare da sabon juyawa mai ban tsoro!"
reference: Wurin gizo na tashar yana bayyana wasan kwaikwayon a matsayin “tsohon gidan wasan kwaikwayo na rediyo tare da sabon wasa mai ban tsoro!”

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
hypothesis: A farkon kwanakinsa, an nuna wasan kwaikwayon ne kawai a shafin rediyo na Intanet na TogiNet Radio, wani shafin da ya mai da hankali kan rediyo na magana.
reference: A farkon zamanin, an nuna wasan ne kawai a gidan rediyo na yanar gizo mai dogon lokaci TogiNet Radio, shafin da ke mayar da hankali kan maganan rediyo.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
hypothesis: A ƙarshen 2015, TogiNet ya kafa AstroNet Radio a matsayin tashar mataimaki.
reference: A karshen 2015, TogiNet ya kafa Rediyon AstroNet a matsayin ƙaramar tasha.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
hypothesis: A farkon wasan kwaikwayon ya ƙunshi 'yan wasan kwaikwayo na murya, na gida zuwa Gabashin Texas.
reference: Asalin dandalin ya nuna sabbin yan wasa na murya, yan asalin East Texas.

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
hypothesis: Rahotanni sun ce fashi da yawa ya ci gaba da dare, saboda jami'an tsaro ba su kasance a kan titunan Bishkek ba.
reference: Rahotanni sun nuna an kwashe tsawon daren ana wasoson kayan jama’a, sakamakon rashin jami’an tsaro a titunan Bishkek.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
hypothesis: Wani mai lura ya bayyana cewa garin Bishkek ya shiga cikin "mummunan yanayi", yayin da ƙungiyoyin mutane ke yawo a tituna kuma suna fashi da shagunan kayayyakin cinikayya.
reference: Wani mai lura ya bayyana Bishkek a matsayin wanda ke nutsewa cikin halin “fitina” yayin da gungun mutane suka yi ta yawo a titunan tare da fasa shagunan kayayyakin masarufi.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
hypothesis: Yawancin mazauna Bishkek sun zargi masu zanga-zangar daga kudu da rashin bin doka.
reference: Da dama cikin mazauna Bishkek sun zargi masu zanga-zangar da suka fito daga kudanci da halayyar rashin mutunta doka.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
hypothesis: Afirka ta Kudu ta doke All Blacks (New Zealand) a wasan rugby na Tri Nations a filin wasa na Royal Bafokeng a Rustenburg, Afirka ta Kudu.
reference: Afirka ta Kudu ta ci nasara akan All Blacks (New Zealand) a wasan rugby union na Tri Nations a filin wasan Royal Bafokeng dake Rustenburg, na kasar Afirka ta Kudu.

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
hypothesis: Sakamakon karshe shi ne nasara ta maki daya, 21 zuwa 20, wanda ya kawo karshen nasarar da All Blacks ta samu a wasanni 15.
reference: An tashi wasan da banbancin maki daya, wato 20-21, abinda ya kawo karshen samun nasarar All Black karo na 15 a jere.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
hypothesis: Domin Springboks, ya kawo karshen wasan shan kashi biyar a jere.
reference: Don 'yan Springboks, ya ƙare rashin nasara a wasanni biyar.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
hypothesis: Wannan shi ne wasan karshe na All Blacks, wanda ya riga ya lashe kofin makonni biyu da suka wuce.
reference: Wasan karshe ne na All Blacks, wanda tuni ya lashe kofin makonni biyu da suka gabata.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
hypothesis: Wasan karshe na jerin zai faru a Ellis Park a Johannesburg a mako mai zuwa, lokacin da Springboks suka yi wasa da Ostiraliya.
reference: Wasan karshe na rukunin zai gudana ne a Ellis Park a Johannesburg mako mai zuwa, lokacin da Springboks za ta buga da Australia.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
hypothesis: Wata girgizar kasa mai matsakaici ta girgiza yammacin Montana a karfe 10:08 na yamma a ranar Litinin.
reference: An yi wata matsakaiciyar girgizar kasa a yammacin Montana da karfe 10:08 na dare. ran Litinin.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
hypothesis: Ba a samu rahotanni na gaggawa game da lalacewar ba daga Hukumar Kula da Yanayin Duniya ta Amurka (USGS) da Cibiyar Bayanan Girgizar Kasa.
reference: Babu wani rahoto game da lalacewa nan take da Nazarin Yanayin Kasa na Amurka (USGS) da kuma Cibiyar Bayar da Bayani game da Girgizar Kasa suka samu.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
hypothesis: Girgizar ƙasa ta kasance a tsakiyar kimanin kilomita 20 (15 mil) arewa maso arewa maso gabashin Dillon, da kuma kimanin kilomita 65 (40 mil) kudu da Butte.
reference: Girgizar kasar ta fi kamari ne a tsakanin kilomita 20 (wato mil 15) a arewacin arewa maso gabas da kuma kimanin kilomita 65 (wato mil 40) kudu da Buttle.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
hypothesis: An tabbatar da cewa nau'in cutar mura ta tsuntsaye mai kisa ga mutane, H5N1, ta kamu da wata dabbar daji da ta mutu, da aka gano a ranar Litinin, a cikin marshland kusa da Lyon a gabashin Faransa.
reference: Nau’in cutar murar tsuntsaye mai hadari ta H5N1, an tabbatar ita ce ta kama agwagwar daji wadda aka samu ranar lahadi a wani surkuki kusa da garin Lyon da ke gabashin Faransa.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
hypothesis: Faransa ita ce kasa ta bakwai a cikin Tarayyar Turai da ta kamu da cutar; bayan Austria, Jamus, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Girka da Italiya.
reference: Faransa ce kasa ta bakwai a cikin Tarayyar Turai da ke fama da wannan cutar; sun bi Austria, Jamus, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Girka da Italiya.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
hypothesis: Har yanzu ba a tabbatar da yiwuwar kamuwa da cutar H5N1 a Croatia da Denmark ba.
reference: Har yanzu ba’a tabbatar da yawan mutane da ake zargi da kamuwa da H5N1 a Croatia da Denmark.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
hypothesis: Chambers ya kai karar Allah a kan "mutuwa mai yawa, halakarwa da kuma ta'addanci ga miliyoyin miliyoyin mazaunan duniya".
reference: Chambers ta yi karan Ubangiji saboda “yaɗuwar mutuwa ko’ina, halakawa da ta’addanci akan miliyoyin mutanen duniya.”

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
hypothesis: Chambers, wanda ba shi da imani da Allah, ya yi jayayya cewa shari'arsa "ba ta da kyau" kuma "kowa zai iya gurfanar da kowa".
reference: Majalisa, wani bafulatani, ya bayar da hujjar cewa karar shi “ba ta da kyau” kuma “kowa na iya tuhumar wani.”

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
hypothesis: A sakamakon haka, masu yin wasan kwaikwayon suna shan tabar wiwi a kan mataki, kuma gidan wasan kwaikwayon da kansa yana ƙarfafa masu sauraro su shiga.
reference: A sakamakon haka, masu wasan kan sha tabar wiwi akan dandamalin wasan, kuma shi kansa gidan wasan yana baiwa masu kallo ƙarfin guiwar yin haka.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
hypothesis: Tsohon shugaban majalisar wakilai Newt Gingrich, gwamnan Texas Rick Perry, da 'yar majalisa Michele Bachmann sun kammala a matsayi na hudu, na biyar, da na shida, bi da bi.
reference: Tsohon kakakin majalisar Newt Gingrich, gwamnan Texas Rick Perry, da uwargidan majalisar wakilai, Michele Bachmann sun gama a mataki na hudu, na biyar, da na shida, bi da bi.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
hypothesis: Bayan sakamakon ya zo, Gingrich ya yaba wa Santorum, amma yana da kalmomi masu wuya ga Romney, wanda a madadinsa aka watsa tallace-tallace na yakin neman zabe a Iowa game da Gingrich.
reference: Bayan sakamakon ya shigo, Gingrich ya yaba wa Santorum, amma yana da kalmomi masu wuya ga Romney, wanda a madadinsa aka gabatar da tallan kamfe mara kyau a Iowa da Gingrich.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
hypothesis: Perry ya bayyana cewa zai "koma Texas don kimanta sakamakon taron na yau da dare, ya ƙayyade ko akwai hanyar ci gaba a gare ni a wannan tseren", amma daga baya ya ce zai ci gaba da tseren kuma ya shiga gasar farko ta Carolina ta Kudu a ranar 21 ga Janairu.
reference: Perry ya fadi cewa zai “dawo Texas domin tantance sakamakon caucus na daren nan, in tantance ko akwai ko akwai alaman ci gaba man a wannan tsere”, amma daga baya ya ce zai ci gaba da tseren sannan ya yi gasan fid da gwani ran 21 ga Janairu a South Carolina.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
hypothesis: Bachmann, wanda ya lashe zaben Ames Straw Poll a watan Agusta, ya yanke shawarar kawo karshen yakin neman zabensa.
reference: Bachmann, wanda ya lashe zaben Ames Straw Poll a watan Agusta, ya yanke shawarar kawo karshen kamfen din ta.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
hypothesis: An kai mai daukar hoto zuwa Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, inda ya mutu daga baya.
reference: An ɗauki mai ɗaukar hoto zuwa Cibiyar Kiwon Lafiya ta UCLA ta Ronald Reagan, idan daga baya ya mutu.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
hypothesis: A cikin wata sanarwa, Bieber ya ce "duk da cewa ban kasance a wurin ba kuma ban shiga kai tsaye cikin wannan mummunar hatsarin ba, tunanina da addu'ata suna tare da dangin wanda aka azabtar".
reference: An ruwaito cewa yana cikin shekaran sa na 20 ne. A cikin wata sanarwa, Bieber ya ce “duk da ya ke ba na wurin kuma ba ni da hannu kai tsaye cikin wannan mummunan hadarin, tunani da addu'o’ina suna tare da dangin waɗanda abin ya rutsa da su.”

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
hypothesis: Shafin labarai na nishaɗi na TMZ ya fahimci cewa mai daukar hoto ya dakatar da motarsa a wancan gefen Sepulveda Boulevard kuma ya yi kokarin daukar hotuna na tashar 'yan sanda kafin ya tsallake hanya kuma ya ci gaba, wanda ya sa jami'in' yan sanda na California Highway Patrol da ke gudanar da tashar mota ya umarce shi ya sake tsallakewa, sau biyu.
reference: Shagin yanar-gizo na labarun nishaɗi na TMZ ya fahimta cewa mai ɗaukar hoto ɗin ya tsayar da motsarsa a tsallaken titin Sepulveda Boulevard kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin ɗaukar hotuna na tsayawar 'yan sanda kafin ya tsallaka titin kuma ya ci gaba, wanda ya sa ɗan sanda na Sintirin Babbar Hanya ta California wanda yake ba da hannu ya umarce shi ya koma a ƙetare, sau biyu.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
hypothesis: A cewar 'yan sanda, direba na motar da ta buga mai daukar hoto ba zai fuskanci tuhuma ba.
reference: Bisa ga fadin yan sanda, direban motan da ya buge mai hoton na iya fuskantan zargin aikata laifi.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
hypothesis: Tare da lambobin yabo guda goma sha takwas a rana, ƙasashe da yawa sun kasa samun lambar yabo.
reference: Da lambobin yabo goma sha takwas kacal da ake da su a rana, kasashe da dama sun gaza kaiwa ga dandamalin bada lambar yabo.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
hypothesis: Sun hada da Netherlands, tare da Anna Jochemsen ta kammala ta tara a cikin rukuni na mata a Super-G jiya, da Finland tare da Katja Saarinen ta kammala ta goma a wannan taron.
reference: Sun hada da Netherlands, yayin da Anna Jochemsen ta kammala a ta tara a jerin ajin mata a Super-G jiya, da Finland yayin da Katja ke kammalawa a na goma duk a bikin.

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
hypothesis: Mitchell Gourley na Ostiraliya ya gama matsayi na goma sha ɗaya a cikin Super-G na maza. Mai fafatawa na Czech Oldrich Jelinek ya gama matsayi na goma sha shida a cikin Super-G na maza.
reference: Mitchell Gourley na Ostiraliya ya gama na goma sha ɗaya a cikin tsayuwar Super-G na maza. Ɗan gasar Czech Oldrich Jelinek ya gama na goma sha shida a cikin Super-G na zaunen maza.

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
hypothesis: Arly Velasquez na Mexico ya gama matsayi na goma sha biyar a cikin maza na zaune Super-G. Adam Hall na New Zealand ya gama matsayi na tara a cikin maza na tsaye Super-G.
reference: Arly Velasquez na kasar Mexico ya ƙare a matsayin na goma sha biyar a jerin Super-G na maza na zaune. Adam Hall na New Zealand ya ƙare a matsayin na tara a Suƙer-G na maza na tsaye.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
hypothesis: Dan wasan Poland Maciej Krezel da jagora Anna Ogarzynska sun gama matsayi na goma sha uku a Super-G. Jong Seork Park na Koriya ta Kudu ya gama matsayi na ashirin da huɗu a Super-G na maza.
reference: Mazaje na Poland masu fama da rashin gani a wasan ƙwallon ƙafa Maciej Krezel da jagorar Anna Ogarzynska sun gama na goma sha uku a gasar Super-G. Jong Seork Park na Koriya ta Kudu ya kammala na ashirin da huɗu a gasar maza ta Super-G.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
hypothesis: A cewar karar, ba a tsabtace shara daga sansanin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya yadda ya kamata ba, saboda haka kwayoyin sun shiga kogin Artibonite, ɗaya daga cikin manyan kogin Haiti.
reference: A cewar karar, ba a tsaftace bata daga zangon UN kamar yadda ya kamata ba, ya haddasa kwayoyin cuta shigan ruwa wadda yake kwarara cikin Rafin Artibonite, daya daga ciki babba a Haiti.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
hypothesis: Cibiyar Adalci da Dimokradiyya ta Haiti ta yi nuni ga bincike mai zaman kanta da ya nuna cewa rundunar da ke kula da zaman lafiya ta Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta Nepal ta kawo cutar a Haiti ba tare da saninta ba.
reference: Cibiyar Tabbatar da Adalci da Demokradiyya ta ƙasar Haiti ta nakalto waɗansu ayyukan nazari masu zaman kansu waɗanda ke tsammanin bataliyar kiyaye zaman lafiya ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya da ke Nepal ce ta kawo cutar Haiti bisa rashin sani.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
hypothesis: Danielle Lantagne, gwani a Majalisar Dinkin Duniya a kan wannan cuta, ta ce jami'an tsaron zaman lafiya ne suka haddasa barkewar cutar.
reference: Danielle Lantagne, ƙwararriyar masaniyar Majalisar Dinkin Duniya kan cutar, ta bayyana cewa mai yiyuwa ne sojojin kiyaye zaman lafiya suka haifar da cutar.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
hypothesis: Mai haƙurin ya je Najeriya, inda aka samu wasu mutane da suka kamu da cutar Ebola.
reference: Marar lafiyar ya je Najeriya, inda aka samu wasu sun kamu da cutar ta Ebola.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
hypothesis: Asibitin ya bi ƙa'idodin da ake bi don hana kamuwa da cuta, ciki har da ware mai haƙuri daga wasu don hana yiwuwar kamuwa da wasu.
reference: Asibitin ta bi ka’idoji na kula da kamuwa da cuta, tare da raba masu jiyya daga sauran jama’a domin hana yaduwan cutan.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.
hypothesis: Duk da barin wasan kwaikwayon a shekara ta 1993 ya ci gaba da rike taken mai zartarwa, kuma ya ci gaba da karɓar dubban miliyoyin daloli a kowane kakar a cikin haƙƙin mallaka.
reference: Duk da barin wasan shirin a 1993 an cigaba da kiransa shugaban shiri, kuma ya cigaba da karbar miliyoyin daloli a kowace kaka na kamasho.

source: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
hypothesis: A baya, kamfanin dillancin labaran kasar Sin na Xinhua ya ruwaito cewa an sace wani jirgin sama.
reference: Tun farko kamfanin dillacin labarai na China Xinhua ya ba da rahoton wani jirgin da aka sace.

source: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
hypothesis: Rahotanni daga baya sun bayyana cewa jirgin ya karbi barazanar bam kuma an mayar da shi zuwa Afghanistan, ya sauka a Kandahar.
reference: Rahotanni daga baya sun nuna cewa an yi wa jirgin barazanar harin bam, sannan aka karkatar da shi zuwa Afghanistan, inda ya sauka a Kandahar.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
hypothesis: Rahotanni na farko sun ce an mayar da jirgin zuwa Afghanistan bayan an hana shi saukowa cikin gaggawa a Ürümqi.
reference: Rahotannin farko sun ce an juya akalar jirgin zuwa Afghanistan bayan an hana shi saukar gaggawa a Ürümqi.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
hypothesis: Hadarin jirgin sama na kowa ne a Iran, wadda ke da jirage masu tsufa da ba a kula da su sosai ba don ayyukan farar hula da na soja.
reference: Hadarin jirgin sama ya zama ruwan dare a Iran, sakamakon tsoffin jirage wadanda ba a kula da su na ayyukan farar hula da sojoji.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
hypothesis: A farkon wannan makon, wani hatsarin jirgin sama mai saukar ungulu na 'yan sanda ya kashe mutane uku kuma ya raunana wasu uku.
reference: A farkon makon nan ne, wani jirgi mai saukar ungulu na yan sanda ya yi hadari inda mutane uku suka rasa rayukansu yayinda wasu ukun su ka jikkata.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
hypothesis: A watan da ya gabata Iran ta fuskanci mummunar bala'in jirgin sama a cikin shekaru lokacin da wani jirgin sama da ke zuwa Armenia ya fadi, ya kashe mutane 168 da ke cikin jirgin.
reference: Watan da ta gabata Iran ta fuskanci bala’i mafi tsanani a shekaru da wata jirgin sama da ke hanyar zuwa Armenia ta fadi, ta kashe duka mutane 168 da ke ciki.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
hypothesis: A wannan watan ne wani jirgin sama ya mamaye hanyar tashi a Mashhad kuma ya buga bango, ya kashe mutane goma sha bakwai.
reference: A dai wannan watan ne wani jirgin saman ya kauce daga kan titin da jirgi yake tafiya a kai kafin tsahinsa a Mashad inda ya bugi wata katanga, tare da kashe mutum sha bakwai.

source: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.
hypothesis: Aerosmith sun soke sauran bukukuwan da suka yi a yawon shakatawa.
reference: Aerosmith sun soke sauran kade-kade a yawon shakatawansu.

source: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.
hypothesis: Za a yi wa ƙungiyar rock yawon shakatawa a Amurka da Kanada har zuwa 16 ga Satumba.
reference: Ƙungiyar makaɗan rock za ta fara yawon kaɗe-kaɗe a Amurka da Canada har zuwa 16 ga Satumba.

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
hypothesis: Lakkha Singh ya gabatar da chhappan bhog bhajan kuma mawaƙa, Raju Khandelwal yana tare da shi.
reference: Lakkha Singh ya kuma gabatar da Chhappan Bhog Bhajan. Singer da Raju Khandelwal yana rakiyarsa.

source: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.
hypothesis: A gabatarwar ranar Alhamis ta Tokyo Game Show, shugaban Nintendo Satoru Iwata ya gabatar da tsarin sarrafawa don sabon kwamfutar Nintendo Revolution na kamfanin.
reference: A lokacin gabatar da babban bayani na ranar Alhamis a Nunin Wasan Tokyo, shugaban Nintendo Satoru Iwata ya kaddamar da tsarin sarrafawa na sabuwar na’urar Nintendo Re volution.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
hypothesis: Wannan na'urar tana kama da na'urar talabijin, kuma tana amfani da na'urori masu auna sigina biyu da aka saka kusa da na'urar talabijin don ta nuna matsayinta a sararin samaniya.
reference: Kamar da abun kuna talabijin daga nesa wato remote, mai sarrafawa yana amfani da na’urorin sunsuna guda biyu da aka sanya kusa da talabijin ɗin mai amfani don daidaita matsayinta a cikin sarari mai fuska uku.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.
hypothesis: Giancarlo Fisichella ya rasa ikon motarsa kuma ya ƙare tseren nan da nan bayan farawa.
reference: Motar Giancarlo Fisichella ta kwace masa inda hakan ya jawo fitarsa daga tseren jim kaɗan bayan farawa.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
hypothesis: Sa'ad da ya gama tseren, abokin aikinsa Fernando Alonso ne ya ci gaba da tseren, amma ya gama bayan da ya gama tseren, wataƙila domin ƙafafunsa na gaba na dama sun yi rauni sosai.
reference: Abokin wasansa Fernando Alonso shi ne kan gaba a mafi wasane, amma ya tsaya bayan dakatawar zango, watakila saboda lanƙwashewar wilin tayar gaba na ɓangaren dama ne.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.
hypothesis: "Ta kasance kyakkyawa sosai kuma tana raira waƙa sosai, ma", in ji shi bisa ga rubutun taron manema labarai.
reference: “Tana da kyau sannan tana waka da kyau, kuma,” ya bayana bisa ga kwafi na taron masu yada labaru.

source: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."
hypothesis: "Na yi farin ciki sosai a duk lokacin da muka yi wa'azi game da wannan, daga zuciyata".
reference: “An motsa ni kowane lokacin da muke yin maimaitawa kan wannan, daga cikin zuciya ta.”

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
hypothesis: Kimanin minti uku bayan kaddamar da jirgin, kyamarar da ke cikin jirgin ta nuna abubuwa da yawa na kumfa mai rufi sun karye daga tankin man fetur.
reference: Kimanin mintuna 3 da harba jirgin, na’urara daukan hoton da ke ciki ta nuna yadda wani soson kariya ya balle daga jikin tankin mai.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.
hypothesis: Duk da haka, ba a yi zaton sun yi wani lahani ga jirgin.
reference: Duk da haka, ba'a tunanin cewa sun haifar da wata ɓarna ga abin sufurin.

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
hypothesis: A cikin minti biyar a cikin nuni iska ta fara juyawa, game da minti daya daga baya, iska tana kaiwa 70km / h... sa'an nan ruwan sama ya zo, amma da karfi da kuma haka mai girma cewa ta buga fata kamar allura, sa'an nan hazo ya fadi daga sama, mutane firgita da kuma ihu da kuma gudu a kan juna.
reference: Mintuna biyar da fara nunin wata iska ya fara shigowa ciki, kusan minti daya daga baya, iskar ta doshi 70km/h... daga baya ruwan sama yazo, amma da yawa da karfinsa ya sauko yadda zai bugi fatarka kamar allura, saannan wani kankara ya fado daga sama, mutane suna firgita suna kururuwa suna tattake juna.

source: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.
hypothesis: NHK ta kuma ruwaito cewa tashar makamashin nukiliya ta Kashiwazaki Kariwa a lardin Niigata tana aiki yadda ya kamata.
reference: NHK ta kuma ruwaito cewa masana’antar samar da makamashin nukiliya ta Kashiwazaki Kariwa a gundumar Niigata tana aiki yadda yakamata.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
hypothesis: An ruwaito cewa kusan gidaje 9,400 a yankin ba su da ruwa kuma kusan gidaje 100 ba su da wutar lantarki.
reference: An ba da rohoto cewa gidaje 9400 a yankin ba su da ruwa sannan kusan 100 ba su da lantarki.

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
hypothesis: An lalata wasu hanyoyi, an katse tashar jirgin kasa a yankunan da abin ya shafa, kuma filin jirgin saman Noto da ke lardin Ishikawa ya ci gaba da rufewa.
reference: Wasu hanyoyi sun lalace, al'amuran jirgin kasa ya katse a wuraren da abin ya shafa, kuma Filin jirgin saman Noto da ke yankin Ishikawa ya kasance a rufe.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
hypothesis: Wasu rahotanni sun ce mutane takwas ne suka mutu, kuma rahotanni sun tabbatar da cewa har mutane 30 ne suka ji rauni; amma har yanzu ba a san lambobin ƙarshe ba.
reference: Wasu rahotanni sun kai adadin mutuwan zuwa takwas, kuma tabbatacciyar rahoto na tabbatar da cewa mutum 30 suka ji rauni; amma ba a san adadin ƙarshe ba.

source: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.
hypothesis: Masu bincike a jami'ar sun ce waɗannan abubuwa biyu suna yin aiki tare don su samar da lu'ulu'u da za su iya hana makogwaro yin aiki.
reference: Magungunan biyu suna aiki tare da juna don samar da lu'ulu'u wanda zai iya toshe aikin koda, masu bincike a jami'ar sun ce.

source: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.
hypothesis: Masu binciken sun lura da lu'ulu'u da aka samu a cikin fitsarin cats ta wajen ƙara melamine da cyanuric acid.
reference: Masu binciken sun lura cewa kiristal sun taru a fisarin kyanwa ta hanyar karin sinadarin melanin da cyanuric.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
hypothesis: Duk da haka kashi 80 cikin dari na kayayyakinmu an yi musu haraji ta hanyar haraji a kasashen Amurka ta tsakiya. Muna kula da ku.
reference: Duk da haka kashi tamanin cikin kayan mu sun samu haraji a kasashen Amurka ta tsakiya. Zamu kula da kai.

source: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.
hypothesis: A ganina, hakan bai da ma'ana, kuma ba gaskiya ba ne.
reference: Na kasa fahimtar abin, hakika babu adalci a ciki.

source: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.
hypothesis: 'Yan wasan kankara huɗu a rukuni na mata sun kasa gama gudu, kuma 45 daga cikin 'yan wasan kankara 117 a cikin Giant Slalom sun kasa samun matsayi a tseren.
reference: Hudu daga cikin masu tsere a kungiyar mata sun gaza kamala gudu, kuma 45 a cikin 117 masu tsere a Giant Slalom sun kasa samun nasara a tseren.

source: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.
hypothesis: Ofishin Crown, wanda ke da alhakin gurfanar da mutane, ya sanar da 'yan jarida cewa ba za a sake yin karin bayani ba a kalla har sai an shigar da kara.
reference: Ofishin gabatar da Ƙararraki, wanda ke da alhakin gabatar da tuhuma, ya bayyana wa ‘yan jarida cewa ba shi da wani bayani da zai kara har sai bayan an karbi shigar da karar.

source: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.
hypothesis: A cewar rahoton, takardar za ta yi magana ne game da rikicin kan iyakoki, wanda Falasdinu ke so dangane da iyakoki kafin yakin Gabas ta Tsakiya na 1967.
reference: Takardar, gwargwadon fallasar, za ta yi magana ne kan rikicin iyakoki, wanda Falasɗinawa ke son ya ɗora shi kan iyakokin kafin Yaƙin Gabas ta Tsakiya na 1967.

source: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.
hypothesis: Wasu batutuwa da aka tattauna sun haɗa da yanayin Urushalima a nan gaba wanda yake da tsarki ga al'ummai biyu da kuma batun kwarin Urdun.
reference: Sauran batu da aka tattauna bisa ga fadi sun hada da Jerusalem a nan gaba wadda ke da tsarki ga al’umma biyun tare da batun Jordan Valley.

source: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.
hypothesis: A watan da ya gabata kwamiti na shugaban kasa ya bada shawarar murabus na tsohon CEP a matsayin wani bangare na matakan da za su motsa kasar zuwa sabon zabe.
reference: A watan da ya gabata ne wani kwamiti na shugaban kasa ya ba da shawarar murabus din CEP tun gabani a matsayin bangare na kunshin daukar matakan ciyar da kasar gaba zuwa sabon zabe.

source: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.
hypothesis: Wasu lokutan zanga-zangar da ake yi da tashin hankali sun faru ne saboda rashin gudanar da zabe, wasu daga cikinsu sun kasance tun shekarar 2011.
reference: Zanga-zangar da wani lokaci suke da tashin hankali sun faru ne saboda gaza yin zaɓuɓɓuka, waɗansu lokacinsu ya wuce tun 2011.

source: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.
hypothesis: Ofishin kula da gaggawa na Arewacin Marianas ya ce babu wani lalacewar da aka ruwaito a kasar.
reference: Ofishin gudanarwar da aikin gaggawa na Northern Marianas ya ce babu rohoton barna da aka samu a ƙasar.

source: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.
hypothesis: An ceto mutane da dama da aka yi garkuwa da su kuma an tabbatar da mutuwar akalla shida har zuwa yanzu.
reference: An ceto da dama cikin wadanda aka yi garkuwa da su din, yayin da aka tabbatar da mutuwar akalla guda shida daga cikinsu ya zuwa yanzu.

source: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.
hypothesis: Xinhua ta ruwaito cewa masu binciken gwamnati sun dawo da na'urorin rikodin jirgin sama guda biyu a ranar Laraba.
reference: Xinhua ya bayar da rahoton cewa masu binciken gwamnati sun gano na’urorin naɗar sauti biyu na 'bakin akwatin’ ranar Laraba.

source: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.
hypothesis: Mai karɓar lambar zinare ta Olympics ya kamata ya yi iyo a cikin 100m da 200m freestyle da kuma a cikin reluwe uku a Wasannin Commonwealth, amma saboda korafe-korafensa ya kasance cikin shakku.
reference: Wanda ya lashe lambar zinare a gasar Olympics ya kamata ne ya yi iyo a tseren mita 100 da 200 kuma a cikin wasanni uku a wasannin Commonwealth, amma saboda korafin da ya yi ya nuna shakku kan lafiyar sa.

source: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.
hypothesis: Wataƙila tauraron sama ne suka kawo ruwa zuwa duniya tare da abubuwa masu rai da za su iya samar da sunadarai da kuma ci gaba da rayuwa.
reference: Mai yiwuwa taurari masu wutsiya sun kasance ta cikinsu ruwan sama ke zuwa duniya tare da takin dabbobi wanda ke iya samar da kayan gina jiki domin tallafar rayuwa.

source: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
hypothesis: Ọ gbakwụnyere, sị: "Anyị nwere òké ndị dị ọnwa anọ ugbu a na-enweghị ọrịa shuga, bụ́ ndị na-arịa ọrịa shuga n'oge gara aga".
reference: Ugbu a, anyị nwere ụmụ oke ọnwa anọ na-arịabu ọrịa shuga mana ha anaghị arịazi ya.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
hypothesis: Dr. Ehud Ur, bụ́ prọfesọ nke nkà mmụta ọgwụ na Mahadum Dalhousie dị na Halifax, Nova Scotia na onyeisi oche nke ngalaba ahụike na nke sayensị nke Canadian Diabetes Association dọrọ aka ná ntị na nnyocha ahụ ka dị ná mmalite ya.
reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, ọkammụta nke ọgwụ na Mahadum Dalhousie nọ na Halifax, Nova Scotia na onye isi oche nke ngalaba ụlọ ọgwụ na sayensi ahụ nke Òtù Ọrịa Shuga ndị Kanada dọrọ aka na ntị na nnyocha ahụ ka nọ n’oge ndị mbụ ya.

source: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
hypothesis: Dị ka ụfọdụ ndị ọkachamara ndị ọzọ, ọ na-enwe obi abụọ ma a pụrụ ịgwọ ọrịa shuga, na-ekwu na nchọpụta ndị a enweghị ihe jikọrọ ha na ndị nwere ụdị ọrịa shuga 1.
reference: Ka ndị ọkachamara ndị ọzọ, o kwenyeghị na a ga agwọtanwu ọrịa shuga, o depụtara na ihe nchọpụta ndị a enweghị mmetụta nye ndị nwere ọrịa shuga Taịp 1.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
hypothesis: Danius kwuru, sị, "N'oge a, anyị anaghị eme ihe ọ bụla. M akpọwo ma zigara onye ya na ya na-arụkọ ọrụ ozi ịntanetị ma nweta nzaghachi dị nnọọ mma. Maka ugbu a, nke ahụ ezuola".
reference: Danius si, "Ugbu a anyị anaghị eme ihe ọbụla. Akpọọlam oku ma zijere onye ya na ya kacha arụkọ ozi ịntaneetị ma nwetekwa ụsa nnabata. Ugbua nke ahụ zuru oke."

source: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
hypothesis: N'oge gara aga, onyeisi oche nke Ring, Jamie Siminoff, kwuru na ụlọ ọrụ ahụ malitere mgbe a na-anụghị mgbịrịgba ọnụ ụzọ ya site n'ụlọ ahịa ya dị n'ogige ụgbọala ya.
reference: Na mbu,onye isi Ring, Jamie Siminoff, kwuru na ulo oru ya bidoro mgbe onughi mgbirigba ya n’ulo ahia ya di na ime ebe o na adoba ugboala ya.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
hypothesis: Ring mekwara mkpesa megide ụlọ ọrụ nche na-asọmpi, ADT Corporation.
reference: Ring dozikwara otu ikpe ha na ụlọ ọrụ ọzọ na-ahụ maka nchekwa, ADT Corporation nwere.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
hypothesis: Ọ bụ ezie na otu ọgwụ mgbochi yiri ka ọ pụrụ ibelata ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị na-anwụ anwụ site n'ọrịa Ebola, ruo ugbu a, ọ dịghị ọgwụ e gosipụtara n'ụzọ doro anya na o kwesịrị ekwesị maka ịgwọ ọrịa dị ugbu a.
reference: Ọ bụ eziokwu na otu ọgwụ mgbochi aka na-ele anya egosila na o nwere ike ịbelata oke ndị mmadụ ji anwụ n'ihi ọrịa Ebola, mana ruo ugbu a, enwebeghi ọgwụ ọbụla gosiri hooha na o nwere ike ịgwọ onye bu ọrịa a.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
hypothesis: N'ule PALM, ZMapp jere ozi dị ka njikwa, nke pụtara na ndị ọkà mmụta sayensị jiri ya mee ihe dị ka ntọala ma jiri ya tụnyere ọgwụgwọ atọ ndị ọzọ.
reference: Na nnwale PALM, eji ZMapp mere ihe nruba ama, nke a putara na ndi sayentist jiri ya mee baseline tunyere ogwugwo ato ozo.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics na-akwado nyocha nke onwe ya nke nwere ike inye ìhè n'otú mmegbu nke akụkụ ahụ akọwapụtara nke ọma site n'aka ndị lanarịrị Larry Nassar nwere ike isi ghara ịchọpụta ruo ogologo oge ma na-agụnye mgbanwe ọ bụla dị mkpa na nke kwesịrị ekwesị.
reference: Mpaghara jimnasktik nke obodo USA kwadoro nlebara anya nke onwe nke nwere ike igosi ka mmegbu nke ndị lanarịrị ihe mberede Larị Nassar kọwapụtara nwere ike ịbụ ihe metere aka a na-amaghị maka ya na anabatakwa mgbanwe ndị kwesịrị ekwesị.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics na USOC nwere otu ihe mgbaru ọsọ  ime ka egwuregwu nke gymnastics, na ndị ọzọ, dị ka nchekwa dị ka o kwere mee maka ndị na-eme egwuregwu ịgbaso nrọ ha na gburugburu ebe obibi dị mma, nke dị mma ma nwee ike.
reference: Egwuregwu Jimnastik nke mba USA na ndi USOC nwere otu ebumnobi - ime egwuregwu jimnastik, na ndi ozo, enweghi iyi-egwu dika ike kwere nye ogwu egwu isoro nro ha n’uzo n’enweghi iyi-egwu, ziri-ezi na gburu-gburu akwadoro akwado.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
hypothesis: N'afọ ndị 1960, Brzezinski rụrụ ọrụ maka John F. Kennedy dị ka onye ndụmọdụ ya wee bụrụ onye nchịkwa Lyndon B. Johnson.
reference: Na 1960 ga, Brzezinski rụụrụ John F. Kennedy ọrụ dị ka onye ndụmọdụ ya ma mechaa rụọkwa otu ihe ahụ n'oge ọchịchị Lyndon B. Johnson.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
hypothesis: N'oge nhọrọ nke 1976, ọ na-adụ Carter ọdụ na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị mba ọzọ, wee jee ozi dị ka National Security Advisor (NSA) site na 1977 ruo 1981, na-anọchi Henry Kissinger.
reference: N’ime nghọpụta nke 1976, ọ dụrụ Carter ndụmọdụ gbasara iwu ndị mba ofesi, wee rụzie ọrụ dịka Onye ndụmọdụ Nchekwa Mba (NSA) site na 1977 ruo 1981, na nnọchi Henry Kissinger.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
hypothesis: Gosling na Stone natara aha maka Best Actor na Actress n'otu n'otu.
reference: E deturu aha Gosling na Stone n'otu ndị nwere ịnweta akara nturu ugo Best Aktọ na Best Aktres, n'otu n'otu.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
hypothesis: N'isi ụtụtụ Sọnde, Onye isi ala United States bụ Donald Trump, na nkwupụta o nyere site n'aka odeakụkọ, kwupụtara na ndị agha US ga-ahapụ Syria.
reference: Ka ụbọchị Sọnde nọ na ngwụcha, Onye isi ọchịchị obodo Yunaịted Steeti bụ Donald Trọmp, kwuru n'ozi e nyere site n'aka onye ode akwụkwọ ndị nta akụkọ, nke sịrị na ndị agha obodo US ga ahapụ Sirịa.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
hypothesis: A mara ọkwa a mgbe Trump nwere mkparịta ụka ekwentị na Onye isi ala Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: E kwuputara nke a mgbe Trump na Onyeisiala mba Tọkị bụ Rejep Tayyip Erdoghan nwechara mkparịtaụka n'ekwentị.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
hypothesis: Ọ bụghị nanị na nke a na-egosi na ọ dịkarịa ala ụfọdụ dinosaur nwere nku, nke bụ echiche a na-ahụkarị, ma na-enye nkọwa ndị fossil na-enweghị ike, dị ka agba na nhazi atọ.
reference: Nke a na-egosi na, opekata mpe, ụfọdụ daịnosọọ nwere abụba; ọtụtụ ndị mmadụ nwere echiche a taa, mana ihe ọzọ bụ na ọ na-egosi anyị ihe fosịl enweghị ike igosi, dịka agba na nhazi akụkụ-atọ.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
hypothesis: Ihe a chọpụtara na-enyekwa anyị ihe ọmụma banyere evolushọn nke nku n'ime nnụnụ.
reference: Ihe nchọpụta ahụ nyekwara ntụziaka gbasara mmalite ipu nku n'ụmụ nnụnụ.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Ndị nchọpụta ahụ kwuru na ọ bụ ezie na ọ bụ ọdụ nke nwa dinosaur, ihe e mere n'ihe atụ ahụ na-egosi plumage nke ndị toro eto, ọ bụghị nke nwa nnụnụ.
reference: Nhazi nku ha gosiri na ha ejighi ya efe efe kama ha ji ya edokwa okpomọkụ maọbụ eme ihe ngosi. Ndị nchọpụta ihe tụrụ aro sị na, n'agbanyeghị na nke a bụ ọdụ daịnosọ na-eto eto, ihe ngosi ahụ gosiri nku anụ tochara etocha na-abụghị nku nwa anụ.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Ndị nchọpụta ahụ tụrụ aro na ọ bụ ezie na nke a bụ ọdụ nke nwa okorobịa dinosaur, ihe nlele ahụ na-egosi plumage okenye na ọ bụghị a chick si ala.
reference: Ndị nchọpụta ihe tụrụ aro sị na, n'agbanyeghị na nke a bụ ọdụ daịnosọ na-eto eto, ihe ngosi ahụ gosiri nku anụ tochara etocha na-abụghị nku nwa anụ.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
hypothesis: Ụgbọala bọmbụ gbawara n'isi ụlọ ọrụ ndị uweojii dị na Gaziantep, Turkey ụtụtụ ụnyaahụ gburu ndị uweojii abụọ ma merụọ ihe karịrị mmadụ iri abụọ ahụ.
reference: Otu bọmbụ gbawara n'isi ụlọ ọrụ ndị uwe ojii n’ime Gaziantep, Tọkii ụtụtụ ụnyaahụ na-egbu ndị uwe ojii abụọ ma merụọ ahụ ihe karịrị ndị mmadụ ọzọ iri abụọ.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
hypothesis: Ọfịs gọvanọ kwuru na mmadụ iri na itoolu n'ime ndị merụrụ ahụ bụ ndị uweojii.
reference: Ụlọ ọrụ gọvanọ kwuru iri na itoolu na ndị merụrụ ahụ bụ ndị uwe ojii.

source: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.
hypothesis: Ndị uweojii kwuru na ha na-enyo enyo na ọ bụ onye agha Daesh (ISIL) kpatara mwakpo ahụ.
reference: Ndị uwe ojii sị na ha na-enyo otu onye a na-ebo ebubo na ọ bụ onye agha nnupuisi Daesh (ISIL) dịka onye mere mwakpo ahụ.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
hypothesis: Ha chọpụtara na anyanwụ na-arụ ọrụ n'otu ụkpụrụ ndị ahụ dị ka kpakpando ndị ọzọ: A chọpụtara na ihe na-eme kpakpando niile nọ n'usoro ahụ bụ ìhè ha, otú ha si atụgharị, na ihe ọ bụla ọzọ.
reference: Ha chọpụtara na Anyanwụ na-arụ ọrụ n’otu ụdị isi iwu dịka kpakpandu ndị ọzọ: A chọpụtara na omume kpakpandu niile nọ na sistemụ bụ onwunwu ọkụ na ntụgharị ha na-anya ha, ma ọ nweghị ihe ọzọ..

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
hypothesis: A na-eji ìhè na ntụgharị mee ihe ọnụ iji chọpụta ọnụ ọgụgụ Rossby nke kpakpando, nke metụtara plasma.
reference: A na-ejikọta ọnụ ọnwụnwụ ọkụ na ntụgharị ya amata akara Rossby nke otu kpakpando, nke metụtara na ọwụwụ plasma.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
hypothesis: The ọsọ nke 802.11n bụ n'ụzọ dị ịrịba ama ngwa ngwa karịa ndị bu ya ụzọ na a kacha nkà mmụta sayensị throughput nke 600Mbit/s.
reference: Na 802.11n, ọsịsọ ya ji nnukwu ihe kara nke ndị bu ya ụzọ; ya mere, ọrụ ọ na-arụpụta ga-eru 600Mbit/s.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
hypothesis: Hu gbara mba ndị ka na-emepe emepe ume "izere ụzọ ochie nke ibu ụzọ na-emetọ ihe ma mechaa kpochapụ ya".
reference: Hu gbara obodo ndị na emepe emepe ume "ka ha ghara itinye aka n'usoro omume mgbe ochie bụ ibu ụzọ metọọ were kpochawa ma emechaa."

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
hypothesis: O kwukwara na "a gaghị agwa ha ka ha buru ibu ọrụ gafere ọkwa mmepe ha, ibu ọrụ ha na ikike ha".
reference: O tinyekwara na "ha ekwela ka adị ha buru ibu karịrị ogugo uto na ike ha."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
hypothesis: Òtù Nnyocha Iraq gosipụtara akụkọ ya n'elekere 12 GMT taa.
reference: Òtù Mmụta Irak ahụ gosipụtara nchọpụta ya na 12.00 GMT taa.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
hypothesis: Ọ na-adọ aka ná ntị na Ọ dịghị onye pụrụ ikwe nkwa na ihe ọ bụla a ga-eme n'Irak n'oge a ga-akwụsị agha nke òtù dị iche iche, ime ihe ike na-arịwanye elu, ma ọ bụ ọgba aghara.
reference: Ọ dọrọ aka na ntị sị na onweghị onye ga-ekwe nkwa na usoro ọbụla e jiri mee ihe na mba Aịrak ugbu a ga-akwụsị agha otu, ntolite ihe ike, maọbụ ndabanye n'ọgbaghara.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
hypothesis: Nwanyị Kirchner kwupụtara ebumnuche ya ịzọ ọkwa onye isi ala na Argentine Theatre, otu ebe ahụ ọ malitere mkpọsa ya na 2005 maka Senate dị ka onye so na ndị nnọchianya nke Buenos Aires.
reference: Ọ bụ n'Ajentaịn Tiyeta ka Lọọlọ Kirchner kwuputara ebumnuche ya ịzọ maka ọkwa onye isi ala, otu ebe ahụ ọ ji bido kampen ya maka ọkwa Sịnetọ na 2005 dịka onye otu nke ndị mpaghara Buenos Aires zigara.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
hypothesis: Mkparịta ụka ahụ malitere site na esemokwu banyere mmefu maka enyemaka na iwughachi mgbe ajọ ifufe Katrina gasịrị; nke ụfọdụ ndị na-ahụ maka ego na-emefu ego kpọrọ "Nkwekọrịta New Orleans nke Bush" n'ụzọ na-atọ ọchị.
reference: Ọ bụ esemokwu maka mmefu ego na nkwado na nrụgharị e mere mgbe Oke ikuku Katrina gasịrị kpatara arụmụka a; ụfọdụ ndị kweere na iji nwayọ emefụ ego steeti akọwaala mmefụ a n'ụzọ ntọrọmọchị dịka "Nkwekọrịta Niu Ọlịns nke Bush mere".

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
hypothesis: Ihe karịrị nde mmadụ anọ gara Rom ịga olili ozu ya.
reference: Ihe karịrị nde mmadụ anọ gara Rom maka olili ahụ.

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
hypothesis: Ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị bịara ya dị nnọọ ukwuu nke na ọ dịghị onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịga ebe a na-eli ozu na St. Peter's Square.
reference: Ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị mmadụ nọ ebe n'ahụ dị ukwuu nke na o kweghị mmadụ niile omume inwèta òhèrè n'olili ozu na St. Peter Square.

source: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.
hypothesis: E wuru ọtụtụ nnukwu telivishọn n'ebe dị iche iche na Rom ka ndị mmadụ nwee ike ile ihe omume ahụ.
reference: Etinyere ọtụtụ nnukwu igwe onyonyo n'ọtụtụ ebe na Rom, ka ndị mmadụ nwee ike kirie mmemme ahụ.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
hypothesis: N'ọtụtụ obodo ndị ọzọ dị n'Ịtali nakwa n'ebe ndị ọzọ n'ụwa, karịsịa na Poland, e mere ihe ndị yiri ha, bụ́ ndị ọtụtụ mmadụ lere anya.
reference: N'ọtụtụ obodo Itali ndị ọzọ ma na uwa nile, ọkachasị na Poland, emere nkwazi dị ka ibe ya, nke ọtụtụ mmadụ hụrụ.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
hypothesis: Ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme akatọọla iwu ndị gara aga nke FBI maka ilekwasị anya n'okwu ndị dị mfe idozi, ọkachasị ikpe ụgbọ ala ezuru, na ebumnuche nke ịkwalite ọnụego ihe ịga nke ọma nke ụlọ ọrụ ahụ.
reference: Ndị akụkọala akọtọla ụmụ iwuikikere FBI ndị gara aga maka ịgbado anya akụrụngwa n’ụmụ okwu ndị dị mfe ikpezi, tụmadị ụmụ okwu ụgbọ ala ezuru ezuru, n’iji ebumnobi nke ịkwalite nsìàga ọganihu ha.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
hypothesis: Ndị na-agba bọọlụ etiti, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, mere nke ọma ma mee mkpakọrịta otu narị.
reference: Ndị na-eji batị akụ n'usoro etiti, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid rụrụ ọrụ nke ọma ma mee otu nrụkọọrụ nke ọsọ-otu narị.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
hypothesis: Ma, mgbe ọ tụfuru wicket nke onyeisi ndị agha, India mere naanị 36 runs na-efunahụ 7 wickets iji mechie innings.
reference: Mana, mgbe ha dara wicket India naanị mere 36 gbara ọ tọpụ wicket 7 iji kwụsị innings.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
hypothesis: Onye isi ala United States bụ́ George W. Bush rutere Singapore n'ụtụtụ nke November 16, na-amalite njem otu izu ga-ewe n'Eshia.
reference: U.S. Onye isi oche Jiọj W. Bush batata Singapọ n'ụtụtụ ụbọchị nke iri na isii nke ọnwa Nọvemba, iji malite njem njegharị mba Eshia nke ga-anọzu otu izuụka.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
hypothesis: Ma Prime Minister John Howard ekwuola na iwu ahụ bụ nanị iji chebe ụlọ ọgwụ ahụ ka gọọmentị Tasmania ghara imebi ya, site n'inye AUD $ 45 nde ọzọ.
reference: Mana Prime Minista John Howard ekwuola na ihe a mere bụ naanị ka ichebe ụmụ akụrụngwa nke ụlọ ọgwụ ahụ site n'aka mwedàta siri n'aka gọọmentị Tasmania, n'inye mmezi nke nde AUD$45.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
hypothesis: Onyeisi ala United States bụ́ George W. Bush nabatara ọkwa ahụ.
reference: Onyeisiala mba Amerịka bụ George W. Bush nabatara ọkwa ahụ.

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
hypothesis: Oké ifufe nke iri a kpọrọ aha n'oge oké ifufe Atlantic, bụ́ Subtropical Storm Jerry, guzobere n'Oké Osimiri Atlantic taa.
reference: Oke ifufe nke iri abụrụ aha nke oge oke ifufe Atlantik, Oke ifufe akpọrọ Jeri, gbakọrọ n'oke osimiri atlantik taa.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
hypothesis: Òtù Ndị Injinịa United States kwuru na mmiri ozuzo ruru sentimita asatọ nwere ike imebi ebe ndị ahụ e mebiri emebi n'oge gara aga.
reference: Ụlọ Ọrụ nke Ndị injinia nke U.S. mere atụmatụ na mmiri mmiri dị inchi isii nwere ike ịgabiga ihe mgbochi ide mmiri e mebibiri na mbụ.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
hypothesis: Mmetụta ahụ ìgwè ahụ na-achọ ga-abụ nke a na-akpata site na ike tidal n'etiti galaxy si ọchịchịrị ihe onwunwe na Milky Way si ọchịchịrị ihe onwunwe.
reference: Mmetụta otu ahụ nọ na-achọ ga-esite n'aka ikikere taịdị ndị dị n'etiti mata ojii nke galaxy na mata ojii nke Milky Way.

source: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.
hypothesis: Dị nnọọ ka ọnwa na-adọta ụwa, na-akpata idei mmiri, otú ahụ ka Milky Way na-adọta ụyọkọ kpakpando Sagittarius.
reference: Dị ka ọnwa na etinye ndọta n’ụwa, na-akpata elili mmiri, etu ahụ ka Milky Way ahụ si etinye ike na galazi Sagittarius ahụ.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
hypothesis: Akụkọ telivishọn na-egosi na anwụrụ ọkụ ọcha na-esi n'ụlọ ọrụ ahụ apụta.
reference: Ụmụ akụkọ si telivishọn na-egosi anwụrụ ọcha si n'igwe nrụpụta ahụ apụta.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
hypothesis: Ndị ọchịchị obodo ahụ na-adọ ndị bi n'akụkụ ụlọ ọrụ ahụ aka ná ntị ka ha nọrọ n'ime ụlọ, gbanyụọ ikuku na-ekpo ọkụ ma ghara ịṅụ mmiri pọmpụ.
reference: Ndị isi obodo na-adọ ndị bi n'obodo gburugburu igwe ọrụ ahụ aka na ntị ka ha nọrọ n'ime ụlọ, gbanyụọ ntụ oyi ma ghara iṅu mmiri na-agba n'ụlọ.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
hypothesis: Ndị ọchịchị na-ekwu na nke a na-egosi na akpa ndị nwere mmanụ uranium n'ebe ahụ nwere ike ịgbawa ma na-agbapụta.
reference: Ndị isi chere na nke a na-egosi na o nwere ike gbọmgbọm ndị ji mmanụ ụgbọ yurenium agbawaala ma na-ehi ehi.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
hypothesis: Dr. Tony Moll chọpụtara ọrịa ụkwara nta nke na-eguzogide ọgwụ ọjọọ nke ukwuu (XDR-TB) n'ógbè South Africa bụ́ KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Dr. Toni Moll chọpụtara nje Tubakụlọsis (XDR-TB) nke na-emegide ọgwụ na ngalaba Sawụt Afrịka nke KwaZulu-Natal.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
hypothesis: Ha ka na-agbalị ịchọpụta otú ihe mberede ahụ dịruru ná njọ na otú ọ ga-esi metụta ụwa.
reference: Ha ka na anwale ịchọpụta etu ibu mkpọka ahụ dị ma etu ọ ga-esi emetụta Uwa.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
hypothesis: A ga-ebo otu dọkịta na-arụ ọrụ n'Ụlọ Ọgwụ Ụmụaka dị na Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania ebubo maka igbu ọchụ siri ike mgbe a hụrụ nne ya nwụrụ anwụ n'ime akpa ụgbọala ya na Wednesday, ndị ọchịchị Ohio na-ekwu.
reference: Otu dibia-bekee onye rubuuru oru ulo-ogwu umuaka nke pittsburgh, Pennysylvania ka aga ekpe ikpe banyere igbu-mmadu nke akpasuru-iwe ka ahuchara nne ya na azu ugbo-ala na-onwu n’ubochi Wednesde, ka ndi isi no na Ohio kwuru.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
hypothesis: Ọ gwara ndị uwe ojii ka ha gaa n'ebe ọ na-akwọ ụgbọala gbara ọchịchịrị, nke dị mita 500 n'ebe dị anya.
reference: Ọ dụrụ ndị ọrụ nche gaa na Oldsmobile Intrigue ojii ya nke nọ n’ụzọukwu narị ise n’itoanya.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
hypothesis: Ndị uweojii kwuru na o yiri ka ozu ahụ anọwo ebe ahụ ruo ihe dị ka otu ụbọchị.
reference: Ndị uwe ojii kwuru na ahụ ahụ dị ka ọ nọọla ebe ahụ ruo ihe dị ka otu ụbọchị.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
hypothesis: A na-ebute ọrịa a site n'aka ụmụ anụmanụ, bụ́ ndị na-esi n'aka anwụnta agafe ụmụ mmadụ.
reference: Ezi na ebu ọrịa ahụ, nke anwụnta na ebunyezi ndị mmadụ.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
hypothesis: Ọtụtụ nde karama ọgwụ mgbochi ọrịa ụbụrụ ka gọọmentị kwere nkwa, nke ga-enyere ụlọ ọrụ ahụike aka ịkwadebe maka afọ ọzọ.
reference: Ọgwụ mgbochi ensefalitis dị nde kwuru nde ka gọọmenti kwere na nkwa, nke ga-akwado ndị ọrụ ahụike maka afọ na-abịa abịa.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
hypothesis: O mepụtara ihe karịrị otu puku stampụ maka Sweden na mba 28 ndị ọzọ.
reference: O mepụtaara stampụ karịrị 1,000 maka Swidin na mba 28 ndị ọzọ.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
hypothesis: Ọrụ ya dị nnọọ mma nke na ọ bụ otu n'ime "aha ezinụlọ" ole na ole n'etiti ndị philatelists.
reference: Oru ya bunke amaara nke oma na iti igba ma doo kwa anya nke oma na obu otu nime ndi amaara n’ezinulo nile na ndi philatelist. Ufodu lekwasiri anya nnoo na ichikota oru ya nani.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
hypothesis: Mgbe ihe mberede ahụ gasịrị, a kpọgara Gibson n'ụlọ ọgwụ ma nwụọ obere oge ka e mesịrị.
reference: Mgbe ihe mberde ahụ mechara, e buru Gibson gawa n’ụlọ ọgwụ mana ọ nwụrụ mgbe obere oge gachara.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
hypothesis: Onye na-akwọ ụgbọala ahụ, bụ́ onye dị afọ 64, emerụghị ahụ n'ihe mberede ahụ.
reference: Ọkwọ ụgbọ gwongworo ahụ, nke gbara afọ 64, emerụghị ahụ na mkpọka ahụ.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
hypothesis: A chụpụrụ ụgbọala ahụ n'ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere n'ihe dị ka 1200 GMT n'otu ụbọchị ahụ.
reference: N'otu ụbọchị ahụ, ebe elekere nke iri na abụọwepụrụ ụgbọ ahụ n'ebe ihe mbere mere.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
hypothesis: Otu onye na-arụ ọrụ n'ebe a na-adọba ụgbọala dị nso n'ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere kwuru, sị: "Ụmụaka nọ na-eche ka ha gafee okporo ụzọ, ha niile nọkwa na-eti mkpu ma na-ebe ákwá".
reference: Otu onye na-arụ ọrụ ebe a na-adọba ụgbọala nọ n’akụkụ ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere kwuru si: "E nwere ụmụaka nọ na-eche ịgafe okporo ụzọ ahụ nakwa ha nille nọ na-eti mkpu ma na-ebe akwa."

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
hypothesis: Isiokwu ndị ọzọ dị n'usoro ihe omume na Bali gụnyere ịzọpụta oké ọhịa ndị fọdụrụ n'ụwa, na ịkekọrịta nkà na ụzụ iji nyere mba ndị ka na-emepe emepe aka itolite n'ụzọ ndị na-emetọghị ihe.
reference: Ihe ndi ozo akpara na Bali bu izoputa ohia ndi ozo di n’uwa na ikee nka n’uzu nwere ike inyere ndi mba n’ebilite aka itoo n’uzo ga-akwusi mmeto ikuku.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
hypothesis: Fluke dere na mgbalị ụfọdụ mere iji mee ka ụmụ nwanyị ghara ikwu okwu banyere ahụ́ ike ụmụ nwanyị enwebeghị ihe ịga nke ọma.
reference: Fluke dere na mbo ufodu gbara ihu na emechiri onu umunwanyi iji kwusi ha ikwuputa okwu maka ihe gbasara ahuike umu nwanyi agaghi nkeoma.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
hypothesis: Ọ bịara ná nkwubi okwu a n'ihi ọtụtụ okwu ọma na agbamume ndị ụmụ nwanyị na ụmụ nwoke zitere ya na-agba ume ka e were ọgwụ mgbochi afọ ime dị ka ihe dị mkpa n'ịgwọ ọrịa.
reference: O ruru na mkpebi a n'ihi ọtụtụ okwu nkwado o nwetara n'aka ụmụnwoke ma ụmụnwaanyị ndị sị ya na ọgwụ mgbochi afọ ime bụ ihe kwesịrị ekwesị.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
hypothesis: Mgbe agha ahụ kwụsịrị mgbe a kpọgara ndị ahụ e merụrụ ahụ n'ụlọ ọgwụ, ihe dị ka ndị mkpọrọ 40 fọdụrụnụ nọgidere n'ogige ma jụ ịlaghachi n'ọnụ ụlọ mkpọrọ ha.
reference: Oge ya bụ ọgụ gwụchara mgbe e wegara ndị merụrụ ahụ n'ụlọ ọgwụ, ihe dị ka ndị mkpọrọ 40 fọrọ afọ nọọrọ na mpụga, jụ ịlaghachi n'ime ụlọ mkpọrọ ha.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
hypothesis: Ndị nkwurịta okwu gbalịrị idozi ọnọdụ ahụ, ma ihe ndị mkpọrọ ahụ chọrọ edoghị anya.
reference: Ndị mkparịta ụka nwara ịweta udo, mana ihe ndị mkpọrọ chọrọ edoghi anya.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
hypothesis: N'agbata elekere iri na elekere iri nke ehihie na ehihie, ndị mkpọrọ gbara ọkụ n'ogige ụlọ mkpọrọ ahụ.
reference: N'etiti 10:00 na 11:00 MDT n'abalị, ndị mkpọrọ nọ na mpụta mụnyere ọkụ.

source: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.
hypothesis: N'oge na-adịghị anya, ndị uwe ojii ji ngwá agha ndị na-egbochi ọgba aghara bata n'ogige ụlọ mkpọrọ ma jiri gas anya mmiri tụba ndị mkpọrọ ahụ n'akụkụ.
reference: N'oge na-adịghị anya, ndị ọrụ uwe ojii ejikere na gịa ogbaaghara batara n'ime yad ahụ ma jiri gaasị anya mmiri wee gbakọta ndị mkpọrọ n’otu ebe.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
hypothesis: N'ihi ya, ụdị azụ abụọ anwụọla, abụọ ndị ọzọ nọkwa n'ihe ize ndụ.
reference: N’ihi nke ahụ, ụdị azụ abụọ ekpochapụla, ma abụọ ndị ọzọ abụrụla ndị nọ n’ihe ize ndụ, gụnyere humpback chub.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
hypothesis: Ọ bụ ezie na e nweghị iyi egwu tsunami, ndị bi na ya malitere ịtụ ụjọ ma malite ịhapụ ụlọ ọrụ ha na ụlọ ha.
reference: Agbanyeghị na enweghị ihe n'egosi na a ga-enwe sunami, ndi bi ebe ahụ bidoro tụwa egwu, jiri ọsọ na-ahapụsị ụlọ na ahịa ha.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
hypothesis: Ọ bụ ezie na anya mmiri gbara Winfrey n'oge ọ na-agbahapụ ya, o mere ka o doo ndị na-akwado ya anya na ya ga-alaghachi.
reference: N'agbanyeghi na Winfrey bu anya mmiri n'okwu ije ọma ya, o mere ka ndị ihe ya na-amasị mata nke ọma na ọ ga-alọghachi.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
hypothesis: "Nke a agaghị abụ ịgbaghara. Nke a bụ mmechi nke otu isi na mmeghe nke ọzọ".
reference: “Nke a abụghị ịsị ka e mesịa. Nke a bụ imechi otu isi na imeghe nke ọhụrụ.”

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
hypothesis: Ihe mberede ahụ mere n'ebe dị elu n'ugwu, a na-ekwetakwa na ọ bụ ọkụ ndị iro kpatara ya.
reference: Mkpọkasị ahụ mere n'elu ugwu, e kwenyekwara na ọ bụ ya kpatara ajọ ọkụ.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
hypothesis: Ọnọdụ ihu igwe na-adịghị mma na ala siri ike na-egbochi mgbalị ndị a na-eme ịchọta ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere.
reference: Mgbalị ị na-achọ saịtị okuku ahụ na-emebi ihu igwe site na ihu igwe dị njọ na ala siri ike.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
hypothesis: Òtù na-ahụ maka ahụike bụ́ Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na Òtù Ahụ Ike Ụwa na-ekwu na ọ bụ ọrịa kasị njọ e dekọrọ na mba ahụ.
reference: Ụlọ ọrụ enyemaka ahụike Mangola, 'Medecines Sans Frontieres', na Wọld Helt Ọganaịzeshọn na-ekwụ na ọ bụ ntiwapụ ọrịa kachasị njọ ahụrụla na mba ahụ.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
hypothesis: Otú ha si agbachitere onwe ha, otú ha si eji bọl arụ ọrụ, na otú ha si arụ ọrụ nke ọma mere ka ha pụta ìhè, o dokwara anya na ọ bụ ndị a ka ha ga-emeri.
reference: Ụzọ mkpachapụ anya ha n’ime mgbochi, ka ha si ejide bọọlụ ma ụzọ nhàzi pụrụ iche mere ha ka ha pụọ iche ma o doro ha anya n’òtù a bụ òtù ha ga-emeri.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
hypothesis: Ọnụ ụzọ niile e si abanye n'ọgba ahụ, bụ́ ndị a kpọrọ "Ụmụnne Ndị Inyom Asaa", dịkarịa ala 100 ruo 250 mita (328 ruo 820 ụkwụ) n'obosara.
reference: Ụzọ niile dị n'ọgba ahụ a kpọrọ “Ụmụnne nwanyị asaa” dị ihe dịka opekatampe 100 mita ruo mita 250 (fiiti 328 ruo 820) na dayamita.
