source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
hypothesis: "Ha dị jụụ karịa ala gbara ha gburugburu n'ehihie ma na-ekpo ọkụ n'abalị.
reference: Ha na-adị oyi karịa gburugburu ha n'ehihie ma dị ọkụ karịa n'abalị.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
hypothesis: Ọdịdị okpomọkụ ha adịghị ka nke nnukwu ọgba ndị dị n'ụwa, bụ́ ndị na-anọgide na-enwe okpomọkụ na-adịgide adịgide, ma ọ na-egosi na ha bụ oghere ndị miri emi n'ala", ka Glen Cushing nke United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team na nke Northern Arizona University dị na Flagstaff, Arizona kwuru.
reference: Omume okpomọkụ ha anaghị adịgide ka nnukwu ọgba dị n'ụwa nke na-enwe okpomọkụ na-anaghị agbanwe, mana ọ dị ka ndị a maka na ha bụkwa olulu miri emi n'ime ala," Glen Cushing kwuru, onye United States Geology Survey (USGS) Otu Astrojiọlọji na nke Mahadum Northern Arizona dị na Flagstaff, Arizona.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
hypothesis: Kemgbe 1988, igbe ntuli aka aghaghị ịbụ ndị a na-ahụ anya ka ndị na-ahọpụta na ndị na-ekiri ya wee nwee ike ịgba akaebe na ọ dịghị envelopu ọ bụla dị na mmalite nke ntuli aka ahụ nakwa na ọ dịghị envelopu ọ bụla a na-agbakwunye ma e wezụga nke ndị ntuli aka a gụrụ nke ọma ma nye ha ikike.
reference: Kemgbe 1988, ụmụ igbe ntuli aka ga-abụrịrị ngafe-ahụ-ụzọ ka ndị ntụli aka na ndị nnyota ga-agba akaebe na o nweghị envelopu nọ na ya mgbe a na-ebido ntuli aka nakwa o nweghị envelopu etinyere ewezụga nke ndị agụgwere ọnụ ma nye ikikere nke ọma.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
hypothesis: N'abalị, ndị ọrụ afọ ofufo na-agụta votu n'okpuru nlekọta siri ike, na-agbaso usoro ndị a kapịrị ọnụ.
reference: Ndị a na atụrụ ụtụ nwere ike iziga ndị nnọchiteanya ka ha gbaa ama ihe nile mere. Na mgbede, ndị ọrụ efu ga agụkọ ụtụ nile na oke nlegideanya , ma site n'usoro atọrọ atọ.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
hypothesis: ASUS Eee PC, nke a tọhapụrụ n'ụwa niile maka ịzọpụta ọnụahịa na ihe ndị na-arụ ọrụ, ghọrọ isiokwu na-ekpo ọkụ na 2007 Taipei IT Month.
reference: ASUS Eee PC, ewepụtara ụwa niile na mbụ maka ụmụ ihe nchekwa-ego na arụmọrụ ya, wụrụ isiokwu na-ewu ewu n’Ọnwa IT Taipei 2007.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
hypothesis: Ma ahịa ndị na-azụ ahịa na kọmputa laptọọpụ ga-agbanwe ma gbanwee n'ụzọ dị ukwuu mgbe ASUS nwetara onyinye Taiwan Sustainable Award 2007 site na Executive Yuan nke Republic of China.
reference: Mana ogugo ahịa kọmpụta laptop ga-agbanwe ma dị iche ri nne ka ASUS nwetachara Nturu ugo Taịwan Sọstenebụl Awọdụ n'afọ 2007 site n'aka Ezekutiv Yuan si na Repọblik Chaịna.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
hypothesis: Na njedebe nke 2015, TogiNet guzobere AstroNet Radio dị ka ụlọ ọrụ enyemaka.
reference: N'ọgwụgwụ afọ 2015, TogiNet bidoro AstroNet Redio dị ka mpaghara nọ n'okpuru ya.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
hypothesis: Otu onye na-ekiri ihe na-eme na-akọwa Bishkek dị ka ọ na-adaba n'ọnọdụ "ọgba aghara", ebe ìgwè ndị mmadụ na-awagharị n'okporo ámá ma na-apụnara ụlọ ahịa ihe oriri.
reference: Otu onye nkere anya kọwapụtara Bishkek dịka ihe na-emikpu n'ọnọdụ "ọgba aghara", ka ndị mmadụ na akpagharị na eburughara ngwa ahịa n'ike.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
hypothesis: Ọtụtụ ndị bi na Bishkek boro ndị na-eme ngagharị iwe si n'ebe ndịda ebubo maka mmebi iwu ahụ.
reference: Otutu ndi bi na Bishkek tara ndi na-eme ngaghari iwe si na odida anyanwu uta gbasara imebi iwu

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
hypothesis: Saụt Afrịka meriri ndị All Blacks (New Zealand) na egwuregwu rugby union Tri Nations na Royal Bafokeng Stadium na Rustenburg, South Africa.
reference: Mba Sawụtụ Afrịka emeriela Ọl Bụlaksị (Nuu Ziilandị) n'egwuregwu rọgụbi nke Mbanaatọ n'ama egwuregwu Royal Bafokeng nke dị na Rọstenbọgụ, Sawụtụ Afrịka.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
hypothesis: Ọ bụ egwuregwu ikpeazụ maka All Blacks, bụ́ ndị meriri iko ahụ izu abụọ gara aga.
reference: Ọ bụ ịsọmpi ikpeazụ nke Ọl Blaks ndị merigoro ihe nnweta izu ụka abụọ gara aga.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
hypothesis: Ala ọma jijiji dị ala mere n'ebe ọdịda anyanwụ Montana n'elekere 10:08 nke mgbede na Mọnde.
reference: Ala ọma jijiji dị larịị mara ọdịda anyanwụ Montana jijiji mgba ojiri nkeji asatọ gafee elekere nke iri n'abalị Monde.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
hypothesis: Enwetabeghị akụkọ ozugbo banyere mmebi site na United States Geological Survey (USGS) na National Earthquake Information Center ya.
reference: Mpaghara mba Yunaịted Steeti na-ahụ maka mmegharị ala (USGS) na mpaghara nke na-ezite ozi gbasara ala ọma jijiji enwetabeghị mkpesa ihe mmebi.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
hypothesis: Ala ọma jijiji ahụ mere ihe dị ka kilomita iri abụọ n'ebe ugwu ọwụwa anyanwụ Dillon, nakwa ihe dị ka kilomita iri isii na ise n'ebe ndịda Butte.
reference: Ala ọma jijiji ahụ nwere etiti ya na ihe dị ka km 20 (maịlị 15) ugwu-ebe ugwu ọwụwa anyanwụnke Dillon, na ihe dị ka km 65 (maịlị 40) ndịda nke Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
hypothesis: A kwenyesiri ike na ụdị nje nnụnụ na-egbu ụmụ mmadụ, H5N1, ebutewo ọnyà ọhịa nwụrụ anwụ, nke a hụrụ na Mọnde, n'ala ahịhịa dị nso na Lyon n'ebe ọwụwa anyanwụ France.
reference: N'ụbọchị Mọnde, n'ala mpịtọ dị Lyon nso nke dị n'ọwụwa anyanwụ mba Frans, ka achọpụtara na ọrịa gburu otu ọbọgwụ bụ ụdịrị ọrịa nnụnụ nke nwere ike igbu mmadụ, bụ H5N1.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
hypothesis: A ka na-ekwenyeghị ikpe ndị a na-enyo enyo nke H5N1 na Croatia na Denmark.
reference: Enwere orịa a ka na-enyo enyo ka ọ bụ H5N1na mba Kroeshia na Denmak.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
hypothesis: Chambers gbara Chineke akwụkwọ maka "mgbukpọ nke ọnwụ, mbibi, na iyi egwu nke ọtụtụ nde ndị bi n'ụwa".
reference: Chambers gbara Chukwu akwụkwọ maka "ọnwụ zuru ebe niile, mmebi na iyi egwu eyiri nde ka nde mmadụ bi n’ụwa."

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
hypothesis: Chambers, bụ́ onye na-ekweghị na Chineke, na-ekwu na ikpe ya bụ "ihe efu" nakwa na "onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịgba onye ọ bụla akwụkwọ".
reference: Chambers, onye na-ajụkarị oge niile, na-agbagha na ikpe ya "abaghị uru" ma "onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịkụ onye ọbụla ikpe."

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
hypothesis: Onye bụbu onyeisi oche ụlọomeiwu bụ́ Newt Gingrich, gọvanọ Texas bụ́ Rick Perry, na onye omebe iwu bụ́ Michele Bachmann nọ n'ọnọdụ nke anọ, nke ise, na nke isii, n'otu n'otu.
reference: Onye na-ekwubu okwu n'ụlọ omeiwu bụ Newt Gingrich, onye isi obodo Tekzas bụ Rik Perị, na onye otu nzukọ omeiwu Mishel Bakmann mechara gba ndị anọ, ise na isii, n'usoro.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
hypothesis: Bachmann, bụ́ onye meriri na Ames Straw Poll n'ọnwa Ọgọst, kpebiri ịkwụsị mkpọsa ya.
reference: Bakman, onye meriri Ntuliaka Ames Strọ n'Ọgọọst, kpebiri ịkwụsị kampen ya.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
hypothesis: A kpọgara onye na-ese foto ahụ na Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, ebe o mechara nwụọ.
reference: E bugara onye ahụ na-ese fòto na Ụlọ Ọgwụ Reagan UCLA, ebe o mechara nwụọ.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
hypothesis: N'otu nkwupụta, Bieber kwuru, sị: "Ọ bụ ezie na anọghị m ebe ahụ ma ọ bụ nwee ihe jikọrọ m na ihe mberede a dị mwute, echiche m na ekpere m dị n'ebe ezinụlọ onye ahụ nwụrụ anwụ nọ".
reference: A kọbụrụ na ọ nọ n’ime ụmụ afọiri abụọ ya. N’otu nkwupụta, Bieber siri "Agbanyeghị na ọ nọghị ma ọ sonyeghị ozugbo ọdachi ihe mberede okporo ụzọ a, echiche na ekpere m nonyere ezinụlọ ndị onye a tara ahụhụ."

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
hypothesis: Dị ka ndị uwe ojii si kwuo, ọ gaghị ekwe omume na a ga-ebo onye na-akwọ ụgbọala ahụ kụrụ onye na-ese foto ebubo.
reference: Dị ka ndị uwe ojii kwuru, ọkwụ ụgbọ ala ahụ suru onye na-ese fòto eleghị anya ọ gaghị enwe ebubo mpụ ọ bụla.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
hypothesis: Ha gụnyere Netherlands, ebe Anna Jochemsen mechara nke itoolu na klas ụmụ nwanyị na-eguzo na Super-G ụnyaahụ, na Finland na Katja Saarinen mechara nke iri n'otu asọmpi ahụ.
reference: Ha gụnyere mba Nedalands, ebe Anna Jochemsen gbara onye nke itoolu n'egwuregwu nkwụmọtọ ụmụ nwanyị nke asọmpi Super-G ụnyaahụ, na Fịnland ebe Katja Saarinen gbara onye nke iri n'otu egwuregwu ahụ.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
hypothesis: Dị ka akwụkwọ ikpe ahụ si kwuo, e meghị ka ihe ndị e kpofuru n'ogige UN dị ọcha nke ọma, nke mere ka nje bacteria banye n'akụkụ Osimiri Artibonite, bụ́ otu n'ime osimiri ndị kasị ibu na Haiti.
reference: Na-ndabere n’ikpe ahụ, ehichaghị ọfụma mkpofu si na kampụ UN, nke na-akpata nje ịbanye nna nwaghara ụzọ nke osimiri Artibonite, otu n’ime nke Haịti kachasị ibu.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
hypothesis: Ụlọ Ọrụ Na-ahụ Maka Ikpe Ziri Ezi na Ọchịchị Democracy nke Haiti ekwuola na e nwere nnyocha ndị e mere n'onwe ha nke na-egosi na ndị agha mba ndị Nepal nke na-ahụ maka udo nke Mba Ndị Dị n'Otu wetara ọrịa ahụ na Haiti n'amaghị ama.
reference: Ụlọọrụ ikpe na ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya na Haiti atụjela aka n'ọmụmụ sị na ndị agha udo UN nke Nepal bubatara ọrịa na Nepal n'amaghị ama.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
hypothesis: Danielle Lantagne, bụ́ ọkachamara nke Òtù Mba Ụwa n'ihe banyere ọrịa ahụ, kwuru na ọ ga-abụ ndị agha udo kpatara ọrịa ahụ.
reference: Danielle Lantagne, otu onye ọkachamara UN n’ọrịa ahụ, kwuru na ntiwapụ ahụ bụ ndị na-eme ụdọ nwere ike ịkpata ya.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
hypothesis: Onye ọrịa ahụ gara Naịjirịa, bụ́ ebe e nweela ụfọdụ ndị butere nje Ebola.
reference: Onye ọrịa ahụ agabuola na Naịjirịa, ebe a na-enwela ụfọdụ ndị bu nje Ebola ahụ.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
hypothesis: Akụkọ ndị mbụ na-ekwu na e zighachiri ụgbọelu ahụ n'Afghanistan mgbe a jụrụ ya ọdịda mberede na Ürümqi.
reference: Mkpesa mbụ kwuru na achụghachiri ụgbọelu ahụ azụ gawa Afghanistan mgbe anapụrụ ya ikikere ịfedà na mberede n’Ürümqi.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
hypothesis: Ihe mberede ụgbọelu bụ ihe a na-ahụkarị na Iran, nke nwere ụgbọ mmiri na-aka nká nke a na-ejighị n'aka maka ọrụ ndị nkịtị na ndị agha.
reference: Ihe mberede ụgbọ elu, na-eme ọtụtụ mgbe na mba Aịran, nke nwere ụgbọ elu ndị agha na ndị nkịtị kara nka nke anaghị eleọkọta anya nke ọma.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
hypothesis: Ná mmalite nke izu a, ihe mberede nke helikopta ndị uwe ojii gburu mmadụ atọ ma merụọ mmadụ atọ ọzọ ahụ́.
reference: Na mbido izu a, helịkọpta ndị uwe ojii kpọkasịrị gbuo mmadụ atọ ma merụọ mmadụ atọ ọzọ ahụ.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
hypothesis: N'ọnwa gara aga, Iran hụrụ ọdachi ụgbọelu ya kasị njọ kemgbe ọtụtụ afọ mgbe ụgbọelu na-aga Armenia dara, na-egbu mmadụ 168 nọ n'ụgbọelu ahụ.
reference: N’ọnwa gara aga Iran hụrụ ihe ọdachi ikuku ya kachasị njọ n’ọtụtụ afọ mgbe otu ụgbọ elu na-aga Amenịa kpọkara, na-egbu ndị 168 nọ n’ime ya.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
hypothesis: N'otu ọnwa ahụ, ụgbọelu ọzọ gbara n'okporo ụzọ ụgbọelu dị na Mashhad ma kụọ mgbidi, gbuo mmadụ iri na asaa.
reference: N'otu ọnwa ahụ ka ụgbọ elu ọzọ na Mashhad si n'ụzọ ya gbapụ sụnye isi na mgbidi, were gbuo mmadụ iri na asaa.

source: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.
hypothesis: Murray tụfuru set mbụ ahụ n'otu n'otu mgbe ndị ikom abụọ ahụ jidere onye ọ bụla na-eje ozi na set ahụ.
reference: Emeriri Murray na seti nke mbu na ndorondoro njirimara onye mmeri mgbe umu nwoke abuo jidere bolu ọ bụla n’ime setị.

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
hypothesis: Lakkha Singh gosipụtakwara chhappan bhog bhajan. Onye na-agụ egwú, Raju Khandelwal so ya.
reference: Lakkha Singh gosirikwara chhappan bhog bhajan. Oguegwu, Raju Khandelwal nọ na-esonye ya.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
hypothesis: Onye otu ya, bụ́ Fernando Alonso, nọ n'isi n'ihe ka ukwuu n'ọsọ ahụ, ma ọ kwụsịrị ya ozugbo ọ kwụsịrị, ikekwe n'ihi na ọ kụrụ ụkwụ n'ihu n'akụkụ aka nri.
reference: Onye otu ya Fenando Alonso nọ n'isi ọsọ ọtụtụ mgbe, mana nke ahụ kwụsịrị mgbe ọ kwụsịrị ụgbọala ya, o nwere ike ịbụ n'ihi ụkwụ ihu ụgbọala a na-etinyeghi nke ọma.

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
hypothesis: N'ihe dị ka nkeji atọ mgbe e bidoro ụgbọelu ahụ, otu igwefoto dị n'ụgbọelu gosiri na ọtụtụ iberibe ụfụfụ ihe mkpuchi na-agbapụ na tankị mmanụ ụgbọala ahụ.
reference: K’oforo nkeji 3 ka ha fenyie, igwefoto no n’ime ugbo ahu gosirika otutu foam n’ekpuchi ihe kewapuru na tanki mmanu.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
hypothesis: A na-akọ na ihe dị ka ụlọ 9400 n'ógbè ahụ enweghị mmiri na ihe dị ka 100 enweghị ọkụ eletrik.
reference: A kọrọ na ụfọdụ ebeobibi dị 9400 na mpaghara ahụ nọ na-enweghị mmiri ma ihe dị ka 100 na-enweghị ọkụ eletriki.

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
hypothesis: E mebiri ụzọ ụfọdụ, a kwụsịrị ọrụ ụgbọ okporo ígwè n'ebe ndị ahụ, a ka mechikwara ọdụ ụgbọelu Noto dị n'ógbè Ishikawa.
reference: O mebiri ụfọdụ ụzọ, kwụsịtụ njem ụgbọ oloko n'ebe ndị o metụtara, ma ọdụ ụgbọelu Ishikawa ka mechiri emechi.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
hypothesis: Ụfọdụ akụkọ na-ekwu na ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị nwụrụ anwụ ruru mmadụ asatọ, akụkọ ndị gọọmenti na-egosikwa na ihe ruru mmadụ 30 merụrụ ahụ; ma a maghị ọnụ ọgụgụ ikpeazụ.
reference: Akụkọ ụfọdụ sịrị na mmadụ asatọ nwụrụ, ma akụkọ gọọmenti sị na ihe ruru mmadụ iri atọ merụrụ ahụ; ma na amatabeghị ọnụ ọgụgụ ikpeazụ.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
hypothesis: N'agbanyeghị nke ahụ, a na-atụ ụtụ isi pasent 80 nke ngwongwo anyị site n'ụtụ isi na mba ndị dị na Central America. Anyị na-emeso gị ihe.
reference: Ma a nara ụtụ isi pasentị iri asatọ na ngwaahịa anyị site na ụmụ tarifu na mba Keetiti Amerịka. anyị na-eleta gị anya.

source: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.
hypothesis: A kọrọ na isiokwu ndị ọzọ a na-ekwu banyere ha gụnyere ihe ga-eme n'ọdịnihu na Jeruselem, bụ́ nke mba abụọ ahụ weere dị ka ihe dị nsọ, nakwa okwu banyere ndagwurugwu Jọdan.
reference: Isiokwu ndị ọzọ ekpuchiri gụnyere site n'ihe akọrọ ọdịnihu Jerusalem nke dị nsọ nye mba abụọ ahụ na okwu Ndagwurugwu Jọdan.

source: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.
hypothesis: A napụtawo ọtụtụ ndị ahụ e ji gbuo ndị mmadụ, a chọpụtawokwa na ọ dịkarịa ala mmadụ isii anwụọla ruo ugbu a.
reference: Azọpụtara ọtụtụ ndị eji èji ma mmadụ isii ka ekwuru na ha anwụọla.

source: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
hypothesis: Agĩcoka akĩongerera ũũ: "Rĩu tũrĩ na mbeũ cia mĩaka ĩna iria itarĩ na cukari, iria ciarĩ na cukari wa cukari".
reference: "Rĩu twĩna mbĩa cia mĩeri ĩna irarĩ na mũrimũ wa cukari na rĩu itirĩ naguo" Nake akĩongerera.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
hypothesis: Dr. Ehud Ur, profesa wa ũrigitani thĩinĩ wa Yunivasiti ya Dalhousie thĩinĩ wa Halifax, Nova Scotia, na mũtongoria wa gĩkundi kĩa ũrigitani na gĩthomo kĩa Canadian Diabetes Association, nĩ eerire atĩ ũthuthuria ũcio ũrĩ o matukũ-inĩ ma mbere.
reference: Dagĩtarĩ Ehud Ur, profesa wa dawa cukuru mũnene wa Dalhousie Halifax, Nova Scotia na mũikarĩri gĩtĩ wa rũhonge rwa ũrigitani na ũthuthuria wa gĩkundi kĩa arũaru a mũrimu wa cukari Canada akĩheana mũkana atĩ ũthuthuria no hĩndĩ ũrambĩrĩirie

source: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
hypothesis: Mũthia-inĩ wa mwaka wa 2017, Siminoff nĩ onanirie TV ya QVC.
reference: Mwaka wa 2017 ugĩ thira, Siminoff nionekanire televisheni ya ũgũri QVC.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
hypothesis: O na ningĩ Ring nĩ aahotire kũiguithania na kambuni ĩmwe ya ũgitĩri, ADT Corporation.
reference: Ring nĩacokire akĩnina ciira wa watho na acindani ake a kambũni ya ũgitĩri, ADT.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
hypothesis: O na gũtuĩka ndawa ĩmwe ya gwĩthondeka nĩ yonekaga ĩrĩ na ũhoti wa kũniina gĩkuũ kĩa andũ arĩa makoragwo na mũrimũ wa Ebola, nginya rĩu gũtirĩ ndawa ĩngĩonanĩtie wega atĩ nĩ yagĩrĩire kũhiũrania na mũrimũ ũcio.
reference: Onakoro njajo ĩmwe ya kũgeria kũgitĩra mũrimũ nĩyonekanĩte ta ĩranyihia ikuũ ciĩtanĩtio na mũrimũ wa Ebola, nginyagia ihinda rĩrĩ gũtirĩ ndaawa njega biũ cia gũthondeka mĩrimũ ĩrĩa ĩkuo.

source: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
hypothesis: Kĩndũ kĩmwe gĩetagwo ZMapp, kĩarĩ na irathimo nyingĩ mũno, no ũthuthuria nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ kĩahotete kũgirĩrĩria andũ gũkua.
reference: Antibody cocktail ĩmwe, Zmapp, kĩambĩrĩria nĩyaheanĩte mwĩhoko mwena-inĩ, no mathomo mahetũkie makĩonania yarĩ na ũmithio mũnini kũringana na ũrĩa wendekanaga kurigĩrĩria ikuũ.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
hypothesis: Thĩinĩ wa mũgeranio wa PALM, ZMapp nĩ yatungataga ta mũtaratara wa gwĩthondeka, ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩ athomi a sayansi nĩ maamũhũthĩrire ta mũtaratara wa kwambĩrĩria na makĩringithania mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩtatũ ya ũrigitani na mũtaratara ũcio.
reference: Mageria-inĩ ma PALM, Zmapp yatũmĩriro nĩ atalamu a sayansi ta gĩthimi gĩa kũgerekania na ndaawa icio ingĩ ithatũ.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru marũa ma United States Olympic Committee na nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru mabataro ma famĩlĩ ya Olympic ya kũrehe ũgitĩri harĩ athuthuria aitũ othe.
reference: USA Gymnastics nĩmetĩkanĩtie na marũa ma committee ya America ya Olympics atĩ kwĩna bata mũnene wa andũ othe mahutainie na mathako ma olympics gũteithĩrĩria mathingira na matũra gũkoro na ũgitĩri ũrĩa wagĩrĩire harĩ athaki.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
hypothesis: Nĩ twĩtĩkĩranagia na ciugo cia USOC atĩ maũndũ ma athũngũ na ikundi ciitũ, o hamwe na mathako mao, no matungatwo na njĩra njega na njĩra ya gũthiĩ na mbere na mogarũrũku ma bata thĩinĩ wa ithondeka ritũ, handũ ha kũniinwo.
reference: Nĩtwĩtĩkĩranĩtie na mandĩkithia ma USOC at wendi wa athaki na irabu na mathako mao no ũkinyanĩire na njira ya gũthiĩ na mbere na mogarũrũku makinyanĩru ciũngano-inĩ ciao gũtarĩ kwehutĩrio certificate

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
hypothesis: U.S. Gymnastics nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru ũthuthuria wĩyathi ũrĩa ũngĩhotire gũtaarĩria ũrĩa kũhũthagĩra ũũru mũigana ũrĩa warĩrĩirio na ũcamba nĩ andũ arĩa maahonokire Larry Nassar kũngĩahotire kwaga kũmenyeka ihinda iraihu ũguo na nĩ ũgwatanĩtie na mogarũrũku marĩa mangĩabataranirie na magĩrĩire.
reference: Gymnastics a America nĩ maranyita mbaru ũthuthuria urĩa ũngĩhotithia kũonania ũtũmĩri mũru wa mahinya ũrĩa wandĩkithĩtio nĩ arĩa mahonokire Larry Nassar ũrĩa ũngĩathiire ũtamenyekete kahinda karaihu na gwĩtĩkĩra mogarũrũku marĩa magĩrĩire.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
hypothesis: Mĩaka-inĩ ya 1960, Brzezinski nĩ aarutire wĩra wa John F. Kennedy arĩ mũtabarĩri wake na agĩcoka akĩruta wĩra wa ũtongoria wa Lyndon B. Johnson.
reference: Mĩaka-inĩ ĩyo ya ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, Brzezinski arutagĩra John F. Kennedy to mũmũtari agĩchoka akĩrutĩra Lyndon B. Johnson ũtongoria-inĩ.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
hypothesis: Hĩndĩ ya ithurano cia mwaka wa 1976, nĩ aateithirie Carter maũndũ-inĩ ma ũteti wa nja, na thutha ũcio agĩtuĩka Mũrũgamĩrĩri wa Ũgitĩri wa Gwatanĩro ya Mabũrũri (NSA) kuuma mwaka wa 1977 nginya mwaka wa 1981, akĩrũmĩrĩra Henry Kissinger.
reference: Ũthurani-inĩ wa mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithathatũ, nĩ ataarire Carter maũndũ-inĩ makoniĩ mĩtaratara ya kĩmabũrũri ma kĩgeni, agĩcooka handu-ini ha Henry Kissinger.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
hypothesis: Arĩ NSA, nĩ aateithĩrĩirie Carter kũhingia maũndũ ma thĩ kũringana na ũteti, ta kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Camp David, 1978; kũgarũra ũrata wa Amerika na China mũthia-inĩ wa mĩaka ya 1970; ũgarũrũku wa Iran, ũrĩa watũmire kũgĩe na thĩna wa Iran, 1979; na gũtharĩkĩra kwa Soviet bũrũri-inĩ wa Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Eta NSA, nĩateithirie Carter mĩtaratara-inĩ ma kũiguana thĩ yothe, mũno makĩria ta ũiguithanio wa kĩmabũrũri ta ma Camp David ma mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na inyanya, ũrutithania wa wĩra gatagatĩ ka USA na China mwaka-inĩ wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na mĩgomo ya bũrũri wa Iran ĩrĩa ya tũmire kũgĩe na thĩna wa ũnyitani wa mĩgwate mwaka-inĩ wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na kenda na matharĩkĩra ma bũrũri wa Afghanistan nĩ Soviet mwaka o ũcio.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
hypothesis: Firimu ĩyo, ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo na Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone, nĩ yambĩrĩirio maũndũ-inĩ mothe manene.
reference: Movie inĩ ĩyo yarĩ na Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone nĩyacagũriro mĩena-inĩ yothe mĩnene.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
hypothesis: Nyĩmbo igĩrĩ kuuma mbica-inĩ ĩyo, The Audition (The Fools Who Dream) na City of Stars, nĩ cianyiitwo kandarathi ya Nyĩmbo njega mũno. Studio ya Lionsgate nĩ yaanyitwo kandarathi 26 gũkĩra studio ĩngĩ o yothe.
reference: Nyiĩmbo igĩrĩ movie-inĩ iyo nĩcio The fools who dream na City of stars, nĩcio ciathuriro irĩ ta nyiĩmbo iria njega mũno original. Nayo studio ya Lionsgate ĩgĩcagũrwo maita mĩrongo ĩrĩ na matandatũ ũngĩringithania na studio icio-ingĩ.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
hypothesis: Mũthenya wa kiumia, mũtongoria wa Amerika, Donald Trump, akĩmenyithia atĩ mbũtũ cia Amerika nĩ ikaatiga bũrũri wa Syria.
reference: Mũthenya wa Kiumia ũgĩthira, mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Amerika nĩwe Donald Trump akĩruta ndũmĩrĩri kũhĩtũkĩra mũtabarĩri wa mohoro, na akiuga bũtũ ya Amerika nĩ ĩkũrutwo bũrũri wa Syria.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
hypothesis: Ũhoro ũyũ waheanirwo thutha wa Trump kwaranĩria thimũ na President wa Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: Manĩrĩra macio maheaniro thutha wa Trump kwaranĩria na mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
hypothesis: O na ningĩ Turkey nĩ ĩgũthiĩ kũgitĩra arũngi a ISIS arĩa makoretwo makĩnyiitwo, o ta ũrĩa riboti ĩyo yugaga, mabũrũri ma Rũraya nĩ maregete kũmacokia bũrũri wao.
reference: Bururi wa Turkey niwoyereire ugitĩri wa arũi a mbara cia ISIS iria cianyitĩtwo, na ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo ĩkiuga mabũrũri mothe ma Europe nĩmaregete  gucoka.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
hypothesis: Ũndũ ũcio ti atĩ wonanagia atĩ andũ amwe nĩ maarĩ na mathagu, no nĩ wonanagia atĩ mathagu matingĩahotire kũgĩa na mathagu, ta rangi na mĩthemba ĩtatũ.
reference: ũndũ ũyũ to ngaja ũranina atĩ nyamũ icio cietago dinosaurs nĩ ciarĩ na mathagu, theory ĩmenyekanĩte mũno, no nĩwongagĩrĩra ũmenyo ũtangĩonekana matigari-inĩ ma nyamũ na mĩtĩ ta rangi na mũbango wa dĩmensions ithatũ.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
hypothesis: Athomi a sayansi moigaga atĩ mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩyo warĩ wa rangi wa chestnut-brown igũrũ na mũhuro wayo warĩ wa rangi wa karotenoid.
reference: Asayansi maugaga mathagu marĩa mothe mahumbĩraga mwĩrĩ wa nyamũ ĩno marĩ ma rangi mwerũ mwena wa igũrũ na mũtune kana rangi wa carotenoid mwena wa thĩ.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
hypothesis: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũtũteithagia kũmenya ũrĩa nyoni ciũmbũyagia.
reference: Maumĩrĩra macio nĩ maraheana mawoni ma ũrĩa mathagu ma nyoni macenjagia na mahinda.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
hypothesis: Tondũ mathagu ma ndinozauro matiarĩ na gĩthima kĩarĩ na ũgarũrũku mwega, kĩrĩa gĩetagwo rachis, no makoragwo na itemi ingĩ cia mathagu  mathagu na mathagu  athuthuria nĩ maatuire atĩ rachis nĩ ũndũ wa ũgarũrũku wa ũgarũrũku wa indo iria ingĩ.
reference: Tondũ mathagu ma dinosaur matikorago na shaft ikũrĩte wega ĩrĩ  ĩtagwo rachis, no mathagu macio nĩ marĩ na mũmbĩre ũngĩ ta barbs and barbules, athuthuria nĩmahetũkirie atĩ rachis icio noanga ciakũrire ta maũmbĩre maria magĩire o ũrĩa mumbĩre wacio wacenjagia mũico-inĩ.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Athuthuria acio moonanirie atĩ o na gũtuĩka rũũri rũu nĩ rwa dinosaurus, rũthiomi rũu rwerekanaga atĩ mũndũ mũgima nĩ arĩ na mathagu, no ti mũriũ.
reference: Athuthuria nĩmatuire atĩ, ona akorwo mũting'oe ũcio warĩ wa dĩnosaur nini, mũhiano ũrĩa watũmĩkaga wonanagia mathagu ma nyamũ ng'ima no ti nini na thĩ.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
hypothesis: Mĩthenya ya rũcinĩ ĩgĩthũkũkĩra mũciĩ mũnene wa thirikari wa Gaziantep, bũrũri-inĩ wa Turkey, ngari ya mbomu ĩgĩthũkũkĩra ĩkĩũraga athuri eerĩ a borithi na ĩkĩhũũra andũ angĩ makĩria ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
reference: Bomu ya ngari ĩrĩa yaripũkire gĩikaro kĩnene kĩa thigari Gaziantep, Turkey mũthenya wa ira kĩroko ĩroraga thigari igĩrĩ na angĩ makĩria ya mĩrongo ĩrĩ maragĩa na nguraro.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
hypothesis: Wabici ya ngavana nĩ yoigĩte atĩ andũ ikũmi na kenda arĩa maakuĩte nĩ maabithaa a borithi.
reference: Ofici ya gavana ĩkiuga atĩ harĩ acio magurarire  ikũmi na keenda marĩ thigari.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
hypothesis: Nĩ moonire atĩ riũa rĩathiaga na mbere kũringana na ithimi iria ingĩ cia njata: Njata ciothe iria irĩ thĩinĩ wa mũtabarĩre wa njata ciathiaga na mbere kũgerera ũtheri wacio, kũgarũrũka kwacio, na gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ.
reference: Na magĩtaũkĩrwo na makĩmenya atĩ riũa nĩ rĩhanaine na rĩrutaga wĩra ta njata icio ingĩ: Mawĩko ma njata ciothe mahotekĩkaga nĩ ũrĩa irutaga ũtheri na marangi, gũthiũrũrũka na gũtiri ũndũ ũngĩ.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
hypothesis: Ũtheri na kũgarũrũka kũhũthĩrĩtwo hamwe nĩguo gũtuĩke namba ya Rossby ya njata, ĩrĩa ĩhutanĩtie na gũthuthĩka kwa plasma.
reference: ũruti ũcio wa ũtheri na marangi na gũthiũrũrũka inyitithanagio kũonania namba ĩtagwo star's Rossby, ĩrĩa ĩkonainie na plasma flow.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
hypothesis: O ũrĩa mũigana wa Rossby ũringithanagia, noguo njata ĩgakorũo ĩtarĩ na hinya wa kũgarũrũka.
reference: O urĩa namba ĩyo ya Rossby ĩ nini noguo njata ikorago ĩ ĩ less active kũringana na magnetic reversals.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
hypothesis: Hĩndĩ ya rũgendo rwake, Iwasaki nĩ aacemanirie na mathĩna maita maingĩ.
reference: Hĩndĩ ya iceera rĩake, Iwasaki nĩacemanirie na mathĩĩna maita maingĩ.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
hypothesis: Nĩ aanyiitirũo nĩ atunyani, akĩũragwo Tibet nĩ ngui njũru, akĩũra kĩhiko-inĩ bũrũri-inĩ wa Nepal, na akĩnyiitwo njera bũrũri-inĩ wa India.
reference: Nĩatunyirwo nĩ Pirates, akĩhithũkĩrwo Tibet nĩ ngui ndwaru, akĩũrĩra kĩhiko Nepal na akĩohwo njera India.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
hypothesis: Standard ya 802.11n ĩrutaga wĩra na mahenya ma 2.4Ghz na 5.0Ghz.
reference: Nayo 802.11n standard ĩrutaga wĩra harĩ mitambo ini ya 2.4Ghz na 5.0gHZ cierĩ.

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
hypothesis: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũgũtũma ũhote gũkinyanĩra na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, angĩkorũo gĩcigo kĩa mũthingi nĩ kĩrĩ na iradiĩ igĩrĩ.
reference: ũguo nĩ uteithagia kũnyitithanĩkia na thutha na 802.11a, 802.11b, na 802.11g angĩkorwo base station ĩna dual radios.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
hypothesis: Duvall, ũrĩa ũhikanĩtie na arĩ na ciana igĩrĩ cia andũ agima, ndaahotire kũgucĩrĩria mũno Miller, ũrĩa rũgano rũu rwarĩrĩirio.
reference: Duvall, urĩa wa hikĩte ena ciana igĩrĩ ng'ima, ndatigire na thutha ũndũ mũnene wa gũkenia Miller, ũrĩa rũgano rũraria ũhoro wake.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
hypothesis: Rĩrĩa maamũririe ndũmĩrĩri, Miller oigire ũũ: "Mike nĩ aaragia mũno hĩndĩ ya mĩcemanio ĩyo. Nĩ ndehaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndiathikagĩrĩria ũrĩa oigaga".
reference: rĩrĩa erirwo arĩrĩrie ũhoro ũcio, Miller akiuga, "Mike nĩaragia mũno hĩndĩ ya ciira…Nĩkwĩharĩria deharagĩria koguo diaiguire ũrĩa augaga."

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
hypothesis: Hu oigire, "Nĩ tũgũthiĩ na mbere kũgeria kũniina ũthii wa na mbere wa carbon dioxide harĩ gĩcigo kĩmwe kĩa GDP na njĩra ya kũgirĩrĩria mũno nginya mwaka wa 2020 kũringana na mũigana wa mwaka wa 2005".
reference: "Nĩtũkwĩrutanĩria na tũtigĩrĩre nitwanyihia ũrekereria wa carbon dioxide rĩera-inĩ o harĩ gĩchunjĩ kĩmwe kĩa GDP ya bũrũri na gacunjĩ karoneka gũgĩkinyĩria mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na mĩrongo ĩrĩ kuma harĩa hakinyĩtio mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ithano." Hu kuuga.

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
hypothesis: Ndaarĩirie mũigana wa mbeca icio, akiuga nĩ ikaahũthĩrũo kũgerera ũthii wa na mbere wa ũthii wa na mbere wa bũrũri wa China.
reference: Ndagwetire harĩa mekũrenga na number cigana, nĩaugire mekũnyihia kũringana na maumĩrĩra ma uchumi wa China.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
hypothesis: Hu eerire mabũrũri marĩa marathiĩ na mbere gũkũria ũgarũrũku "maige njĩra ya tene ya gũthũkia indo mbere na gũtheria indo ciao thutha-inĩ".
reference: Hu nĩ ahinyĩrĩirie mabũrũri marĩa marekũria atĩ "meyeheranie na maũndũ matene marĩa mathũkagia kĩambĩrĩria, na gũtheria thutha-inĩ."

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
hypothesis: Oigire atĩ "o na kũrĩ ũguo, matiagĩrĩirũo kũbatithio kwĩhokera mawĩra marĩa mangĩaga kũhingia, mawĩra mao, na ũhoti wao".
reference: Nake akĩongerera akiuga atĩ "matiagĩrĩirwo, ona kũrĩ o ũguo, nĩ kũigĩrĩrwo mũrigo ũkĩrĩtie ũthii wao wa nambere, ũiigĩrĩrĩki na ũhoti."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
hypothesis: Kĩama gĩa Iraqi Study Group nĩ kĩarutire riboti ya kĩo thaa 12 cia hwaĩ-inĩ (GMT) ũmũthĩ.
reference: Gĩkundi kĩa ũthomi Iraq kĩarehire rofoti 12.00 GMT ũmũthĩ.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
hypothesis: Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota gwĩkĩra atĩ ũndũ o wothe ũgeekwo bũrũri-inĩ wa Iraki nĩ ũgaatiga mbaara cia ndini, ũhinya ũrĩa ũrathiĩ ũkĩongerereka, kana ũgarũrũku ũgĩkinye ngucanio-inĩ.
reference: ĩraheana mũkana atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ona ũmwe ũngĩheana ũma atĩ kũrĩ ikinya ona rĩmwe Iraq kahinda-inĩ gaka rĩngĩrũgamia haro, kwongerereka kwa ngahĩha, kana kwerekeria  wongerereku wa maũndũ ma mbĩtĩka.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
hypothesis: Riboti ĩyo yambagĩrĩria na kwaranĩria na andũ na njĩra ya kũgĩa na ũiguano gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mabũrũri ma Amerika megiĩ ũtongoria wa mabũrũri ma mwena wa gatagatĩ wa Irathĩro.
reference: Report ĩyo yambĩrĩirie na ihoya rĩa waranĩria na ũthondeki wa ũiguano bũrũri-inĩ wa America ũigiĩ mĩtaratara ya Middle East.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
hypothesis: Ũndũ wa mbere gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mĩbango yake 78 nĩ atĩ, mbere ya mũthia wa mwaka ũyũ, nĩ kũgĩrĩire gwĩkwo kĩyo kĩerũ gĩa ũteti gĩa kũgitĩra mĩhaka ya Iraq kũringana na ũhinya wa thũ na gũcokia ũkuruhanu wa ũteti na mabũrũri marĩa marĩ hakuhĩ nayo.
reference: Maũndũ marĩa ma mbere harĩ mendĩkithia macio mĩrongo mũgwanja na inyanya nĩ kwambĩrĩria mũbango mwerũ wa ũtongoria wa waragania ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwambĩrĩrio bere ya mũico wa mwaka nĩndũ wa ũgitĩri wa mũhaka wa Iraq kũmana na tharĩkĩra na waki mwerũ wa ũrata na mabũrũri marĩa mamarigicĩirie.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
hypothesis: Seneta wa mahinda maya na mũtumia wa mbere wa Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner nĩ onanirie mweke wake wa gwathana ta mũtongoria wa bũrũri ũmũthĩ hwaĩ-inĩ kũu La Plata, taũni ĩrĩa ĩrĩ kilomita 50 kuuma Buenos Aires.
reference: Mũikarĩri gĩtĩ gĩa Senator kahinda gaka na mũtũmia wa mbere wa president wa Argentina nĩwe Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner akĩanĩrĩra ũhũranĩri wa gĩturwa kĩa ũtongoria wa bũrũri mũthenya wa ira hwaĩ-ini kũrĩa La Plata, city ĩ kilometer mĩrongo ĩtano kana mairo mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩmwe kũraihĩrĩria Buenos Aires.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
hypothesis: Mwarĩ wa Ithe witũ Kirchner nĩ onanirie muoroto wake wa gwĩthurĩra gĩtĩ kĩa mũtongoria wa Argentina Theatre, handũ harĩa aambĩrĩirie gĩthurano gĩake kĩa Senate mwaka wa 2005 arĩ mũrũmĩrĩri wa gĩcigo kĩa Buenos Aires.
reference: Mũtumia wa Kirchner anĩrĩire itua rĩake kũhũranĩra gĩtĩ kĩa mũnene wa bũrũri kũrĩa Argentine Theatre, o harĩa ambagĩrĩria campaign ciake cia member wa Senate Buenos Aires Province delegation mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ithano.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
hypothesis: Ũkararania ũcio waambĩrĩirie nĩ ũndũ wa ngarari ya kũhũthĩra mbeca cia ũteithio na gwaka rĩngĩ thutha wa kĩhuhũkanio kĩa Katrina.
reference: Debate ĩyo yambĩrĩirio nĩ ngarari cigiĩ ũtũmĩri wa ũteithio na waki nĩũndũ wa kĩhuhũkanio gĩa Katrina, kĩrĩa amwe a fiscal conservatives metire na kĩnyũrũri "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

source: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.
hypothesis: Andũ arĩa matongoragia wĩra wa gwaka thĩ rĩngĩ nĩ makoretwo makĩaria mũno ũhoro wa kũheana mĩhothi ya gwaka thĩ rĩngĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa moigaga atĩ nĩ marĩ thĩinĩ wa Washington.
reference: Gĩkundi kĩrĩa kiheaga gĩto na gĩgetĩkĩra mawoni ma andũ kĩa liberal gĩgĩkararania na makinya ma waki rĩngĩ gĩtũmi contract ciothe cia waki ciaheago akinyanĩria ũhoro thĩinĩ wa washington.

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
hypothesis: Andũ makĩria ma milioni inya nĩ maathiĩte Roma gũthikĩrĩria mathiko macio.
reference: Makĩrĩa ma andũ million inya nĩmekinyĩtie Rome gũthiĩ mathiko.

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
hypothesis: Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maarĩ ho warĩ mũnene mũno ũũ atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩahotire gũthiĩ mathiko-inĩ ma St. Peter's Square.
reference: Andu arĩa mekinyĩtie marĩ aingĩ, nĩũguo gũkagĩa na ũritũ mũnene harĩ andũ othe arĩa mendaga gũkinya mathiko-inĩ St. Peter's Square.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
hypothesis: Matũũra-inĩ mangĩ maingĩ bũrũri-inĩ wa Italy na mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa mangĩ ma thĩ, na makĩria bũrũri-inĩ wa Poland, andũ aingĩ nĩ moonire maũndũ ta macio.
reference: Mataoni manene mangiĩ maingĩ kũu Italy na thĩ yoothe, mũno makĩria Poland, mĩbango ĩhanaine nĩ yathondeketwo, ĩrĩa yonagwo nĩ andũ aingĩ.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
hypothesis: Athuthuria a maũndũ ma historĩ nĩ maameneretie mogarũrũku ma tene ma FBI nĩ ũndũ wa kũhũthĩra mbeca ciao kũhingia ciira iria ciarĩ na ũhoti wa kũhiũrania nacio, na makĩria ciira cia ngari iria cianyiitwo, marĩ na muoroto wa kuongerera ũhootani wa kambũni ĩyo.
reference: Andĩki a maũndũ ma gatene nĩmamenereirie mĩtaratara ĩrĩa yatũmĩragwo nĩ FBI nĩũndũ wa gũtũmĩra indo cia bata gũtangĩkĩra maciira marĩa marĩ mahũthũ gũtũithania, mũno makĩria ũici wa ngaari, na itua rĩa kũongerera ũhotani wao.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
hypothesis: Athuri a ngathĩti ya gatagatĩ, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, nĩ maanyitire wĩra mwega na makĩgĩa na mũtaratara wa mĩtaratara igana rĩmwe.
reference: Athaki a middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, magĩthaka wega na makĩnyitanĩra gũthondeka runs igana rĩmwe.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
hypothesis: O na kũrĩ ũguo, thutha wa gũtoorio nĩ mũtongoria-rĩ, India nĩ yaahotire gũtooria ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya rĩa ithenya.
reference: No thutha wa kũranwo na Captain's wicket, India yahotire gũthodeka mahenya mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtandatũ magĩĩte wickets mũgwanja kũniina innings.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
hypothesis: Mutongoria wa Amerika George W. Bush aakinyire Singapore rũcinĩ rwa Novemba 16, akĩambĩrĩria rũgendo rwa gũthiĩ Asia rũthatũ ũmwe.
reference: Mũtongoria wa U.S George W Bush agĩkinya Singapore kĩroko kĩa mweri ikũmi na ithathatũ wa ikũmi na ĩmwe, akĩambĩrĩria iceera rĩake inene mwena wa Asia.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
hypothesis: Thutha wa gũtoorio thutha wa kiumia kĩmwe, Bush nĩ eerire andũ ũhoro wĩgiĩ ũgarũrũku wa biacara bũrũri-inĩ wa Asia.
reference: Thutha wa kiumia kĩmwe kĩa hathara ithurano-inĩ cia midterm, Bush akĩra arĩa mathikĩrĩirie ũhoro wa gũtambia biacara Asia.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
hypothesis: Mutongoria wa bururi Stephen Harper nĩ eetĩkĩrire gũtũma 'Clean Air Act' ya thirikari kũrĩ kamĩtĩ ya ciama ciothe nĩgetha ĩgũthuthuria, mbere ya gũthomwo kwacio kwa kerĩ, thutha wa mĩcemanio ya ndagĩka 25 na mũtongoria wa NDP Jack Layton mũcemanio-inĩ wa PMO.
reference: Mũnene wa ministers Stephen Harper nĩaretĩkĩrĩre gũtũma 'Clean Air Act' ya thirikari kũrĩ committee ya ciama ciothe mamĩrore, mbere ya ithoma rĩa kerĩ, thutha wa mũcemanio wa dagĩka mĩrongo ĩrĩ na ithano mũthenya wa keerĩ na mũtongoria wa NDP Jack Layton kũu PMO.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
hypothesis: Layton nĩ eendaga kũgarũrĩrwo kwa watho wa mũthingi wa gĩkundi kĩa Conservatives hĩndĩ ya mũcemanio wake na mũtongoria wa bũrũri, akĩenda "gũthondekwo na kũgarũrũo biũ" kwa watho wa mũthingi wa gĩkundi kĩa Conservative.
reference: Lyton nĨendekithĨtie watho wa Conservatives Environmental ucenjio hĨndĨ ya mũcemanio na PM akiendekithia " watho wa  Conservatives Environmental ũrorwo wega na wandĨkwo werũ.

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
hypothesis: Kuuma rĩrĩa thirikari ya bururi yaambĩrĩirie kũruta mbeca cia thibitari ya Mersey mwena wa Devonport, Tasmania, thirikari ya bũrũri na ambunge amwe a mũingĩ wa bururi nĩ makoretwo makiuga ũndũ ũcio nĩ mũtaratara wa mbere wa ithurano cia bururi iria ikaahingwo mweri-inĩ wa Novemba.
reference: Kuma hĨndĨ Ĩria thirikari nene yoereire gũteithĨrĨria Mersey Hospital kũrĨa Devonport, Tasmania, thirikari ya matũũra na abunge amwe a thirikari nene nĨmareganire na watho ũyũ makiuga atĨ nĨ mũbango wa thirikari nene wa kwĨharĨrirĨa kũri gĨthurano kĨa thirikari nene mweri wa Ikumi na ũmwe.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
hypothesis: No mutongoria wa bururi John Howard augite mubango ucio niguo gwithema thibitari ino gutharikirwo ni thirikari ya Tasmania, na kuheana muigana wa AUD mirioni 45 cia kuongererwo.
reference: No MĨnĨsta Mũkaru John Howard augĨte atĨ watho wa kũheana AUD$445 milioni warongoreirio kũgitĨra indo cia thibitari kuuma kũgũithio ngathĨ ni thirikari ya Tasmania.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
hypothesis: Kũringana na riboti ĩyo ya ica ikuhĩ, ũthuthuria wa igũrũ rĩa iria nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ kwarĩ na tsunami, na nĩ kwarĩ na tsunami hakuhĩ na Pago Pago na Niue.
reference: Mohoro ma ica ikuhĨ ma ithimi cia mũigana wa maaĨ iria-inĨ maronania atĨ kwĨna Sunami. Nikwari na maũndũ megainie na sunami monekire hakuhĨ na Pago Pago na Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
hypothesis: Gũtirĩ mahĩtia manene kana mĩrimũ ĩkoretwo ĩgakorwo ĩkĩheanwo bũrũri-inĩ wa Tonga, ĩndĩ hinya wa thitima nĩ wahutirio kwa ihinda, na ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũgiririe anene a bũrũri wa Tonga kũheo mũkaana wa tsunami ũrĩa waheanĩtwo nĩ PTWC.
reference: Gũtirĩ na ũthũkangia kana nguraro nyingĩ cionekire Tonga, no thitima nĩciorire gwa kahinda kanini, na kwahoteka nĩkĩo gĩtũmi kĩarigĩrĩirie ũrũgamĩrĩri wa Tonga kwamũkĩra ndũmirĩri ya kwĩhũga na kĩhuhũkanio ĩrĩa yarutirwo nĩ PTWC.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
hypothesis: Thukuru ikũmi na inya cia Hawaii iria ciarĩ mwena wa rũgongo kana hakuhĩ na hũgũrũrũ cia iria ciaregirũo mũthenya wa Gatatũ o na gũtuĩka nĩ ciaregirũo.
reference: Cukuru ikũmi na inya thĨiniĨ wa Hawaii iria ciarĨ mũico-inĨ wa iria kana hakuhĨ na iria nairahingirwo Wagatatu wothe ona thutha wa mĨkana kurutwo.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
hypothesis: Mũtongoria wa Amerika George W. Bush nĩ aakenire mũno nĩ ũndũ wa kũmenyithia andũ ũhoro ũcio.
reference: Presidenti wa U.S. George W. Bush nĨakenereire kĨmenyithia kĨu.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
hypothesis: Gordon Johndroe, ũrĩa waragia na Bush, eetire mwĩhĩtwa wa Korea ya Rũgongo "kĩendo kĩnene harĩ kũhingia muoroto wa kũniina indo cia mbaara cia nyuklia gĩcigĩrĩra-inĩ kĩa Korea".
reference: Johndroe etire itua rĨa North Korea "Ikinya inene harĨ gũkinyanĨria mũtaratara wa kũnina nyukilia thĨiniĨ wa Peninsula ya Korea."

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
hypothesis: Kĩhuhũkanio gĩa ikũmi kĩa Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, kĩambĩrĩirie thĩinĩ wa Iria rĩa Atlantic ũmũthĩ.
reference: KĨhuhũkanio kĨa ikũmĨ kumana na ũnene wakĨo thĨiniĨ wa kĨmera kĨa ihuhũkanio kĨa Atlantic, kĨrĨa gĨetagwo Storm Jerry nigĨthondekire thĨiniĨ wa iria rĨa Atlantic ũmũthi.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
hypothesis: Rũhonge rwa National Hurricane Center (NHC) ruugĩte atĩ ihinda-inĩ rĩrĩ Jerry ndarĩ na ũgwati wa gũkinya thĩ.
reference: Rũhonge rwa gĨ-bũrũri rwa ihuhũkanio (NHC) rũroiga atĨ gwa kahinda gaka Jerry ti ũgwati kũrĨ thĨ nyũmũ.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
hypothesis: Ũthuthuria wa U.S. Corps of Engineers woigaga atĩ mbura nene ta inchi 15 nĩ ingĩthũkia ithaka iria cianangĩtwo mbere ĩyo.
reference: Gikundi kĨa inginia a U.S. maregereria atĨ inji 6 cia mbura no ciune mĨhĨnga irĨa yerĨgĨte gũthũka.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
hypothesis: Kĩhingo gĩa kenda, kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na mĩiyũro ya mita 20 hĩndĩ ya kĩhuhũkanio kĩa Katrina, rĩu nĩ kĩiyũragwo nĩ maaĩ tondũ gĩthaka kĩrĩa kĩarĩ hakuhĩ nĩ kĩiyũragwo.
reference: Wadi ya kenda, irĨa yarĨ na kĨguũ gia biti 20 hĨndĨ  ya kĨhuhũkanio gĨa Katrina, rĨũ maaĨ makinyĨte njohero kuumania na kũgwa kwa mũhinga.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
hypothesis: Maaĩ marathiĩ na mbere gũtherera gĩtuĩ-inĩ kĩa maaĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na ũraihu wa metha igana rĩmwe.
reference: MaaĨ maragerera igũrũ rwa mũhĨnga handũ-inĨ ha wariĨ wa buti 100.

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
hypothesis: Admin wa Commons Adam Cuerden nĩ onanirie ũritũ wake nĩ ũndũ wa kũherithio rĩrĩa aaririe na Wikinews mweri ũcio ũrathirire.
reference: MũrũgamĨrĨri wa Commons Adam Cuerden nĨonanirie marakara kuumana na gũthario hĨndĨ irĨa aririe na Wikinews mweri mũhetũku.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
hypothesis: Oigire ũũ: "[Wales] nĩ aatwĩrire maheeni kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria. Ũndũ wa mbere, eekaga o ta arĩ na itũmi cia kĩhooto, na wa kerĩ, eekaga ta aatũiguaga nginya akĩniina marũa macio".
reference: "We (Wales) nĨatũhenirie kuuma kĨambirĨria. Wambere nĨ kuonania ta itũmi ici cietĨkĨrĨte kĨ-watho. WakeerĨ nĨ gwĨtua atĨ nĨatũthikagĨrĨria nginya hĨndĨ irĨa atharirie wĨra wake wa ũcori.”

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
hypothesis: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ watũmire andũ makorũo makĩgeria kũruta watho wĩgiĩ maũndũ megiĩ ngomanio thĩinĩ wa kambũni ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo na ngathĩti milioni nyingĩ iria irĩ na marũa ma kũmenyithia andũ maũndũ megiĩ ngomanio.
reference: Kwaga kũiganĨra kwa mũingĨ nĨkuo gwacũngĨrĨirie mĨtaratara ya kwandĨka watho wĨgainie na maũndũ ma ũũra thoni kũrĨ site iria ikoragwo ihete marũa matari mĨhĨnga kũrĨ mamilioni ma nyũmba cia mohoro.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
hypothesis: Wĩra ũrĩa wekirũo warĩ wa gwĩciria, no mũbango ũcio waandĩkirũo nĩguo ũgerekanie na maũndũ marĩa meekirũo igũrũ rĩa ndata ya Sagittarius.
reference: wira ũria wekirwo mũingi waari wa gũthoma,no programu yadĩketwo gũteithiriria maũndũ maria monagwo galaxy ya Sagittarius.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
hypothesis: Ũndũ ũrĩa gĩkundi kĩu kĩracaria no woneke ta ũtongoretio nĩ hinya wa magũrũ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka nduma ndumanu ya nduma ĩyo na nduma ndumanu ya Njĩra ya Nyaga.
reference: ũndũ ũria aathuthuria methaga warehagwo ni tidal forces ĨrĨa Ĩkoragwo gatagati ka galaxy's dark matter na Milky Way's dark matter.

source: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.
hypothesis: Athomi acio a sayansi nĩ maahotire kuona atĩ indo cia nduma nĩ cihutagia indo ingĩ cia nduma o ta ũrĩa indo cia ndũire cihutagia.
reference: Athuthuria nĨ mahotire kumenya atĨ dark matter Ĩhotaga dark matter ĨngĨ ota uria Ĩhotaga matter cia kawaida.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
hypothesis: Ũrutani ũyũ woigaga atĩ indo nyingĩ cia nduma iria ciikaraga ndaya-inĩ ciikaraga ndaya-inĩ ya ndaya, na ciũmbĩtwo nĩ tũcunjĩ tũnini tũingĩ.
reference: Mathomo maya maugaga atĨ dark matter nyingĨ irĨa ikoragwo ithiũrũrũkĨirie galaxy cikoragwo ithiũrũrũkĨirie galaxy kwa mũhiano wa halo na ikoragwo ithondeketwo na tũnyamu tũnini.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
hypothesis: Riboti cia televiseni cionanagia rũkũngũ rũgĩũka kuuma kambuni-inĩ ĩyo.
reference: Roboti kuumana na Televisheni cironania ndogo njerũ Ĩkiuma kuuma mũtambo-inĨ.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
hypothesis: Athuri a gĩcigo kĩu nĩ maraheaga andũ arĩa matũũraga hakuhĩ na mũbira ũcio mũkaana wa gũikara thĩinĩ wa nyũmba, kũharũrũkia macini cia kũhonia rĩera, na kwaga kũnyua maaĩ ma gĩtugĩ.
reference: Wathani wa matũũra nĨ ũraruta mũkana kũrĨ andũ arĨa maikaraga hakuhĨ na mũtambo maikare nyũmba, mahorie macini cĨa rĨera na matikanyue maaĨ ma miberethi.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
hypothesis: Kũringana na kĩhũngĩro kĩa njamba cia nyuklia bũrũri-inĩ wa Japan, cesium na iodine nĩ cionanĩtio kĩhũngĩro-inĩ kĩu.
reference: Kũringana na rũhonge rwa nuclear rwa Japani, caesium na iodine iria nĨ radioactive nicionekanĨte mũtambo-inĨ.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
hypothesis: Athuthuria moigaga atĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩ wonanagia atĩ indo iria ciarĩ na maguta ma uranium handũ-inĩ hau nĩ ingĩthũkũkũkĩra na nĩ ciathũkagĩra.
reference: ArũgamĨrĨri marecirĨria atĨ gĨkĨ nĨkĨonereria atĨ matangi marĨa mena maguta ma uranium no makorwo matũrĨkĨte na nĨ maraita maguta.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
hypothesis: Dr. Tony Moll nĩ onire mũrimũ wa thigara (XDR-TB) mwena wa KwaZulu-Natal bũrũri-inĩ wa Afrika ya Mũhuro.
reference: DagĨtarĨ Tony Moll nĨagundũrire mũrimũ wa Tuberculosis wa (XDR-TB) ũrĨa ũtaiguaga ndawa thĨiniĨ wa gĨcigĨrĨra gĨa kwaZulu kũrĨa Afrika ya Mũhuro.

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
hypothesis: Dr. Moll oigaga atĩ andũ amwe nĩ mangĩagĩire na mũrimũ ũcio thibitarĩ-inĩ, na angĩkorũo nĩ eerĩ maarĩ aruti a wĩra wa ũrigitani thibitarĩ-inĩ ĩyo.
reference: DagĨtarĨ Moll arecirĨria atĨ arwaru amwe no makorwo magwatĨtwo ni mũrimũ marĨ thibitarĨ, na arwaru matanyihĨire eerĨ nĨ aruti wĨra a thibitarĨ.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
hypothesis: Thutha wa mwaka ũmwe, mũndũ ũrĩ na mũrimũ ũcio no akorũo na andũ 10 nginya 15 arĩa ahũthagĩra.
reference: ThĨiniĨ wa mwaka ũmwe, mũndũ mũrwaru no agwatie andũ 10 nginya 15 arĨa mamũkuhĨrĨirie.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
hypothesis: O na kũrĩ ũguo, gĩcunjĩ kĩa andũ arĩa marĩ na ũrimũ wa ng'aragu (XDR-TB) gĩcunjĩ-inĩ gĩothe kĩa andũ arĩa marĩ na mũrimũ wa ng'aragu no gĩkorũo kĩrĩ kĩnini; andũ 6,000 harĩ andũ 330,000 arĩa makoragwo na mũrimũ ũcio ihinda-inĩ o rĩothe bũrũri-inĩ wa Afrika ya Mũhuro.
reference: Ona kũrĨ o uguo, mũigana wa andũ arĨa mena XDR-TB kũrĨ gĨkundi-inĨ kia andũ arĨa mena mũrimũ wa tuberculosis ũroneka ũrĨo thĨ; kũrĨ andũ 330000 arĨa makoragwo na mũrimũ ihinda-inĨ o rĨothe, no andũ 6000 menaguo thĨiniĨ wa Afrika ya Mũhuro.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
hypothesis: Ciĩga icio cierĩ ciarĩ na ũritũ wa makĩria ma kilo 1,000, na ciathiiaga na ihenya rĩa kilomita ta 17,500 harĩ ithaa, na ciakinyire igũrũ mũno ta kilomita 491 igũrũ rĩa thĩ.
reference: Satellite icio cierĩ, ĩrĩa ciakĩrĩtie ũritũ wa 1,000 pounds, na gũikũrũka na thibidi ya gĩkĩro kĩa 17,500 miles per hour, ciagũthanire 491 miles igũrũ wa thĩ.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
hypothesis: Athomi a sayansi moigaga atĩ gĩcanjama kĩrĩa kĩarehirũo nĩ gĩcanjama kĩu kĩarĩ kĩnene mũno.
reference: Ataaramu a science maugaga mũribũko ũrĩa waumire hau warĩ mũnene mũno.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
hypothesis: O na rĩu nĩ marenda kũmenya ũrĩa gĩcanjama kĩu kĩarĩ kĩnene na ũrĩa thĩ ĩgaakorũo ĩgũthumbũrũo.
reference: No marageria gũthutũkania ũnene wa mũribũko ũcio na ũrĩa thĩ ĩgũcenjia.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
hypothesis: Ũtongoria wa U.S. Strategic Command wa wabici ya U.S. Department of Defense nĩ ũragerekania mĩguĩ.
reference: United States Strategic Command ya ngwatanĩro ya U.S Department of Defense nĩĩrethana na icunjĩ icio.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
hypothesis: Macokio ma ũthuthuria ũcio nĩ magaatwarũo thĩinĩ wa website ya andũ othe.
reference: Maumĩrĩra ma ũthuthuria nĩũkaandĩkithio rũrenda-inĩ rwao rwa internet.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
hypothesis: Mũthuri ũmwe wa thibitarĩ wa thibitarĩ ya ciana ya Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, nĩ agaakorũo arĩ na mahĩtia ma kũũragana thutha wa nyina kuoneka akuĩte thĩinĩ wa kabati-inĩ ya ngari yake mũthenya wa Gatatũ, ta ũrĩa anene a Ohio moigĩte.
reference: Mũrigitani ũmwe ũrĩa warutaga wĩra thibitarĩ ya ciana ya Children's Hospital of Pittsburh, Pennsylvania nĩ agũthitangwo na ũragani thuutha wa nyina kũonekana e mũkuũ buti ini ya ngaari muthenya wa gatatũ

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
hypothesis: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, ũrĩa warĩ na mĩaka 29, onanirio itũũra-inĩ rĩa Blue Ash, Ohio, ta kilomita 15 mwena wa rũgongo wa Cincinnati, arĩ thĩ mũkĩra-inĩ wa barabara ehumbĩte kanjũ na nguo cia goro.
reference: Dagĩtari Malar Balasubramanian, wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩrĩ na kenda, onekanire Blue Ash, Ohio, ciikaro ĩrĩ hakuhi mairo ikũmi na ithano rũgũrũ rwa Cincinnati akomete thĩ mwena-inĩ wa bara bara ena T-shirt na thuruarĩ ya thĩiniĩ akĩonekana arĩ ũtũmiri-inĩ mũritu wa ndaawa.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
hypothesis: Aatongoririe anene a kambuni ĩyo kũgerera mũbango wake wa Oldsmobile ũrĩa warĩ mita 500 kũraihu.
reference: Akĩonereria afithaa ngaari yake njirũ muthemba wa oldsmobile Intrigue ĩrĩa yarĩ futi maganao matano kuraihĩrĩria

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
hypothesis: Kũu nĩ kwarĩ na mĩĩrĩ ya Saroja Balasubramanian, ũrĩa warĩ na mĩaka 53.
reference: Na hau, makĩona mwĩrĩ wa Saroja Balasubramanian, wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtano na ithatũ, ũhumbĩrĩtwo na mũrĩngĩti waihũrĩte thakame.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
hypothesis: Mbũtũ ya borithi yoigire atĩ mwĩrĩ ũcio warĩ kuo kwa ihinda rĩa mũthenya ũmwe.
reference: Thigari ikiuga mwĩrĩ ũcio nĩ wonekanaga ta waikarĩte hau ta mũthenya ũmwe.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
hypothesis: Marakara ma mbere ma mũrimũ ũyũ mwaka-inĩ ũyũ moigĩtwo mũthia-inĩ wa Julaĩ.
reference: Kesi cia mbere cia mũrimũ ũcio season ĩno iranĩrĩirwo mweri wa mũgwanja ũgĩthira.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
hypothesis: Mũrimũ ũcio ũtwarithagio nĩ ngurubu, na ũgĩtherera andũ kũgerera ngurubu.
reference: Mũrimũ ũcio ũkuagwo nĩ ngũrũwe, ũgacoka ũgatambio kũrĩ andũ kũhĩtũkĩra rwagi.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
hypothesis: Mwaka-inĩ wa 1956, Słania nĩ aathamĩire Sweden, kũrĩa mĩaka ĩtatũ thutha ũcio aambĩrĩirie kũruta wĩra wabici-inĩ ya thitima ya Sweden na agĩtuĩka mũtongoria wa wĩra ũcio.
reference: Kũrĩ mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtano na ithathatũ, Slania agĩthamĩra Sweden, kũrĩa thutha wa mĩaka ĩtatũ ambĩrĩirie kũrutĩra wĩra Swedish Post Office na agĩtuika engraver ũrĩa mũnene.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
hypothesis: Nĩ aathondekire marangi makĩria ma 1,000 ma Sweden na mabũrũri mangĩ 28.
reference: Agĩthodeka makĩria ma stamps ngiri ĩmwe cia Sweden na mabũrũri mangĩ mĩrongo ĩrĩ na inyanya.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
hypothesis: Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩa 1,000 rĩarĩ "Maũndũ Makũrũ Makũnene Makĩrutwo nĩ Athamaki a Sweden" nĩ David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl mwaka wa 2000, na nĩ rĩandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa Guinness Book of World Records.
reference: Stamp yake ya ngiri ĩmwe yarĩ thaka na njega mũno na yarĩ ya " Ciĩko cia mũthamaki wa Sweden" nĩ David Klocker Ehrenstrahl mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ, ĩrĩa yandĩkithĩtio ibuku-inĩ rĩa Guiness Book of World Records.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
hypothesis: Thutha wa gĩthurano kĩu, Gibson nĩ aathamirio thibitarĩ, no agĩkua ica ikuhĩ thutha ũcio.
reference: Thutha wa mũtino kũhanĩka, Gibson niarakuiro na arathamĩrio thibitarĩ, no agĩcoka agĩkua thutha wa kahinda kanini.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
hypothesis: Mũtwarithia wa lori ũcio, ũrĩa ũrĩ na mĩaka 64, ndaakũragwo nĩ mũtaratara ũcio.
reference: Mũtwari wa kĩrori ũrĩa wakuire arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ ndagurarire mũtino-inĩ ũcio.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
hypothesis: Ngari ĩyo nĩ yoimire kĩharoinĩ kĩu mũthenya o ro ũcio ta thaa 1200 cia Githuania.
reference: Ngaari yo nyene nĩ yoirwo ĩkĩeherio kũraihu kuma harĩa mũtino wahanĩkanĩire, kĩndũ mathaa ma thaa thita o mũthenya ũcio.

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
hypothesis: Othe nĩ maacokire kuuma harĩa gĩcanjama kĩu kĩarĩ.
reference: Na othe magĩteng'era thutha harĩa mũtino ũcio wahanĩkĩire.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
hypothesis: Maũndũ mangĩ marĩa makoragwo thĩinĩ wa mũtaratara wa bũrũri wa Bali nĩ kũhonokia mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ĩtigarĩte thĩinĩ wa thĩ, na kũhũthĩra tekinoronjĩ kũteithĩrĩria mabũrũri marĩa marathiĩ na mbere gũkũra na njĩra itarĩ na ũgwati.
reference: Maũndũ marĩa mangĩ ma kwarĩrĩrio agenda-inĩ ĩyo marĩ gũteithĩrĩria kũmenyerera mĩtitũ ĩrĩa  ĩtigarĩte, kũheana technologies nĩguo gũteithĩrĩria mabũrũri marĩa marakũra gũkũra gũtarĩ kwananga marĩa matũrigicĩirie.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
hypothesis: O na kũrĩ ũguo, O.N. nĩ ĩkoragwo na mwĩhoko wa kũhingia mũbango wa gũteithia mabũrũri marĩa makoretwo makĩnyamarĩka nĩ ũrugarĩ wa thĩ kũhiũrania na moimĩrĩro maguo.
reference: U.N nĩ ĩratanya kũrĩkia kĩgĩna kĩa mbeca kĩrĩa gĩgũteithĩrĩria mabũrũri marĩa mang'etheiro nĩ gũcejia kwa rĩera nĩgetha mahote gwĩtiria na maũmĩrĩra macio.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
hypothesis: Mbeca icio no itwarũo mĩciĩ-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ na mĩiyũro ya maaĩ, gũthondeka maĩ wega, na gũthondeka mĩmera mĩingĩ.
reference: Mbeca icio no itũmĩrwo na nyũmba cia gwĩtiria kĩguo, ũramati mwega wa maĩ na wararamia wa mĩmera.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
hypothesis: Fluke aandĩkire atĩ kĩyo kĩa andũ amwe gĩa kũgirĩrĩria andũ-a-nja kwaria ũhoro wa ũgima wa mwĩrĩ wa andũ-a-nja gĩtiarĩ na moimĩrĩro mega.
reference: Fluke akĩandĩka atĩ mageria mothe makũgirĩrĩria atumia kwaria ciĩgiĩ ũgima wa mwĩrĩ wa atumia nĩ iringĩte ihiga.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
hypothesis: Akinyire kĩrĩkĩrĩro kĩu nĩ ũndũ wa mawoni maingĩ mega na gwĩkĩrũo ngoro nĩ andũ-a-nja o hamwe na arũme makĩmwĩra atĩ ndawa cia kũgirĩrĩria kũgĩa nda nĩ cia bata mũno harĩ ũrigitani.
reference: Akinyirĩire itua rĩũ nĩũndũ wa mawoni mega ma mũingĩ na ũmĩrĩria ũrĩa atũmĩiro nĩ atumia na arũme makĩenda ndaawa cia ũciari cionekane ta cia bata.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
hypothesis: Rĩrĩa mbaara ciathirire thutha wa arĩa maakuire gũtwarũo thibitarĩ-inĩ, andũ ta 40 a arĩa angĩ maarigĩtwo magĩikara nja na makĩrega gũcoka icera-inĩ ciao.
reference: Na rĩrĩa haaro ciathirire thuutha wa arĩa magurarĩtio gũtwaro thibitarĩ, angĩ ta mĩrongo ĩna harĩ oho a jera arĩa matigarĩte magĩikara nja-inĩ makĩrega gũcoka njera-inĩ ciao.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
hypothesis: Kũrĩ hwaĩ-inĩ wa thaa ikũmi na ikũmi nginya thaa ikũmi na ikũmi cia hwaĩ-inĩ, andũ arĩa moohetwo makĩambĩrĩria mwaki mũgũnda-inĩ.
reference: Gatagatĩ-inĩ ka thaa inya na thaa inyanya MDT, ooho arĩa marĩ mwena wa ja makĩambĩrĩria mwaki.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
hypothesis: Ikundi cia kũhonokia mwaki nĩ ciaahotire kũniina mwaki ũcio thaa ikũmi na ithano cia hwaĩ-inĩ.
reference: Nao ahũrani na mwaki nĩo makinyire rĩa mũico na makĩhoria mwaki gũgĩkinyĩria thaa thita ĩtigĩtie dagĩka mĩrongo ĩrĩ na ithano cia ũtukũ.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
hypothesis: Ũndũ ũcio warĩ wa bata harĩ gũthondeka mathangũ ma mũthanga na ithaka, iria ciatungataga ta kũndũ kwa gũikaraga nyamũ cia gĩthaka.
reference: Matigari macio maarĩ mabata harĩ ũthondeki wa sandbars na beaches, iria ciatũmĩkaga ta ciikaro cia nyamu cia githaka, ĩrĩanĩni na rĩerainĩ.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
hypothesis: Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mĩthemba ĩĩrĩ ya thamaki nĩ ĩkoretwo ĩgĩkua, na mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ĩrĩ ũgwati-inĩ wa gũkua, gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mĩthemba ĩyo nĩ gĩkũyũ kĩrĩa kĩtagwo humpback chub.
reference: Nĩũndũ wa gĩtũmi kĩu, thamaki mĩthemba ĩĩrĩ nĩ ituĩkĩte cia gũthira, na mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ĩkanyiha mũno, nginya humpback chub.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
hypothesis: Gũtirĩ mũkaana wa tsunami ũheanĩtwo, na kũringana na rũhonge rwa gũthondeka indo cia thĩ rwa Jakarta, gũtirĩ mũkaana wa tsunami ũkaheanwo tondũ gĩthingithia kĩu gĩtiigana kũhingia mũtaratara wa magnitude 6.5.
reference: Gũtirĩ mũkana o na ũmwe wĩkĩrĩtwo nĩũndũ wa kĩhuhũkanio, na kũringana na rũhonge rwa Jakata geophysics, gũtirĩ mũkana ta ũcio ũkũheanwo tondũ gĩthingithia gĩtinakinyia hinya wa ithathatũ gaturuma ithano ta ũrĩa kwendekanaga.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
hypothesis: O na gũtuĩka gũtiarĩ na ũgwati wa tsunami, aikari makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya na makĩambĩrĩria gũtiga biacara ciao na mĩciĩ yao.
reference: Ona gũkĩrĩkanaga atĩ kĩhuhũkanio kĩu gĩtiarehaga wanangi mũnene, aikari nĩ mambĩrĩirie kura kwao nĩ kũmaka na gũtiganĩria biashara na miciĩ yao.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
hypothesis: O na gũtuĩka Winfrey nĩ aathire na maithori, nĩ eerire arũmĩrĩri ake wega atĩ nĩ arĩcoka.
reference: Ona okorwo Winfrey nĩarĩraga ũkũngũiri ũcio wa mũico agĩthiĩ, nĩ erire arũmĩrĩri ake atĩ no arĩcoka.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
hypothesis: "Ũndũ ũyũ ndũgakorũo ũrĩ wa kweheria, nĩ kũhingia gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe na kũhingia gĩcunjĩ kĩerũ".
reference: "Rĩrĩ rĩtigũtuĩka itigana rĩa mũico. Gũkũ nĩ kũhinga chapter ĩmwe na kũhingũra ĩrĩa ĩngĩ."

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
hypothesis: Itua rĩa mũthia rĩa ithurano cia mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Namibia na cia mũingĩ nĩ ironania atĩ mũtongoria wa bũrũri ũyũ, Hifikepunye Pohamba, nĩ athurĩtwo rĩngĩ na ithurano nyingĩ.
reference: Maumĩrĩra ma muico ma gĩthurano kĩa mutongoria wa bururi na bunge ya athondeki mawatho nĩmonanĩtie atĩ mutongoria wa bururi urĩa uikarĩire gĩtĩ kahinda-inĩ gaka nĩwe urathuurirwo rĩa kerĩ na mwanya munene.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
hypothesis: Kĩama kĩrĩa kĩratongoria bũrũri ũyũ, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), nĩ kĩahotire kũgĩa na gĩcunjĩ kĩnene mũno ithurano-inĩ cia mũingĩ.
reference: Kĩama kĩrĩa gĩtongoragia, South West Africa People's Organization (SWAPO), o nakĩo no gĩatigirwo kĩnyitĩire itĩ nyingĩ ithurano-inĩ icio cia ubunge.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
hypothesis: Mbaara cia ngwatanĩro na mbũtũ cia Afghanistan nĩ ciathamĩire gĩcigo-inĩ kĩu kũgitĩra gĩcigo kĩu na ndege ingĩ cia ngwatanĩro nĩ ciatũmĩtwo gũteithĩrĩria.
reference: Biraru cia muungano na cia Afghan ikĩingĩra kuo kuiga ugitĩri mĩena inĩ ĩyo, nacio ndege icio-ingĩ cia unyitanĩri igĩtumwo guteithĩrĩria.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
hypothesis: Mbura ĩyo yarĩ irĩma-inĩ mũno, na nĩ ĩgwetagwo atĩ yarĩ ya mwaki wa mbaara.
reference: Mutino ucio wahanĩkire irĩma-inĩ iguru, na undu ucio nĩwatumire kugĩe mwaki munene.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
hypothesis: Kĩyo gĩa gũcaria harĩa gĩthingithia gĩakinyire nĩ gĩkoretwo gĩgĩkinyanĩra na ihuhũkanio ya ihuhũkanio na kũndũ kũũmũ.
reference: Mageria ma gucaria harĩa mutino ucio wonekire nĩ macemanĩtie na moritu ta riera ithuku na ithunguri ciĩ ugwati.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
hypothesis: Ngwatanĩro ya ũrigitani ya Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na Ngwatanĩro ya Ũrigitani ya Thĩ moigaga nĩ mũrimũ mũnene mũno bũrũri-inĩ ũyũ.
reference: Nacio ciama cia medical charity Mangora, Medecines Sans Frontieres na kĩama kĩa ugima wa mwĩrĩ thĩ yothe, World Health Organization, nĩciugĩte atĩ uyu nĩguo urarĩ mutumuko muru muno urĩa wanadĩkithio bururi-inĩ.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
hypothesis: Richard Veerman, mwaria wa Medecines Sans Frontiere oigire ũũ: "Angola nĩ ĩrathiĩ na mbere kũhiũrania na mũrimũ ũyũ mũũru mũno na ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũrathiĩ na mbere kũingĩha mũno bũrũri-inĩ wa Angola", o ta ũrĩa oigire.
reference: Mwaria wa Medicines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman akiuga: Angola yerekeire kũrĩ mũtumũko ũrĩa mũru mũno, na maũndũ nĩ mooru mũno Angola" nake akiuga.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
hypothesis: Macindano macio maambĩrĩirie thaa ikũmi cia rũcinĩ na rĩera rĩarĩ rĩega, na o tiga mbura ya rũcinĩ ĩrĩa yaahingire na ihenya, mũthenya ũcio warĩ mwega mũno nĩ ũndũ wa rugby ya thaa mũgwanja.
reference: Mathako majirie thaa inya cia rũcinĩ kwĩna rĩera rĩega tiga gũthuthua kwa rũcinĩ kũrĩa gwathirire naihenya, warĩ mũthenya mwega mũno wa 7's rugby.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
hypothesis: Abirika ya Mũhuro nĩyo yambĩrĩirie gĩthurano kĩu na njĩra ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ na ũhootani wa 26 - 00 kũhĩtũkĩra Zambia ĩrĩa yarĩ ya gatano.
reference: Athaki ngũthi a South Afrika maajirie mathako na mũthiĩre mwega rĩrĩa maahũrire timu ya Zambia 26- 00 ĩrĩa yarĩ namba ithano mũthakoinĩ.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
hypothesis: Ũgitĩri wao wa kĩhooto, ũhoti wao wa kũhiũrania na mbũri na wĩra wao mwega wa gĩkundi nĩ watũmire magĩe na ũhoti wa kũrũa na njĩra njega.
reference: ũgitĩri wao wa hadabu, ũmenyi wao wa kũmenyerera mũbira, na ũnyitanĩri wa athaki ao nĩguo watũmire moneke marĩ a mwanya, na nĩmoonekaga nĩo athaki ngũthi.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
hypothesis: Athuri a taũni ya Amsterdam na mũciĩ wa Anne Frank Museum moigĩte atĩ mũtĩ ũcio nĩ ũrĩ na mũrimũ wa mũrimũ na nĩ ũkoragwo ũrĩ ũgwati harĩ ũgima wa andũ tondũ nĩ moigĩte atĩ nĩ ũrĩ ũgwati mũnene wa kũgũa.
reference: Anene a itũũra inene rĩa Amsterdam na Anne Frank Museum makauga atĩ mũtĩ ũcio nĩ mũgwatie fungus na nĩ ũgwati mũnene harĩ ũgima wa mwĩrĩ makiuga atĩ warĩ ũgwati-inĩ mũnene wa kũgũa.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
hypothesis: Makinya mothe ma ngurunga icio, iria cietagwo "Atumia Mũgwanja", irĩ na ũraihu wa mita 100 nginya 250.
reference: Yoothe mĩrango ya ngurunga, ĩrĩa yetagwo "The Seven Sisters" ĩkoragwo meter igana rĩmwe nginya magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩtano inyihĩte mũno (feet magana matatũ ma mirongo ĩrĩ na inyanya nginya magana manana ma mĩrongo ĩrĩ) wariĩ.

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
hypothesis: Mbica cia indo iria cionekaga thĩinĩ wa rangi wa infrared cionanagia atĩ ũrugarĩ wa mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩ wonanagia atĩ no kũhoteke nĩ ngurunga.
reference: Nacio mbica cia infrared cionanĩtie atĩ ũtiganũ wa ũrugarĩ harĩ mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩũronania atĩ noikorwo ciĩ ngurunga.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
hypothesis: "Mĩthenya ya mũthenya marĩ na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ gũkĩra kũndũ kũrĩa kũngĩ, na hwaĩ-inĩ marĩ na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ.
reference: No ikorwo irĩ horeru gũkĩra thĩ iria irigicĩirie na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ ũtukũ.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
hypothesis: Mũtugo wao wa ũrugarĩ ndũrĩ ũrũmu o ta ngurunga nene thĩinĩ wa thĩ iria kaingĩ ikoragwo irĩ na ũrugarĩ mũkinyanĩru, no nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ ngurunga nene thĩinĩ wa thĩ", ũguo nĩguo Glen Cushing wa United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team na Northern Arizona University ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Flagstaff, Arizona oigire.
reference: "Mĩtugo yacio ya ũrugarĩ ndĩarĩ mĩrũmu ta ya ngurunga nene gũkũ thĩ iria kaingĩ ciigaga ũrugarĩ ũiganaine, no nĩ ihanaine na marima mariku makoragwo thĩ" Glen Cushing wa United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizon University.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
