hypothesis: Meelo kala duwan oo Rome ah waxaa lagu rakibay dhowr shaashad oo teleefishinka ah oo waaweyn si dadku u daawadaan xafladda.
reference: Dhowr telefishin oo waaweyn ayaa la dhigay meelo kala duwan magalada Rome si ay dadka u daawadan xaflada.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
hypothesis: Magaalooyinka kale ee Talyaaniga iyo inta kale ee adduunka, gaar ahaan Poland, waxaa lagu sameeyay qaabab la mid ah, kuwaas oo ay daawadeen dad aad u tiro badan.
reference: Magaalooyin badan oo ku yaal Talyaaniga iyo meelo kale oo aduunka ka mid ah, gaar ahaan Bolaan, muuqaalo la mid ah ayaa laga sameeyay, kuwaaso ay daawadeen dad aad u tiro badan.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
hypothesis: Taariikhyahannadu waxay dhaleeceynayaan siyaasadaha hore ee FBI-da ee diiradda saaraya kheyraadka kiisaska ay fududahay in la xaliyo, gaar ahaan kiisaska gawaarida la xaday, iyadoo ujeedadu tahay kor u qaadista heerka guusha ee hay'adda.
reference: Taarikhyahanada ayaa cambaareeyey sharciyada FBI-da ay culeyska ku saarayaan kiisaska fudud, gaar ahaam kiisaska gawaarida la xadey, oo lagu doonayo in lagu sare yeelo heeraha guusha shirkadda.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
hypothesis: Congress-ka ayaa bilaabay maalgelinta mashruuca nacasnimada sanadka dhaqaale ee 2005 wuxuuna qeexay in FBI-da ay u baahan tahay inay 10 wakiil u qoondeyso filimada qaawan ee dadka waaweyn.
reference: Barlamaanka Maraykanka ayaa bilaabay inay maal geliyaan hindisiga fuxshinimada sanadka miisaaniyeed ee 2005 iyagoo sheegeen in FBI ku qasban tahay inay 10 wakiil u gooyso soo saarka sawir qawnaashada dadka wayn.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
hypothesis: Robin Uthappa wuxuu dhaliyay dhibcaha ugu sarreeya ee innings-ka, 70 gool oo kaliya 41 kubadood isagoo ku dhufanaya 11 afar iyo 2 lix.
reference: Robin Uthappa wuxuu sameeyey dhib cihii ugu sareeyey, 70 orodyo 41 kubad ayuu tuuray 11 afar iyo 2 lex.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
hypothesis: Ciyaartoyda heerka dhexe, Sachin Tendulkar iyo Rahul Dravid, ayaa si fiican u qabtay waxayna sameeyeen wada-shaqeyn boqolkiiba.
reference: Ciyaaryahanka baatiska ee dhexda, Sachin Tendulkar iyo Rahul Dravid ayaa si fiican u ciyaaray oo sameeyay jaalnimo boqol-orod ah.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
hypothesis: Hase yeeshee, ka dib markii ay lumisay wicket-ka kabtanka India waxay sameysay kaliya 36 gool oo ay lumisay 7 wicket si ay u soo afjarto innings-ka.
reference: Balse, markay lumisay fursadii kabtanimada Wikedka Hindiya waxay samaysay 36 wareeg oo qura iyadoo ku guuldaraysatay 7 wiked si loo afjaro wareegyada.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
hypothesis: Madaxweynaha Mareykanka George W. Bush ayaa Singapore yimid subaxnimadii 16-kii Nofeembar, isagoo bilaabay safar toddobaad ah oo uu ku tagay Aasiya.
reference: Madaxwaynaha Maraykanka George W. Bush ayaa imaaday Singapore subixii November 16, isagoo bilaabayo booqasho Asia oo isbuuc dhan.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
hypothesis: Waxaa soo dhaweeyay Ra'iisul Wasaare ku xigeenka Singapore Wong Kan Seng wuxuuna ka wada hadlay arrimaha ganacsiga iyo argagixisada Ra'iisul Wasaaraha Singapore Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: Waxaa salamay ku Xigeenka Resul Wasaaraha Singapore ee Wong Kan Seng iyo waxay ka wada hadleen ganacsiga iyo arimaha argagixisa Resal Wasaraha Singapore ee Lee Hsien Loong.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
hypothesis: Toddobaad ka dib markii uu ku guuldareystay doorashada dhexdhexaadka ah, Bush wuxuu dhagaystayaasha u sheegay ballaarinta ganacsiga Aasiya.
reference: Kadib markii uu doorashada dhexe lumiyay muddo usbuuc ah, Bush wuxu dhagaytayaasha uga warramay ku fidinta ganacsiga ee Aasiya.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
hypothesis: Ra'iisul Wasaare Stephen Harper wuxuu ogolaaday inuu u diro'sharciga hawada nadiifka ah' ee dowladda guddiga xisbiyada oo dhan si dib loo eego, ka hor inta aan la aqrin labaad, kadib kulankii 25-daqiiqo ee Talaadada la yeeshay hoggaamiyaha NDP Jack Layton ee PMO.
reference: Raiisel wasaare Stephen Harper wuxuu ogolaaday inuu u diro sharciga 'Nadiifsanaanta Hawada (Clean Air Act)' gudi xisbiyada u dhanyihiin si ay dib u eegis ugu sameeyaan, kahor aqrintiisa labaad, kadib kulankii 25-ta daqiiqo ee Talaadada uu kula yeeshay PMO hogaamiyaha NDP Jack Layton.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
hypothesis: Layton wuxuu codsaday isbeddel ku yimaada biilka deegaanka ee ilaalada inta lagu gudajiray kulankii uu la qaatay Ra'iisul Wasaaraha, isagoo codsaday in "dib loo qoro oo dhammaystiran" biilka deegaanka ee xisbiga ilaalada.
reference: Layton ayaa codsaday in isbedelo lagu sameeyo sharciga bay’adda ay soo bandhigayaan xisbiga conservative-ka inta ay kula jireen shirka Raysul Wasaaraha, isagoo codsanaayo “dib u qoraal dhamaystiraan oo na buuxo” in lagu sameeyo sharciga bay’adda ay soo bandhigayaan xisbiga conservative-ka.

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
hypothesis: Tan iyo markii Dowladda Federaalka ay soo gashay si ay u qaadato maalgelinta Isbitaalka Mersey ee Devonport, Tasmania, dowladda gobolka iyo qaar ka mid ah xildhibaanada federaalka ayaa dhaliilay ficilkan inay tahay khiyaamo horudhac u ah doorashada federaalka ee la qaban doono bisha November.
reference: Illaa iyo markii Dawladda Federaalku ay la wareegtay maalgelinta cusbitaalka Mersey ee Devenport, Tasmania, dawlad goboleedka iyo dhowr ka tirsan xildhibaanada federaalka ayaa dhaliilay falkan markasta oo lagu sii durko doorashada la qabanayo Noofeembar.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
hypothesis: Laakiin Ra'iisul Wasaare John Howard ayaa sheegay in ficilkani uu ahaa oo kaliya si loo ilaaliyo xarumaha isbitaalka in ay hoos u dhigaan dawladda Tasmania, iyada oo la siinayo 45 milyan oo doolar oo dheeraad ah oo AUD ah.
reference: Balse Ra’iisul Wasaaraha John Howard waxa uu yidhi sharcigu waxa keliya loogu talo galay in cusbitaalka lagaga ilaaliyo inay hoos u dhigto dawladda Tasmaaniya, iyagoo bixiyay AUD$45 malyan.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
hypothesis: Sida laga soo xigtay wargeyska ugu dambeeyay, tirakoobka heerka badda ayaa muujinaya in la abuuray tsunami, waxaana la diiwaangeliyey dhaqdhaqaaq tsunami ah oo la xaqiijiyay meel u dhow Pago Pago iyo Niue.
reference: Marka loo eego warbixintii ugu danbaysay, akhrinta heerka badda ee ay inna tusisay duufaanta tsunami ayaa lasoo saaray. Waxaa jiray woxoogaa dhaqdhaqaaqyo aan dhamaanayn oo ay keentay duufaantu kuwaasi oo laga diwaangaliyay aagaga Pago Pago iyo Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
hypothesis: Ma jiro wax khasaare weyn ama dhaawac ah oo laga soo sheegay Tonga, laakiin korontada ayaa si ku meelgaar ah loo lumay, taas oo la sheegay inay ka hortagtay saraakiisha Tonga inay helaan digniinta tsunami ee ay soo saartay PTWC.
reference: Wax dhaawacyo ama burbur wayn ah laguma sheegayn Tonga, balse korontada ayaa si ku meel gaar ah u tagtay, taasoo sida la sheegay maamulka Tongan u diiday inay helaan digniinta suunaamida ay soo saareen PTWC.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
hypothesis: Afar iyo toban dugsi oo ku yaal xeebta Hawaii ama meel u dhow ayaa la xiray Arbacada oo dhan inkastoo digniinta la qaaday.
reference: Afar iyo toban iskool oo ku yaala Hawaii ama u dhaw xeebaha ayaa la xidhay dhamaantood arbacadii halkii looga digi lahaa.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
hypothesis: Madaxweynaha Mareykanka George W. Bush ayaa soo dhaweeyay ogeysiiskaas.
reference: Madax waynaha Maraykanka George W. Bush ayaa soo dhaweeyey ku dhawaaqidda.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
hypothesis: Afhayeenka Bush Gordon Johndroe wuxuu ballanqaadka Kuuriyada Waqooyi ku tilmaamay "tallaabo weyn oo ku wajahan hadafka ah in la gaaro hub ka saarista hubka Nukliyeerka ee Jasiiradda Kuuriya".
reference: Afhayen madaxweyne Bush Gordon Johndroe wuxuu ugu baaqay Waqoyiga Kuuriyo “ine cadeecan talaabooyinka waa weyn ee lagu garayo guulaha lagu xaqiijiyo joojinta isticmaalida nukliyeer ka dhulka Kuuriyo.”

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
hypothesis: Duufaanta tobnaad ee lagu magacaabo duufaanka Atlantic Hurricane, Subtropical Storm Jerry, ayaa maanta ka dhalatay Badweynta Atlantic.
reference: Duufaanka tobanaad ee magacaabo xiliga Duufaanada Atlantic, Subtropical Storm Jerry, ayaa ku samaysmay Badda Atlantic maanta.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
hypothesis: Xarunta Hurricane ee Qaranka (NHC) waxay sheegtay in Jerry uusan khatar ku ahayn dhulka.
reference: Xaruunta Duufaanka Dalka (NHC) ayaa sheegtay in xiligan hadda la joogo duufaanka Jerry uu khatar u ahayn soo degitaanka diyaaradaha.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
hypothesis: U.S. Corps of Engineers waxay qiyaastay in 6 inches oo roobab ah ay burburin karaan dhismayaasha horey u dhaawacmay.
reference: Midnimada Injineerada Maraykanka ayaa qiyaasay in ilaa 6 inji roob gaarayo inuu kharibi karo biyo haynta horaan wax gaaray.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
hypothesis: Degmada 9aad, oo markii duufaanta Katrina ay dhacday ay ku dhufatay in ka badan 20 mitir, waxay hadda ku jirtaa biyo badan, maadaama biyo-xireenka ku dhow uu kor u kacay.
reference: Degmada Ninth Ward ,taasoo la kulanatay fatahaad ilaa 20 cagood ah intii lagu jiray Duufaantii Katrina, ayaa hadda biyuhu u joogaan ilaa miskaha maadaama biyo fadhiisinka ku dhawaa fatahay.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
hypothesis: Biyaha ayaa ka soo qulqulaya dhismaha qeyb ka mid ah 100 mitir oo ballaaran.
reference: Biyaha ka soo dadanayo buurta qeybta dhirir keedu yahay 100 talaabo.

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
hypothesis: Maamulaha Commons Adam Cuerden wuxuu ka muujiyey niyadjabkiisa ka dhanka ah tirtirka markii uu la hadlay Wikinews bishii la soo dhaafay.
reference: Maamulaha guud, Adam Cuerden ayaa ka hadlay walalkiisa ku saabsan tir tirida mar uu la hadlaye Wikinews bishii hore.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
hypothesis: "Waxay [Wales] bilowgii nagu beenisay, marka hore, iyadoo u dhaqmaysa sidii inay sabab sharci ah u ahayd, marka labaad, iyadoo u muuqatay inay na dhageysaneyso, ilaa uu meesha ka saaray farshaxanka".
reference: "Isaga [Wales] run ahaantii been ayuu noo sheegay anaka bilawgiiba. Ugu horaynba wuxuu iska dhigay sidii in tani ay tahay sababo sharci. Mar labaadna, wuxu noo matalay inuu na dhagaysanayo, dhakhso ayaa loo tirtiray naqshadiisii."

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
hypothesis: Cadhada bulshada ayaa keentay dadaallada hadda jira si loo soo saaro siyaasad ku saabsan waxyaabaha galmada loogu talagalay goobta oo marti gelisa malaayiin warbaahineed oo si furan loo oggolaaday.
reference: Ka cadhaysiinta bulshada ayaa keentay dadaalada hadda ee siyaasada qabyada ah ee khuseeya waxyaalaha ku saabsan galmada kuwaasi oo ay hawada galiyaan malaayiin kamida shabakadaha liisamada haystaa.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
hypothesis: Shaqada la sameeyay waxay badanaa ahayd mid aragti ah, laakiin barnaamijka waxaa loo qoray in lagu tijaabiyo aragtida laga sameeyay xiddigaha Sagittarius.
reference: Shaqada la qabtay ayaa inteeda badan aragti aheyd, laakin qorshaha ayaa loo qoray in loo ekaysiiyo indha-indhaynta laga sameeyay  kooxo-xidigeedka Sagittarius.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
hypothesis: Saamaynta ay kooxdu raadinaysay waxay sabab u noqon doontaa xoogga dabaysha ee u dhexeeya mawduuca mugdiga ah ee galaxyada iyo mawduuca mugdiga ah ee Milky Way.
reference: Saamaynta kooxdu ay raadinayso waxaa saamayn doona awoodaha hirarka ee u dhaxeeya maatarka madow ee xiddig-urureedka iyo maatarka madow ee Cirjiideed.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
hypothesis: Fikradani waxay sheegeysaa in waxyaabo badan oo mugdi ah oo ku xeeran galaxy ay ku yaalliin galaxy nooc ka mid ah halo, waxaana ka kooban walxo badan oo yaryar.
reference: Aragtidani waxay leedahay maatarka madoow ee gaalagsiyada ku hareeraysan intiisa badani waxay gaalagsiga ugu hareeraysan yihiin qaab balli ah, waxayna ka samaysan yihiin qurubyo aad u yaryar.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
hypothesis: Wararka telefishanka ayaa muujinaya qiiq cad oo ka imanaya warshadda.
reference: Telefishanku wuxuu soo tabiyaa muuqaal qiiq cad oo kasoo baxaya dhirta.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
hypothesis: Mas'uuliyiinta deegaanka ayaa ka digaya dadka ku nool agagaarka warshadda inay guriga joogaan, qaboojinta hawada iyo inaysan cabin biyaha qasabadda.
reference: Maamulka dawlada waxay ugu digayaan dadka degan in goobaha laga fulin doono, iska damiya qabojiyasha la isticmalo xiliga kuleelada sido kale in aan la cabin biyaha tubada/qasabada.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
hypothesis: Sida laga soo xigtay hay'adda nukliyeerka Japan, caesium iyo iodine radioactive ayaa laga helay warshadda.
reference: Sida ay sheegtay wakaalada nukliyeerka Jabaan, kaalshiyamta leh shocaaca waxyeelada leh iyo aydhiin ayaa laga helay dhirta.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
hypothesis: Dr. Tony Moll wuxuu ogaaday cudurka 'Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis' (XDR-TB) ee gobolka Koonfur Afrika ee KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Dr. Tony Moll wuxuu gobolka South Afrika KwaZulu-Natal ka helay cudurka qaaxada (XDR-TB) ee aadka ugu adkaysta dawada.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
hypothesis: Wareysi uu siiyey, wuxuu sheegay in kala duwanaanta cusub ay tahay "wax aad u walwal badan oo cabsi badan sababtoo ah heerka dhimashada ee aadka u sarreeya".
reference: Waraysi lala yeeshay, wuxuu ku sheegay kala duwananta cusub “Waxaa jira is dhexyaac badan iyo digniin sababtoo ah waxaa aad u sareeya heerka khatarta.”

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
hypothesis: Dhakhtar Moll wuxuu u maleynayaa in bukaanada qaarkood ay cudurka ku qabteen isbitaalka, ugu yaraan laba ka mid ahna waxay ahaayeen shaqaale caafimaad oo isbitaalka ka shaqeeya.
reference: Dhowr bukaan ayaa la filayaa inay cudurka ka soo qaadeen cusbitaalka, sida uu aaminsan yahay Dr. Moll, ugu yaraa laba ka mid ah waxay ahaayeen shaqaalaha caafimaadka ee cusbitaalka.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
hypothesis: Sannad gudaheeda, qof qaba cudurka ayaa laga yaabaa inuu ku dhaco 10 ilaa 15 qof oo uu xiriir dhow la yeesho.
reference: Sanad gudihiisa, qof oo xanuunka sida ayaa gaarsiin karo 10 ilaa 15 qof oo xiriir dhaw la leh.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
hypothesis: Si kastaba ha noqotee, boqolkiiba XDR-TB ee kooxda oo dhan ee dadka qaba hargabka ayaa wali u muuqda mid hooseeya; 6,000 oo ka mid ah guud ahaan 330,000 oo qof oo ku dhacay waqti gaar ah Koonfur Afrika.
reference: Si kastaba ha ahaatee, boqolayda dadka qaba XDR-TB ee dhammaan dadka qaba qaaxada weli waxa uu u muuqda hooseeya, 6,000 oo ka mida waddarta guud ee 330,000 ee cudurka qaba mar kasta.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
hypothesis: Dayax gacmeedyada, oo labadooduba culeyskoodu ka badan yahay 1,000 pounds, waxayna ku safraan qiyaastii 17,500 mayl saacaddii, waxay isku dhaceen 491 mayl dhulka korkiisa.
reference: Saterleed yada, midkiiba kabadan yahay cabir 1,000 bownd ah, oo ku safraye ku dhawaad 17,500 meyl saacadii, ayaa isku dhacay meel u jirta dhulka 491 meyl.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
hypothesis: Cilmi-baadhayaashu waxay sheegeen in qaraxa uu ahaa mid weyn.
reference: Saynsiyahanadu waxay leeyihiin qaraxa isku dhacu sababay aad buu u waynaa.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
hypothesis: Waxay wali isku dayaan inay ogaadaan sida weyn ee shilku u dhacay iyo sida uu dhulka u saameyn doono.
reference: Waxay wali isu dayeyaan inay xaqiijiyaan wayninka isu dhaca iyo sida aduunka loo saameeyey.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
hypothesis: Taliska istiraatiijiyadeed ee Mareykanka ee xafiiska Wasaaradda Difaaca ayaa raadraaca burburka.
reference: Taliska Istaraatiijiyadda Mareykanka ee xafiiska Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga Mareykanka ayaa raadraaca burburka.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
hypothesis: Natiijooyinka falanqaynta qorshaha waxaa lagu soo bandhigi doonaa bogga internetka ee dadweynaha.
reference: Natiijada shaxanka falanqaynta waxa lagu soo daabacayaa websayd dadwayne.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
hypothesis: Dhakhtar ka shaqeyn jiray Isbitaalka Carruurta ee Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania ayaa lagu eedeyn doonaa dil daran kadib markii hooyadeed lagu helay meydkeeda gaadhiga Wednesday, saraakiisha Ohio ayaa sheegaya.
reference: Dhaqtar ka shaqeyn jiray isbitaalka Caruurta ee Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania ayaa waxa loo xukumi doona dil ay hooyaded u geysatay kadib markii ayadoo meyd ah laga helay dabada danbe ee gaarigeda Arbacadi, waxaa sida dhahay madaxda Ohio.

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
hypothesis: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, oo 29 jir ah, ayaa laga helay Blue Ash, Ohio, oo ah duleedka ku yaalla qiyaastii 15 mayl waqooyiga Cincinnati oo dhulka ku fadhiya wadada dhinaceeda, isagoo qaba T-shirt iyo dharka hoostiisa ah.
reference: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, waxaa laga heley magaalada Blue Ash, Ohio meel u jirta 15 maylis qeybta waqooyiga ee Cincinnati isago ku yaala dhulka dhinaca wada isago gashan keliya funanad/garan iyo buumo/shoorti keliya isago marka aad loogu daroogeyey gobolka.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
hypothesis: Halkaas, waxay ka heleen meydka Saroja Balasubramanian, 53 jir, oo lagu daboolay dhar dhiig leh.
reference: Halkaas ayayna ka heleen maydka Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, oo ku daboolan bustayaal dhiig-qaba.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
hypothesis: Booliisku waxay sheegeen in meydka uu u muuqday inuu halkaas joogo qiyaastii maalin.
reference: Booliska waxa ay sheegen in ay suuro gal tahay in meydka uu yaalay meesha maalin kaamila

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
hypothesis: Kiisaskii ugu horreeyay ee cudurka xilli ciyaareedkan ayaa la soo sheegay dhammaadkii bishii Luulyo.
reference: Xaaladihii ugu horeeyay ee xanuunka sabankan ayaa lasoo wariyay juulay aakhir keedii.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
hypothesis: Cudurka waxaa qaata doofaarka, ka dibna wuxuu u gudbaa dadka iyada oo loo marayo cayayaanka.
reference: Cudurka waxaa qaada doofaarka, kaas oo markaas u gudbiyo aadanaha asagoo u sii marinayo kaneecada.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
hypothesis: Cudurka ayaa dowladda Hindiya ku dhiirigelisay inay qaadato tallaabooyin ay ka mid yihiin soo dirista xayawaanka doofaarka ee meelaha ay saameyn daran ku yeelatay, qaybinta kumanaan daahyada cayayaanka iyo buufinta cayayaanka.
reference: Xanuunka dilaacay wuxuu ku sababay in dawladda Indian ay qaado talabo ay ku qiyaaseyso horamarinta dabinka dofaarka iyo meelaha laga wax yeleyey, iyago u qeybinaya sidoo kale shabaga kaneecada/maro kaneeco iyo suntan cayayaanka.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
hypothesis: Dowladda ayaa sidoo kale ballanqaaday dhowr milyan oo vials oo ah tallaalka maskaxda, taas oo gacan ka geysan doonta diyaarinta hay'adaha caafimaadka sanadka soo socda.
reference: Dhawr milyan weel oo talaalka encephalitis ayee ballan qaaday dawladda, oo ka caawin doonto diyaarinta wakaaladaha caafimaadka sanadka soo socda.

source: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.
hypothesis: Qorshaha tallaallada lagu gaarsiinayo goobaha ugu saameynta badan taariikhda sanadkan ayaa dib loo dhigay sababtoo ah la'aanta maalgelinta iyo mudnaanta hooseysa marka loo eego cudurrada kale.
reference: Qorshahii keenida talaalka ee taarikhiyan meelaha aay dhibatada ugu badan gaartey sanadkan ayaa dib loo dhige dhaqaalo la'aan awgeed iyo ahmiyad siin yari marka loo fiiriyo cudurada kale.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
hypothesis: Sannadkii 1956 Słania wuxuu u guuray Iswiidhan, halkaas oo saddex sano ka dib uu ka bilaabay inuu u shaqeeyo Xafiiska Boostada Iswiidhan wuxuuna noqday qodista ugu weyn.
reference: 1956dii Stania wuxuu u guuray Iswiidhan, halkaasi oo uu saddex sanno kadib uu shaqo ka bilaabay xafiiska boosaha ee Iswiidhan halkaasina uu ka noqday madaxa naqshadaynta.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
hypothesis: Wuxuu soo saaray in ka badan 1,000 oo shaabadood oo loogu talagalay Iswiidhan iyo 28 dal oo kale.
reference: Wuxuu usoo saaray ilaa 1,000 calaamad boosto Sweden iyo 28 uu usoo saaray wadamo kale.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
hypothesis: Waxyaabaha uu sameeyay waa mid aad loo aqoonsan yahay oo si faahfaahsan loo aqoonsan yahay in uu yahay mid ka mid ah "magacyada reerka" ee aadka loo yaqaano philatelists.
reference: Hawlaha uu qabtay waxa loo aqoonsan yahay tayo iyo tafaasiil heer sare ah waana ta ka dhigtay mid ka mid ah " kuwa ugu caansan" dadka kaadhadhka boostada uruuriya. Dadka qaarbaa ku takhasusay uruurinta hawlaha uu qabtay oo keliya.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
hypothesis: Calaamadiisii 1000aad waxay ahayd "Waxyaabaha Weyn ee Boqorrada Iswidhishka" ee uu sameeyay David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl sanadkii 2000, kaas oo ku qoran Buugga Guinness ee Rikoodhada Adduunka.
reference: tiimbarihiisi 1000-naad waxa uu aha mid cajiiba "Ficiladii Wanaagsana ee Booqaradi Iswedishka" ee David Klocker Ehrenstrahl 2000, taaso lagu diwaan geliye buuga mucjisooyinka aduunka.

source: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.
hypothesis: Waxa kale oo uu ku hawlan yahay xardho bangiyada dalal badan, tusaalooyinkii ugu dambeeyay ee shaqadiisa oo ay ku jiraan sawirrada Ra'iisul Wasaaraha ee hore ee qadaadiicda cusub ee $ 5 iyo $ 100 ee Kanada.
reference: Wuxuu sidoo kale ka shaqaynaayey u naqshadaynta lacagaha wadamo badan, tusaalooyinka ugu dambeeyey oo shaqadiisa ayaa ka mid ah sawiradda Raysul Wasaaraha ee ku yaalo horta lacagta cusub ee canada ee $5 iyo $100.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
hypothesis: Ka dib markii shilku dhacay, Gibson waxaa loo geeyay isbitaal laakiin wuxuu ku dhintay wax yar ka dib.
reference: Kadib shilkii dhacay,Gibson waxaa loo qaaday isbitaalka laakiin wuxuu dhintay in yar ka dib.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
hypothesis: Darawalka gaariga, oo 64 jir ah, lama dhaawacmay shilka.
reference: Darawal gaariyeed, 64 jira ahaa ayaan ku dhawaacmin shilka.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
hypothesis: Gaariga laftiisa ayaa laga qaaday goobta shilka qiyaastii 1200 GMT isla maalintaas.
reference: Waxa la qaatey meesha gaadhiga laftiisa shilka uu kugaley abaarahii waqtiga marku ahaa 12:00 GMT isla maalinta.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
hypothesis: Qof ka shaqeeya garaash ku dhow meesha shilku dhacay ayaa yiri: "Waxaa jiray caruur sugaya inay ka gudbaan wadada oo dhammaantood way qayliyeen oo ooyeen".
reference: Qof ka shaqaynayay geerash u dhowaa meesha shilku ka dhacay ayaa yidhi: “ waxa jiray caruur rabtay inay ka gudbaan waddada dhammaantoodna way qaylinayeen oo ooyeen.”

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
hypothesis: Dhammaantood waxay ka carareen meeshii shilku dhacay.
reference: Waxay kuligooda ka carareen halkuu shilka ka dhacay.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
hypothesis: Mawduucyada kale ee ajandaha ku jira Bali waxaa ka mid ah badbaadinta kaymaha adduunka ee ka harsan, iyo wadaagista tiknoolajiyada si ay u caawiyaan dalalka soo koraya inay koraan siyaabo ka yar wasakheynta.
reference: Mawduucyada kale ee Bali ajandaha ugu jiray waxa ka mid ah in la badbaadiyo kaymaha adduunka ee haray, iyo in la wadaago tiknoolajiyadda lagaga caawinayo waddamada inay noqdaan qaar dikhayn yar.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
hypothesis: Qaramada Midoobay waxay sidoo kale rajeyneysaa inay dhameystirto sanduuq lagu caawiyo dalalka ay saameyn ku yeelato kuleylka adduunka si ay ula qabsadaan saameynta.
reference: U.N. waxa ay rajeynayaan in ay soo gabagabeeyaan lacago lagu caawinayo dalalka ay kulaylka caalamka saameeyay si ay ula tacaalan dhibteeda.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
hypothesis: Lacagta waxaa loo isticmaali karaa guryo aan daad lahayn, maaraynta biyaha si ka wanaagsan, iyo kala duwanaanshaha dalagga.
reference: Lacagta waa in lagu sameeyo guriyaha u adkaysta fatahaada, maarayn biyeed wanaagsan, iyo soo saarista khudaar kala gedisan.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
hypothesis: Waxay gaadhay go'aankaas sababtoo ah faallooyin badan oo wanaagsan iyo dhiirigelin ay u direen dumarka iyo ragga oo ku booriyay in daawada ka hortagga uurka loo arko inay tahay baahi caafimaad.
reference: waxay gaartay go’aankan kadib markay heshay fikrado wanaagsan oo ay ku dhiiro galiyeen rag iyo dumarba kulana talinayya daawooyinka ka hor taga uurka in laga dhigo daawooyin muhim u ah caafimaadka.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
hypothesis: Markii dagaalku joojiyay ka dib markii dadkii dhaawacmay la geeyay isbitaalka, ku dhawaad 40 maxaabiis oo ka mid ah maxaabiistii kale ee hadhay waxay ku hayeen barxadda waxayna diideen inay ku noqdaan xabsigooda.
reference: Markii dagaalku istaagay kadibna dhaawaca loo qaaaday cisbitaalka, ku dhawaad 40 ka mida maxaabiistii hadhsanayd ayaa iska sii joogay beerta, waxaanay diideen inay ku laabtaan qolaalkoodii.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
hypothesis: Wadahadalayaashu waxay isku dayeen inay xaaladda hagaajiyaan, laakiin shuruudaha maxaabiista ma cadda.
reference: Dhexdhexaadiyayaashu waxay isku dayeen inay dajiyaan xaaladda, balse baahida maxaabiistu ma caddayn.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
hypothesis: Inta u dhaxaysa 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, dab ayaa waxaa bilaabay maxaabiista barxadda.
reference: Intii u dhaxeyse 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, dab ayaa waxaa bilaabay maxaabista xabsiga.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
hypothesis: Ciidamada gurmadka dab damiska ayaa dabka ugu dambeyntii baabi'iyey 11:35 galabnimo.
reference: Dabdamisku run ahaantii wax badan ayay ku shubeen dabka markay saacaddu ahayd 11:35 gd.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
hypothesis: Kadib markii biyo xireenka la dhisay 1963, fatahaadaha xilliyeedka ah ee ku faafin lahaa daadka webiga oo dhan ayaa la joojiyay.
reference: Markii biyo xidheenka la dhisay 1963 kii, fatahaad xilliyeedkii niista keeni jiray dhammaan webiga ayaa la hakiyay.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
hypothesis: Natiijo ahaan, laba nooc oo kalluun ah ayaa la baabi'iyey, laba kalluun oo kalluun ahna khatar ayay ku jiraan, oo ay ka mid yihiin kalluunka humpback chub.
reference: Sidaa awgeed, laba nooc oo kaluun ah ayaa dabar go'ay, laba nooc oo kalena waxay ku suganyihiin xaalad halis ah, waxaana kamida humpback chub.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
hypothesis: Inkastoo heerka biyaha uu kor u kici doono kaliya dhowr mitir ka dib daadadka, mas'uuliyiintu waxay rajeynayaan inay ku filnaan doonto in dib loo soo celiyo buundooyinka qallalan ee durdurka hoose.
reference: Inkasto heerka biyaha uu dhowr fiit kor ukici doocno fatahaada kadib, masuuliyiinta waxa ay raajeynayaan in ay ku filnaan doonan dib usoo celinta nabaad guurki carada.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
hypothesis: Ma jiro digniin tsunami ah oo la soo saaray, iyo sida laga soo xigtay wakaaladda geophysics ee Jakarta, ma jiro digniin tsunami ah oo la soo saari doono sababtoo ah dhulgariirku ma buuxin shuruudaha magnitude 6.5.
reference: Wax digid tsunami lama soo saarin, marka la fiiryo hayada dhulkiyo qaabeynta, wax digitaan tsunami lama sheegi doono maadama uu aad uuga yaran doono heer dhibato dhacdo.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
hypothesis: Inkastoo aysan jirin khatar tsunami ah, dadka deggan waxay bilaabeen inay baqaan oo ay ka baxaan ganacsigooda iyo guryahooda.
reference: Waxaa laga yaabaa suurtagalnimada khataro suunaami,in dadkii deganaa ay bilaabeen inay ka iskaga tagaan ganaciyadoodii iyo guryahoodiiba.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
hypothesis: Inkastoo Winfrey ay qaylo-dhigtay salaanteeda, haddana waxay taageerayaasheeda u sheegtay inay dib u soo laaban doonto.
reference: Inkastoo Winfrey ay ilmeynaysay markii la sagootinayay, balse way u caddaysay taageerayaasheeda inay dib u soo laabanayso.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
hypothesis: "Tani ma noqon doonto salaan, waa xidhitaanka cutubka iyo furitaanka cutubka cusub".
reference: “Tani ma ahan macsalaamo. Tani waa dhamaystirka hal cutub iyo furitaanka mid cusub.”

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
hypothesis: Natiijooyinka ugu dambeeya ee doorashooyinka madaxtinimada iyo baarlamaanka Namibia ayaa tilmaamay in madaxweynaha xilka haya, Hifikepunye Pohamba, uu dib loo doortay kala duwanaansho weyn.
reference: Natiijada ugu dambeynta, madaxtinimad Namibian iyo doorasha barlamaanka waxay sheegeen in laga marmaan tahay madaxweyne, Hifikepunye Pohamba, dib ayaa loo doortay tiro badan oo dad ah

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
hypothesis: Xisbiga talada haya ee Koonfur Galbeed Afrika ee Ururka Shacabka (SWAPO) ayaa sidoo kale ku haystay badankoodu doorashooyinka baarlamaanka.
reference: Xisbiga hogaanka, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO) ayaa sidoo kale aqlabiyaadka helay mar kale doorashooyinka barlamaaneed ka dib.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
hypothesis: Ciidamada isbahaysiga iyo kuwa Afgaanistaan ayaa u guuray aagga si ay u ilaaliyaan goobta iyo diyaarado kale oo isbahaysi ah ayaa loo diray inay caawiyaan.
reference: Isbaheysiga iyo ciidamada Afghan ka waxay u sii guureen goobta amaanka ah isbaheysiga kale ee cirka waxaa logu direy in ay caawiyaan

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
hypothesis: Shilkani wuxuu ka dhacay meel sare oo buuraley ah, waxaana la rumeysan yahay in uu sabab u ahaa dabkii cadowga ahaa.
reference: Burburku wuxuu ka dhacay figta sare ee dhulka buuralayda ah, waxaana la rumaysanyahay inuu sababay dab daran.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
hypothesis: Dadaallada lagu raadinayo goobta shilku dhacay ayaa la kulmay cimilo xun iyo dhul adag.
reference: Dadaalada lagu baarayo dhinacyada burbursan waxay la kulmeen cimilada oo xun iyo dhagacyad adag.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
hypothesis: Hay'adda daryeelka caafimaadka ee Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres iyo Ururka Caafimaadka Adduunka ayaa sheegtay inay tahay cudurka ugu xun ee lagu diiwaangeliyey dalka.
reference: Haayadda caafimaad ee Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres iyo Haayadda Caafimaadka Aduunku waxay sheegeen inuu yahay xanuunkii ugu xumaa ee waddanka ka dillaaca.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
hypothesis: Afhayeenka Ururka Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman ayaa yiri: "Angola waxay ku sii jeedineysaa cudurkeeda ugu xumaa ee abid iyo xaaladda Angola ayaa weli aad u xun", ayuu yiri.
reference: Afhayeen u hadlay Medecines Sans Frontiere, Richard Veerman ayaa yidhi: “ Angoola waxay kusoo wajahan cudur ka dillaaca kii ugu darnaa xaaladduna aad bay u xuntahay Angoola,” ayuu yidhi.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
hypothesis: Ciyaaradu waxay bilaabeen 10:00 subaxnimo cimilo wanaagsan iyo marka laga reebo roobkii subaxnimadii oo si dhakhso leh u caddeeyay, waxay ahayd maalin fiican oo loogu talagalay rugby-ka 7-aad.
reference: Ciyaaruhu waxay ku bilaabmeen cimilo heersare ah 10:00 subaxnimo marka laga reebo subaxnimadii dhexe shuux da'ay oo markiiba qaaday, waxay ahayd maalintii ugu wacnayd ee ciyaarta 7 ragbi dhacdo.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
hypothesis: Koonfur Afrika oo ah kooxaha ugu sareeya tartanka ayaa ku bilaabatay habka saxda ah markii ay guul raaxo leh 26 - 00 ku heshay Zambia oo kaalinta 5aad ku jirta.
reference: Tartanka waxaa ugu sareye Koonfur Afrika waxa ay ku bilaabeyn sidii loo baahna marka ay lahaayen 26 - 00 raaxa markee u baxaayen Zambia.

source: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.
hypothesis: Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Koonfur Afrika ayaa si joogto ah u hagaagtay iyadoo tartanka uu sii socday, iyada oo ay u muuqato in ciyaarta ay ku dhacday walaalaheeda koonfureed.
reference: Iyadoo si wayn daal uga muuqdo ciyaarta ay la leedahay walaalaheeda koonfureed, Koonfur Afrika waxay si kastaba ha ahaatee si joogto ah uga soo raysay intay ciyaartu socotay.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
hypothesis: Saraakiisha magaalada Amsterdam iyo Matxafka Anne Frank ayaa sheegaya in geedka uu ku dhacay fangas isla markaana uu khatar ku yahay caafimaadka dadweynaha maadaama ay ku doodayaan in uu halis ku jiro in uu dhaco.
reference: Saraakiisha magaalada Amsterdam iyo Matxafka Anne Frank ayaa sheegay in geedka uu qabo xanuun ka imaaday fungus uu na halis caafimaad gelinaayo dadwaynaha iyagoo sheegaayo inuu halis ugu jiray inuu dumo.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
hypothesis: Waxaa la qorsheeyay in la gooyo Talaadada, laakiin waxaa la badbaadiyay ka dib go'aan deg deg ah oo maxkamad ah.
reference: Waxaa loo asteeyay in la jaro Salaasada, balse waa badbaaday kadib markii uu soo baxay sharci maxkamadeed degdeg ahi.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
hypothesis: Dhammaan albaabada godka, oo loogu magac daray "The Seven Sisters", waxay leeyihiin ugu yaraan 100 ilaa 250 mitir (328 ilaa 820 fuud) dhexroor.
reference: Dhamaan meelaha laga galaayo godadka, oo ay ku qornaayeen “Todobada Walaalo”, ayaa ugu yaraan ah 100 ila 250 mitar (328 ilaa 820 talaabo) wareega.

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
hypothesis: Sawirada infrared waxay muujinayaan in heerkulka kala duwanaanshaha habeenkii iyo maalinta ay muujinayaan in ay u badan tahay inay yihiin godad.
reference: Muuqaalada iftiinka leh waxay ku tusayaan kala duwanaanshaha heerkulka laga bilaabo habeen iyo maalin waxayna ku tusinayaan inay yelankaran godad.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
hypothesis: "Waxay maalin ka qabow yihiin dhulka hareeraheeda, habeenkana way diiran yihiin.
reference: "Jawigu wuxuu said u qabowyahay maalinkii ruumadne habeenkii.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
hypothesis: Habdhaqankooda kuleylka ah ma aha mid deggan sida godadka waaweyn ee dhulka oo inta badan haysta heerkul aad u joogto ah, laakiin waxay la mid tahay inay yihiin godad qoto dheer oo dhulka ku yaal, "ayuu yiri Glen Cushing oo ka tirsan Kooxda Astrogeology ee United States Geological Survey (USGS) iyo Jaamacadda Waqooyiga Arizona ee ku taal Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: Habdhaqankoda heerkul ahaned uma toosna umana weyna sida godadka waweyn ee dhulka kuwaasi oo badiyaa leh heerkul aan is dhimin, balse waxay ka koobantahay godad dhaadheer oo dhulka ah," sida waxa yidhi Glen cushing ka maraykanka ee ka shaqeya arimaha dhagxanta (USGS) iyo kooxda xidigiska ee waqooyiga jamacadda Arizona ee ku taala Flagstaff,Arizona.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
hypothesis: Faransiiska, codbixinta waxay caadi ahaan ahayd khibrad tiknoolajiyad hooseeya leh: codbixiyeyaashu waxay isu go'doomiyaan boorso, waxay ku ridayaan warqad horay loo daabacay oo muujineysa musharaxa ay doorteen baqshad.
reference: Faransiiska, codayntu waxay dhaqan ahaan ahaan jirtay mid tiknoolajiyadu ku yar tahay: codeeyuhu qolyar buu galaa, waraaq hore loo sii daabacay ayuu ku muujiyaa musharaxa uu rabo kuna ridaa gal

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
hypothesis: Kadib markii mas'uuliyiintu xaqiijiyaan aqoonsiga codbixiyaha, codbixiyuhu wuxuu ku tuuraa baqshadda sanduuqa codbixinta wuxuuna saxiixayaa liiska codbixinta.
reference: Ka dib marka saraakiishu xaqiijiso aqoonsiga codsadaha, codsaduhu waxa baqshadda waraaqda codku ku jirto ku ridayaa sanduuqa waanu saxeexayaa.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
hypothesis: Sharciga doorashooyinka Faransiiska ayaa si adag u qeexaya nidaamka.
reference: Sharciga doorashada Faransiiska ayaa si adag u u sharciyeeyay hab raacyada hawl qabasho.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
hypothesis: Laga soo bilaabo 1988, sanduuqyada codbixinta waa in ay noqdaan kuwo hufan si ay codbixiyayaasha iyo daawadayaashu u xaqiijiyaan in aanay jirin boorsooyin bilowga codbixinta iyo in aanay jirin boorsooyin lagu daro marka laga reebo kuwa codbixiyayaasha si fiican loo tiriyey oo loo oggolaaday.
reference: Ilaa sanad 1988, sanadiiqda codeynta waa in ay noqdan kuwa aan laheyn madmadow musuq maasuq halka codeyaasha iyo indha indheyasha marqaatiga ka noqon karo iney jirin wax bashqad aan lagu soo gudbin meesha si loo tiro si cadalad ah codadka ay dadku ku codeyeen.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
hypothesis: Musharaxiintu waxay wakiilo u diri karaan si ay u arkaan qayb kasta oo ka mid ah geedi socodka.
reference: Musharaxiintu wakiilo ayay dirsan karaan si ay markhaati ugu ahaadaan qayb kasta oo ka mid ah hawlgalka. Fiidnimadii, codadka waxa tiranaya mutadawiciin iyagoo aad korka loogala socdo, iyagoo raacaya habraac gaar ah.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
hypothesis: ASUS Eee PC, oo horay loogu bilaabay adduunka oo dhan kharash-keydinta iyo waxqabadka, waxay noqotay mawduuc kulul bishii 2007 ee Taipei IT.
reference: ASUS Eee PC, waxaa marka hore lo soo saraay aduun koo dhan qimaha dhimista iyo xaqiiqda shaqada, wuxuu noqday mowduuc xasaasi sanadkii 2007 Taipei IT Bisha.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
hypothesis: Laakiin suuqa macaamiisha ee kumbuyuutarada laptop-ka ayaa si weyn u kala duwanaan doona oo isbeddeli doona ka dib markii ASUS ay ku guuleysatay abaalmarinta joogtada ah ee Taiwan 2007 oo ay soo saartay Yuan Fulinta ee Jamhuuriyadda Shiinaha.
reference: Balse suuqa iibka ee kombiyuutarda laabtoobku waxa uu noqon doonaa mid si wayn isu beddela oo u kala duwanaada ka dib marka ASUS lagu abaaliyo Billadada Sii Jirista Taywaan ee ay ku abaaliyaan Maamulka Yuan ee Jamhuuriyadda Shiine.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
hypothesis: Bogga internetka ee saldhiga ayaa ku tilmaamaya bandhigga sida "shaashadda raadiyaha ee dugsiga hore oo leh muuqaal cusub oo cajiib ah oo cajiib ah!"
reference: Goobta laga maamulo websayt ka waxaa kagu qeexa barnaamijka “raadiyaha iskuulka hore ee tiyaatarka cusba hormarsanana ee la hormariyey!”

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
hypothesis: Maalmihii ugu horreeyay, bandhigga waxaa lagu soo bandhigay oo keliya goobta raadiyaha internetka ee TogiNet Radio, oo ah goob diiradda saartay raadiyaha wada hadalka.
reference: Maalmihiisa ugu horeeyay, barnaajimka wuxuu gabi ahaanba ka baxay mareegta intarneetka mudada dheer jirtay ee TogiNet Radio, mareeg diiradda saarto raadiyo hadaleed.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
hypothesis: Dhamaadka 2015, TogiNet waxay aasaastay AstroNet Radio inay noqoto saldhig ka tirsan.
reference: Gabagabada 2015, TogiNet ayaa u aasaasay AstroNet Radio inay ahaato shirkad ka hoos shaqeyso.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
hypothesis: Bandhiggu wuxuu asal ahaan ka soo muuqday jilayaasha codka xiisaha leh, oo ku nool Bariga Texas.
reference: Bandhiga waxa bilaawgi soo saaray cod duuba yaal cusub, oo deggan Bariga Texas.

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
hypothesis: Burburka ballaaran ayaa la sheegay inuu sii socday habeenkii, maadaama aysan jirin saraakiil ka tirsan ciidamada sharciga oo ku sugnaa jidadka magaalada Bishkek.
reference: Boob baahsan ayaa sida la sheegay sii socday habeenimadii oo dhan, maadaama saraakiisha nidaam fulintu ka maqnaayeen wadooyinka Bishkek.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
hypothesis: Bishkek waxaa lagu tilmaamay mid ka mid ah indha-indheeyayaasha inay hoos ugu dhacday xaalad "xumo" ah, maadaama kooxo dad ah ay ku dhex wareegeen jidadka oo ay afduubteen dukaamada alaabada macaamiisha.
reference: Korjooge ayaa ku tilmaamay Bishkek inay gelayso “khalkhal”, isla markaas oo burcad ay waddooyinka qaadayeen kan dhacayeen dukaamada alaabooyinka iyo badeecooyinka.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
hypothesis: Qaar ka mid ah dadka deggan Bishkek ayaa ku eedeeyay mudaaharaadayaasha koonfurta sharci darada.
reference: In kamida deeganka Bishkek ayaa eedeynaya mudaaharadlayaasah ka yimid koonfurta shari la'aanta ka jirto.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
hypothesis: Koonfur Afrika ayaa ka adkaatay All Blacks (New Zealand) kulan rugby union Tri Nations ah oo ka dhacay garoonka Royal Bafokeng ee Rustenburg, Koonfur Afrika.
reference: Koonfur Afrika aya kaga adkaatay Dhamaan Madowga(New Zealand) ciyaar ka tirsaneyd Rugby Union Tri Nations ciyaartaasoo ka dhacday garoonka Royal Bafokeng , Koonfur Afrika .

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
hypothesis: Go'aanka ugu dambeeya wuxuu ahaa guul hal dhibcood ah, 21 ilaa 20, kaas oo soo afjaray All Blacks 15 kulan oo guul ah.
reference: Iskoorkii u dambeeyay waxa uu ahaa guul hal-dhibicley ah, 21 ilaa 20, kaas oo gebo gebaynaya guusha ciyaarta All Blacks.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
hypothesis: Springboks waxay ku dhamaatay shan kulan oo khasaare ah.
reference: Sprinbook miyaa, waxay ku dhamaatay fashilan shan ciyaarood ah.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
hypothesis: Waxay ahayd kulankii ugu dambeeyay ee All Blacks, kuwaas oo labadii toddobaad ka hor ku guuleystay koobka.
reference: Wuxu ahaa kulankii u dambeeyay ee loogu talo galay Dhammaan Madawga, kuwaas oo abaal marin ku guulaystay laba todobaad ka hor.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
hypothesis: Ciyaarta ugu dambeysa ee taxanaha ayaa ka dhici doonta Ellis Park ee Johannesburg usbuuca soo socda, marka Springboks ay la ciyaaraan Australia.
reference: Cayaarta fiinalka waxa ay ka dhici doonta Ellis Park ee Johannesburg isbuuca xiga marka Springboks ay Australia ku cayaaran.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
hypothesis: Dhulgariir dhexdhexaad ah ayaa ku dhuftay galbeedka Montana saacadii 10:08 galabnimadii Isniinta.
reference: Dhulgariir dhexdhexaad ah ayaa ka qarxay galbeedka montana 10:08 galin danbe isniintii.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
hypothesis: Ma jiro warbixin degdeg ah oo ku saabsan khasaaraha ka soo gaaray Hay'adda Geological Survey ee Mareykanka (USGS) iyo Xarunta Macluumaadka Dhulgariirka Qaranka.
reference: Wax xog bixin degdeg ah ee dhibaata ma aysan helin Sahanka Cilmiga dhulka ee Mareykanka (USGS) iyo Xarunta Xogta Dhul Gariir ee Qaranka.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
hypothesis: Dhulgariirku wuxuu ka dhacay qiyaastii 20 km waqooyi-bari Dillon, iyo qiyaastii 65 km koonfurta Butte.
reference: Dhulka gariirka waxa u xudun ahayd meel waqooyi-bari Dillon u jirta ilaa 20 km ( 15 mayl) ilaa 65 km (40 mayl) na Koonfur ka xigta Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
hypothesis: Xanuunka shimbiraha ee H5N1 ayaa lagu xaqiijiyay inuu ku dhacay duq duurjoog ah oo dhintay, oo la helay Isniintii, oo ku taal dooxada ku dhow Lyon ee bariga Faransiiska.
reference: Saamaynta hargabka shirbirahu ku leeyahay bini adamka, H5N1, Ayaa la xaqiijiyay inuu ku dhacay duurjoog dhimatay, tasoo laga helay isniintii,maarshlaan oo u dhaw lyon oo ku taal bariga Faransiiska.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
hypothesis: Faransiiska ayaa ah waddanka toddobaad ee Midowga Yurub ee ku dhaca fayraska, kadib Austria, Jarmalka, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Giriigga iyo Talyaaniga.
reference: Faransiiska waa waddanki toddobaad ee ka mid ah Midowga Yurub ee uu silciyo fayraskan; Waxaa ka horeeyay Ostiriya,  Jarmalka, Islofeniya, Bulgariya, Giriirga iyo Talyaaniga.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
hypothesis: Kiisaska laga shakisan yahay ee H5N1 ee Croatia iyo Denmark weli lama xaqiijin.
reference: Kiisas H5N1 looga shakisan yahay Kuraweeshiya iyo Dheemaak ayaan wali xaqiijin.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
hypothesis: Chambers wuxuu dacwad u taagay Ilaahay "dhimashada baahsan, burburinta iyo argagaxinta malaayiin iyo malaayiin qof oo dhulka deggan".
reference: Xafiiska gaarka ah ee qaadiga ayaa talaabo kaga qaaday "dhimashada korodhay,burburinta iyo argagixisonimada malaayiin iyo malaayiin kunool dhulka guudkiisa."

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
hypothesis: Chambers, oo ah qof aan aqoonta lahayn, wuxuu ku doodayaa in dacwaddiisa ay tahay mid "xishood la'aan ah" iyo "qof kastaa uu dacwad u taagi karo qof kasta".
reference: Jambars, agnostig, waxay ku doodeen in ku haboonaanta sharci “farayfoloos" iyo "in qof kastaa beedi karo qof kastaa."

source: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
hypothesis: Sheekada lagu soo bandhigay opera Faransiiska, oo uu qoray Camille Saint-Saens, waxay ku saabsan tahay farshaxan "oo noloshiisu ay ku xiran tahay jacaylka daroogada iyo Japan".
reference: Sheegakada ay kusoo bandhigeen operaha faransiiska, camille saind-Saens, ayaa ah farshaxanimo "kuwaasi oo ay noloshoda xukunto jacaylka ay u qabaan daroogada iyo jabaan."

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
hypothesis: Natiijo ahaan, bandhigayaashu waxay saxaafadda ku sigaarariyaan marijuana, tiyaatarka laftiisa ayaa ku dhiirigelinaya dhagaystayaasha inay ku biiraan.
reference: Sidaas daraaded, kuwa tiyaatarka saaran waxa ay wada cabayaan darogada cannabis, tiyaatarka laftirkiisana waxa uu ku dhiiri galinaya kasoo qeyb galayaasha in ay kuso biiran cabida.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
hypothesis: Guddoomiyaha hore ee Golaha Shacabka Newt Gingrich, Guddoomiyaha Texas Rick Perry, iyo Xildhibaanada Congress-ka Michele Bachmann waxay ku dhamaadeen kaalinta afraad, shanaad, iyo lixaad, siday u kala horreeyaan.
reference: Af hayeenka hore barlamaanka Newt Gingrich, gafanaha Texas Rick Perry, iyoxubinta barlamaanka Michele Bachmann ayaa ku dhamaystiray kaalinta afaraad, shanaad, iyo lixaad.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
hypothesis: Ka dib markii natiijooyinka ay soo baxeen, Gingrich wuxuu ammaanay Santorum, laakiin wuxuu si adag ula hadlay Romney, oo magaciisa lagu soo bandhigay xayeysiisyo ololeed oo xun oo lagu soo bandhigay Iowa ka dhanka ah Gingrich.
reference: Ka dib markay natiijooyinka soo galeen, Gingrich ayaa u hambalyaayay Santorum lakin hadal adag ku dhahay Romney, oo isaga magaciisa xayaysiino olole xun logu samayay Iowa oo lola jeeday Gingrich.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
hypothesis: Perry wuxuu sheegay in uu "dib ugu laaban doono Texas si uu u qiimeeyo natiijooyinka caucus-ka caawa, si loo go'aamiyo haddii ay jirto waddo horumarineed oo aniga igu jirta tartankan", laakiin markii dambe wuxuu sheegay in uu sii joogi doono tartanka isla markaana uu ku tartami doono doorashada koowaad ee South Carolina Janaayo 21.
reference: Perry waxa uu sheegay inuu “ ku noqon lahaa Texas si uu u eego natiijada isreebreeka ee caawa, una go’aansado bal inay dariiq u sii furan yahay”, balse dib uu ka sheegay inuu tartanka ku sii jirayo oo uu tartami doono tartanka koobaad ee South Carolina ka dhici doona Janaayo 21.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
hypothesis: Bachmann, oo ku guuleysatay codbixinta Ames Straw Poll bishii Agoosto, ayaa go'aansatay inay soo afjarto ololaheeda.
reference: Bachmann, taasoo ku guuleysatay Doorashadii Ames Straw ee Ogos, waxay  go’aansatay inay dhameyso ololaha.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
hypothesis: Sawirka ayaa loo geeyay Xarunta Caafimaadka ee Ronald Reagan UCLA, halkaas oo uu ugu dambeyntii ku dhintay.
reference: Sawir Qaadaha Waxaa loo Qaaday Xarunta Caaafimaadka Ronald Reagan ee UCLA, halkaas oo uu Markii dambe ku dhintay.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
hypothesis: Waxaa la sheegay in uu da'diisu ahayd 20 sano. Qoraal uu soo saaray Bieber wuxuu yidhi "inkastoo aanan goob joog ahayn ama aan si toos ah ugu lug laheyn shilkan naxdinta leh, fekerkeyga iyo salaaddaydu waxay la socdaan qoyska dhibbanaha".
reference: Sida la sheegay wuxu ku jiray 20yadiisii. Warbixin ayuu Bieber ku sheegay "in kastoo aan joogin oo aanan si toos ahna faraba ugula jirin shilkan daran, waxaan tacsi iyo duco u dirayaa qoyska dulmanaha."

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
hypothesis: Websaydhka wararka madadaalada ee TMZ wuxuu fahmay in sawir qaadaha uu baabuurkiisa joojiyay dhinaca kale ee Sepulveda Boulevard wuxuuna isku dayay inuu sawirro ka qaado joogsiga booliska ka hor inta uusan u gudbin wadada oo uu sii wado, taas oo sababtay in sarkaalka booliiska ee California Highway Patrol uu wado joogsiga taraafikada si uu ugu amro inuu mar kale u gudbo, laba jeer.
reference: Boggaga internetka wararka madadaalada TMZ ayaa fahansan in sawiraaga uu baaburkiisa ku joojiyay dhanka kale ee Sepulveda Boulevard ka dib na isu dayay inuu sawiro isbaarada booliska intuu wadada goynin oo na sii socdo, taasi oo ku keentay in booliska California Highway Patrol oo isbaaraha joogay inuu ku amro inuu ku soo laabto isbaaraha, laba jeer.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
hypothesis: Sida laga soo xigtay booliiska, darawalka gaariga ku dhuftay sawir qaadaha ayaa laga yaabaa inuusan eedeyn dambi ah la kulmi doonin.
reference: Marka loo eego bilayska, dirawalka baabuurka jiidhay sawir qaadahu waxaa suurta gal ah inaanu wajahin xukun danbiyeed.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
hypothesis: Iyada oo maalin kasta la heli karo kaliya siddeed iyo toban medal, dalal badan ayaa ku guuldareystay inay ku guuleystaan kaalinta abaalmarinta.
reference: Iyadoo keliya sideed iyo toban billadood yaalliin maalintii, waddamo badan ayaa ku fashilmay inay sameeyaan billada fagaare ka hadalka.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
hypothesis: Waxaa ka mid ah Nederland, iyada oo Anna Jochemsen ay ku dhamaatay kaalinta sagaalaad fasalka dumarka ee Super-G shalay, iyo Finland iyada oo Katja Saarinen ay ku dhamaatay kaalinta 10-aad isla tartanka.
reference: Waxaa ka mida, Netherlands, Anna Jochemsen oo ku dhameysatay numberka sagaalad ee tartanka kaluumeysiga Super-G shalay, iyo Finland, Katja Saarinen kuna dhameysatay numberka tobanaad isla tartankaa.

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
hypothesis: Mitchell Gourley oo ka soo jeeda Australia ayaa kaalinta kow iyo tobnaad ka soo baxay tartanka Super-G ee ragga. Tartanka Czech Oldrich Jelinek ayaa kaalinta lix iyo tobnaad ka soo baxay tartanka Super-G ee ragga.
reference: Ciyaar yahanka reer Australia ee Mitchell Gourley wuxuu ku gabababeyey kow iyo tobban taagnana ee ciyaarta raga Super-G. Tartamayasha Czech Oldrich Jelinek wuxu ku dhameyey kow iyo tobban fadhi ciyaarta raga ee Super-G,

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
hypothesis: Arly Velasquez oo ka socday Mexico ayaa kaalinta shan iyo tobnaad ku guuleystay ciyaarta Super-G ee ragga. Adam Hall oo ka socday New Zealand ayaa kaalinta sagaalaad ku guuleystay ciyaarta Super-G ee ragga.
reference: Arly Velasquez oo ka soo jeeda Mexico wuxuu ku gabababeeyey shan iyo toban taagnana ee ciyaarta ragga Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall wuxu ku dhameeyey sagaal iyo toban fadhi ciyaarta raga ee Super-G.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
hypothesis: Ragga dadka indhaha la'aanta ah ee reer Poland Maciej Krezel iyo hage Anna Ogarzynska waxay ku dhamaadeen kaalinta 13-aad Super-G. Jong Seork Park ee Kuuriyada Koonfureed waxay ku dhamaadeen kaalinta 24-aad Super-G ragga fadhiya.
reference: Ragga aragga naafada ka ah ee Poland ee skier Maciej Krezel iyo hagaha Anna Ogarzynska waxay ku dhamaysteen booska saddex iyo tobnaad ee tartarka Baraf ku sibqidda (Super-G).  Jong Seork Park ee Kuuriyana wuxuu ku dhamaystay booska labaatan iyo afaraad ee fadhi baraf ku subqidda (sitting Super-G) ee ragga.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
hypothesis: Dacwada ayaa sheegtay in qashinka xerada Qaramada Midoobay aan si sax ah loo nadiifin, taasoo keentay in bakteeriyada ay galaan wabiga Artibonite, oo ah mid ka mid ah kuwa ugu weyn dalka Haiti.
reference: Sida dacwadu sheegtay, qashinka laga keenay xerada QM si sax ah looma basrin, taasbaana keentay in bakteeriyo gasho gacamada webiga Artibonite, mid ka mid ah webiyada ugu wayn Haiti.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
hypothesis: Machadka Caddaaladda iyo Dimuqraadiyadda ee Haiti ayaa tixraacay daraasado madax banaan oo muujinaya in kooxda nabadsugida ee UN ee Nepalese ay si aan ogayn u keeneen cudurka Haiti.
reference: Machadka Caddaaladda iyo Dimuquraadiyada ee Haiti waxa u tixraacay cilmi baadhisyo madax bannaan oo soo jeedinaya in Ciidamada Nabad Ammaanka ee QM ay iyagoom ka war hayn keeneen cudurka.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
hypothesis: Danielle Lantagne oo ah khabiir ka tirsan Qaramada Midoobay oo ku takhasusay cudurka ayaa sheegtay in cudurka uu u badan yahay inuu sababay ciidamada nabad ilaalinta.
reference: Danielle Lagtagne, oo khabiir ku ah cudurka una shaqeya UN ka, ayaa sheegay in dilaacista cudurka ay suurto galtahay inay keeneen nabad sugeyaashu.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
hypothesis: Bukaanka ayaa ku sugnaa dalka Nigeria, halkaas oo ay ka dhaceen qaar ka mid ah kiisaska fayraska Ebola.
reference: Bukaanka wuxuu joogey Nigeria, taas xiliga laga heley xanuunka fayriska Ebola oo ku dhacay.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
hypothesis: Isbitaalka ayaa raacay nidaamka xakamaynta cudurka, oo ay ku jiraan kala saarista bukaanka dadka kale si looga hortago cudurka dadka kale.
reference: Isbitaalku wuxuu raacay sharciga lagu maamulo infakshanka, iyadoo ay ku jirto kala saarida bukaanada kuwa kale lagaga hor tagayo suurta galnimada infakshanka kale.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
hypothesis: Waxay u egtahay telefishanka telefishanka, xakamaynta waxay isticmaashaa laba dareemayaal oo ku yaal telefishanka isticmaalaha si ay u go'aamiyaan booskiisa meel saddex dhinac ah.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
hypothesis: Qiyaastii 3 daqiiqo ka dib markii la bilaabay, kamarad ku jirta diyaaradda ayaa muujisay in qaybo badan oo foornada ka saarista ah ay ka baxaan taangiga shidaalka.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
hypothesis: Shan daqiiqo ka dib, dabayl ayaa bilaabmaya inuu soo galo, daqiiqad kadib, dabaylku wuxuu gaaraa 70km/h... ka dibna roobku wuxuu yimaadaa, laakiin aad buu u xoog badan yahay oo aad u weyn in uu maqaarkaaga u garaaco sida irbad, ka dibna roobka ayaa cirka ka soo dhacay, dadku waxay dareemaan baqdin iyo qaylo, oo midba midka kale ayuu ku boodayaa.

source: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.
hypothesis: Qaar ka mid ah maxaabiista ayaa la badbaadiyay, ugu yaraan lix ayaa la xaqiijiyay inay dhinteen ilaa hadda.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."

reference: Danius alisema, "Sasa hivi hatufanyi chochote. Nimepiga simu na kutuma barua pepe kwa mshirika wake wa karibu na kupata majibu ya kirafiki sana. Kwa sasa, hakika hiyo imetosha."

source: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.

reference: Baadaye 2017, Siminoff alionekana katika chaneli ya ununuzi ya televisheni QVC.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
