source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
hypothesis: Ingawa vaccine moja ya majaribio inaonekana kuwa inawezekana kupunguza ugonjwa wa Ebola, hadi sasa, hakuna madawa ya kulevya yamekuwa wazi kuonyesha sahihi kwa matibabu ya ugonjwa wa sasa.
reference: Huku chanjo moja ya majaribio ikionekana kupunguza vifo kutokana na Ebola, hadi kufikia sasa, hakuna dawa zimeonyeshwa dhahiri kufaa kutibu maambukizo yaliyoko.

source: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
hypothesis: Mkusanyiko mmoja wa antibody, ZMapp, awali ilionyesha ahadi katika eneo hilo, lakini utafiti rasmi ilionyesha kuwa alikuwa na faida kidogo kuliko ilivyotarajiwa katika kuzuia kifo.
reference: Kinywaji kimoja cha kingamwili, ZMapp, hapo awali kilionyesha ahadi uwanjani, lakini tafiti rasmi zilionyesha kilikuwa na faida kidogo kuliko ilivyotafutwa katika kuzuia kifo.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
hypothesis: Katika utafiti wa PALM, ZMapp ilitumika kama uendeshaji, ambayo inamaanisha wanasayansi walitumia kama msingi na kulinganisha matibabu matatu mengine.
reference: Katika jaribio la PALM, Zmapp ilitumika kama kidhibiti, kumaanisha wanasayansi waliitumia kama msingi na kulinganisha matibabu mengine matatu nayo.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics inaunga mkono barua ya Tume ya Olimpiki ya Marekani na kukubali mahitaji kamili ya familia ya Olimpiki ya kukuza mazingira salama kwa wachezaji wetu wote.
reference: USA Gymnastics hukubali barua ya Kamati ya Olimpiki ya Marekani na hukubali hitaji kuu la familia ya Olimpiki la kukuza mazingira salama kwa wanariadha wetu wote.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
hypothesis: Sisi kukubaliana na taarifa ya USOC kwamba maslahi ya wanariadha wetu na klabu, na michezo yao, inaweza kutumika vizuri kwa kuendesha mbele na mabadiliko ya maana ndani ya shirika letu, badala ya uhakika.
reference: Tunakubaliana na taarifa ya USOC kwamba masilahi ya wanariadha na vilabu vyetu, na spoti yao, huenda yakashughulikiwa vyema kwa kusonga mbele na mabadiliko ya maana ndani ya shirika letu, badala ya kughairi vyeti.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
hypothesis: US Gymnastics inasaidia utafiti wa kujitegemea ambayo inaweza kuonyesha jinsi uharibifu wa kipengele iliyoandikwa kwa urahisi na waathirika wa Larry Nassar inaweza kuwa haikujulikana kwa muda mrefu na inachukua mabadiliko yoyote muhimu na sahihi.
reference: USA Gymnastics inaunga mkono uchunguzi huru ambao labda utafafanua jinsi unyanyasaji wa kiwango kama vile ulivyoelezewa kwa ujasiri sana na manusura wa Larry Nassar ungekosa kugunduliwa kwa muda mrefu hivyo na inakumbatia mabadiliko muhimu na ya kufaa.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
hypothesis: US Gymnastics na USOC ni lengo la moja - kufanya michezo ya gimnastics, na wengine, salama kwa ajili ya wanariadha kufuata ndoto zao katika mazingira salama, nzuri na yenye nguvu.
reference: USA Gymnastics na USOC zina lengo moja — kuifanya spoti ya sarakasi, na nyingine, salama iwezekanavyo ili wanariadha wafuate ndoto zao katika mazingira salama, chanya na ya kuwezesha.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
hypothesis: Zaidi ya miaka ya 1960, Brzezinski alifanya kazi kwa John F. Kennedy kama mtaalam wake na baadaye kwa serikali ya Lyndon B. Johnson.
reference: Katika miaka yote ya 1960, Brzezinski alimfanyia kazi John F. Kennedy kama mshauri wake na pia utawala wa Lyndon B. Johnson.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
hypothesis: Katika uchaguzi wa 1976 aliwashauri Carter juu ya sera ya nje, kisha alifanya kazi kama Mtaalam wa Usalama wa Taifa (NSA) kutoka 1977 hadi 1981, baada ya Henry Kissinger.
reference: Wakati wa uteuzi wa 1976, alimshauri Carter kuhusu sera ya nje, kisha akafanya kazi kama Mshauri wa Usalama wa Kitaifa (NSA) kutoka 1977 hadi 1981, na alichukua hatamu kutoka kwa Henry Kissinger.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
hypothesis: Kama NSA, aliwasaidia Carter katika usimamizi wa kidiplomasia wa masuala ya ulimwengu, kama vile Mkataba wa Camp David, 1978; kuimarisha uhusiano wa Marekani-China alikumbusha mwisho wa miaka ya 1970; Revolution ya Iran, ambayo ilisababisha mgogoro wa wahamiaji wa Iran, 1979; na uvumbuzi wa Soviet katika Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Kama NSA, alimsaidia Carter katika kushughulikia masuala ya dunia kidiplomasia, kama vile Mikataba ya Kambi David, 1978; kurekebisha uhusiano wa Marekani na China mwishoni mwa miaka ya 1970; Mapinduzi ya Irani, ambayo yalipelekea janga la mateka la Irani, 1979; na shambulio la Kisovyeti katika Afganistani, 1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
hypothesis: Filamu hiyo, ambayo ina Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone, ilipokea tuzo katika makundi yote makubwa.
reference: Sinema, iliyoshirikisha Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone ilipata uteuzi katika kategoria zote kuu.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
hypothesis: Gosling na Stone walipokea tuzo kwa mchezaji bora na mchezaji bora.
reference: Gosling na Stone walipokea uteuzi wa Muigizaji na Mwigizaji wa kike Bora mtawalia.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
hypothesis: Taarifa hiyo ilitolewa baada ya Trump kuwa na mazungumzo ya simu na Rais wa Uturuki Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: Tangazo lilifanywa baada ya Trump kuwa na mazungumzo ya simu na Rais wa Uturuki Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
hypothesis: Uturuki pia itachukua uhifadhi wa wapiganaji wa ISIS ambao, kwa mujibu wa taarifa hiyo, mataifa ya Ulaya wamekataa kurejea.
reference: Uturuki ilikua yachukua ulinzi wa wapiganaji wa ISIS waliotekwa ambao, tangazo lilisema kuwa, nchi za Ulaya zilikataa kurudi.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
hypothesis: Hii si tu kuthibitisha kwamba angalau baadhi ya dinosaurs walikuwa na mti, nadharia tayari imeenea, lakini hutoa maelezo ya nyuklia kwa ujumla siwezi, kama vile rangi na usimamizi wa tatu.
reference: Hii haithibitishi tu kuwa baadhi ya dinosaria walikuwa na manyoya, nadharia ambayo tayari imezagaa, bali pia inatoa maelezo ambayo kijumla visukuku haviwezi, kama vile rangi na mpangilio wa pande-tatu.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
hypothesis: Wanasayansi wanasema mti wa wanyama huu ulikuwa mti wa chestnut juu na chini ya mti wa pale au karotenoid.
reference: . Wanasayansi wanasema manyoya ya mnyama huyu yalikuwa ya rangi ya kahawia-nyekundu upande wa juu na hafifu au rangi ya karotini upande wa chini.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
hypothesis: Utafiti huo pia hutoa ufahamu juu ya maendeleo ya wanyama katika mbegu.
reference: Utambuzi huo pia unatoa ufahamu wa mageuko ya manyoya katika ndege.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
hypothesis: Kwa sababu rangi ya dinosauri hawana rangi iliyopatikana vizuri, inayojulikana kama rangi, lakini ina vipengele vingine vya rangi - barbs na barbules - watafiti walisema rangi ilikuwa uwezekano wa maendeleo ya baadaye ambayo ni vipengele vingine.
reference: Kwa sababu manyoya ya dinosau hayana chimbuko uliyostawishwa vizuri, inayoitwa rachi, lakini huwa na sifa zingine za manyoya — barbu na barbule — watafiti waligundua rachi labda ni maendeleo ya baadaye ya uvumbuzi kuliko sifa hizi nyingine.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Watafiti walisema kwamba, ingawa hii ni nyama ya dinosaur muda, sampuli inaonyesha mti wa watu wazima na sio nyama ya chini.
reference: Watafiti walipendekeza kwamba, hata kama huu ni mkia wa dinosau mdogo, sampuli hiyo inaonyesha manyoya ya ukubwa na si manyoya ya kifaranga mdogo.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
hypothesis: Bomb ya gari iliyotangulia katika kituo cha polisi huko Gaziantep, Uturuki jana asubuhi waliua polisi wawili na kujeruhi watu zaidi ya watu 20.
reference: Bomu la gari lililolipuliwa katika hedikota ya polisi katika Gaziantep, Uturuki jana asubuhi liliwaua maafisa wawili wa polisi na kuwajeruhi watu wengine zaidi ya ishirini.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
hypothesis: Wao walijua kwamba jua lilifanya kazi kwa kanuni za msingi kama vile nyota nyingine: shughuli ya nyota zote katika mfumo ilipatikana kuwa iliyoandaliwa na mwanga wao, rotation yao, na hakuna kitu kingine.
reference: Walipata kuwa Jua lilifanya kazi kwa kanuni msingi sawa na za nyota nyingine: Shuguli za nyota zote kwenye mfumo zilipatikana kuendeshwa na mng'ao wao, mzunguko wao na hakuna jingine.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
hypothesis: Ukumbusho na rotation hutumiwa pamoja ili kuamua idadi ya Rossby ya nyota, ambayo inahusiana na mzunguko wa plasma.
reference: Mng'ao na mzunguko hutumika pamoja ili kuamua namba ya Rossby ya nyota, ambayo inahusiana na mtiririko wa utegili.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
hypothesis: Katika safari yake, Iwasaki alikuja katika matatizo mengi.
reference: Wakati wa safari yake, Iwasaki alikumbwa na matata mara nyingi.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
hypothesis: Kiwango cha 802.11n hufanya kazi kwa mara ya 2.4Ghz na 5.0Ghz.
reference: Kiwango cha 802.11n hufanya kazi katika masafa ya gigahezi 2.4 na gigahezi 5.0.

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
hypothesis: Hii itawezesha kuwa nyuma ya kuunganishwa na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, kwa masharti kwamba kituo cha msingi ina radios mbili.
reference: Hii itaiwezesha kutangamana kwa nyuma na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, mradi tu kituo cha ardhini kina redio mbili.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
hypothesis: kasi ya 802.11n ni haraka zaidi kuliko ile ya wafuasi wake na kasi ya kimsingi ya 600Mbit/s.
reference: Kasi za 802.11n ni haraka sana kuliko zile za watangulizi wake zikiwa upeo wa kinadharia wa kiwango cha juu cha 600Mbit/s.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
hypothesis: Duvall, ambaye ni ndoa na watoto wawili, hakuacha hisia kubwa juu ya Miller, ambaye hadithi hiyo ilikuwa inayohusiana.
reference: Duvall, ambaye ameolewa na ana watoto waliokomaa, hakuacha hisia kubwa kwa Miller, ambayehadithi ilimhusu.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
hypothesis: Baada ya kuomba maoni, Miller alisema, "Mike anazungumzia mengi wakati wa kusikiliza... mimi nilikuwa tayari kwa hivyo mimi si kweli kusikia kile anasema."
reference: Alipoambiwa atoe maoni, Miller alisema, "Mike huongea sana wakati wa kesi…nilikuwa najitayarisha kwa hivyo sikuwa ninasikia kwa kweli alichokuwa akisema."

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
hypothesis: "Tunahitaji kupunguza uzalishaji wa CO2 kwa moja ya GDP kwa kiasi kikubwa hadi 2020 kutoka ngazi ya 2005," Hu alisema.
reference: "Tutajaribu kupunguza utoaji wa dayoksidi ya kaboni kwa kila kipimo cha GDP kwa kiwango muhimu kufikia 2020 kutoka kiwango cha 2005", Hu alisema.

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
hypothesis: Shirika la Utafiti wa Iraq liliwasilisha ripoti yake leo saa 12.00 GMT.
reference: Kikundi cha Wasomi wa Iraq kiliwasilisha ripoti yao saa 12 GMT leo.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
hypothesis: Hakuna mtu anayeweza kuhakikisha kwamba hatua yoyote katika Iraq wakati huu itakuwa kuacha vita vya kikatari, upungufu wa dhambi, au kuelekea chaos.
reference: Inatoa ilani kwamba hakuna yeyote anayeweza kutoa hakikisho kwamba mpango wowote wa hatua katika Iraki wakati huu utakomesha vita vya kimadhehebu, vurugu inayozidi, au mwelekeo kwenye machafuko.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
hypothesis: Senator ya sasa na First Lady ya Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ilitangaza kandida yake ya rais jana usiku huko La Plata, mji wa kilomita 50 (31 mil) mbali na Buenos Aires.
reference: Seneta wa sasa na Mke wa Rais wa Ajentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner alitangaza uwaniaji wake wa urais jana jioni katika La Plata, mji ulio kilomita 50 (maili 31) kutoka Buenos Aires.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
hypothesis: Ms. Kirchner alitangaza mipango yake ya kuendesha rais katika Theatre ya Argentina, mahali ambapo alitumia kuanza kampeni yake ya 2005 kwa Senate kama mwanachama wa delegation ya mkoa wa Buenos Aires.
reference: Bi. Kirchner alitangaza nia yake ya kuwania urais katika Ukumbi wa Ajentina, mahali pale pale alipotumia kuanzisha kampeni yake ya Seneti mnamo 2005 kama memba wa ujumbe wa wilaya ya Buenos Aires.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
hypothesis: Mabadiliko ilitokana na majadiliano juu ya gharama za upatikanaji na ujenzi katika Hurricane Katrina; ambayo baadhi ya wakimbizi wa kifedha wameitwa "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
reference: Mjadala ulianzishwa na mzozo juu ya kutumia zaidi kwa msaada na ujenzi upya katika Kimbunga Katrina; ambacho wahafidhina wa fedha wabebandika kwa ucheshi “Mpango wa Bushwa New Orleans.”

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
hypothesis: Zaidi ya watu milioni nne walikuja Roma kuwakaribisha maumbile.
reference: Watu zaidi ya milioni nne walienda Roma kuhudhuria mazishi.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
hypothesis: Katika miji mingine ya Italia na katika ulimwengu mwingine, hasa katika Poland, mipangilio sawa ilitengenezwa, ambayo ilitazama na idadi kubwa ya watu.
reference: Katika miji mingine mingi ya Italia na ulimwengu kwa ujumla, haswa katika Polandi, mipangilio sawa ilifanywa, ambayo ilionekana na idadi kubwa ya watu.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
hypothesis: Wanasayansi wamechunguza sera za zamani za FBI kwa kuzingatia rasilimali juu ya kesi ambazo ni rahisi kutatua, hasa matukio ya magari yaliyochaguliwa, kwa lengo la kuongeza kiwango cha mafanikio ya shirika hilo.
reference: Wanahistoria wameshutumu sera za zamani za FBI kwa kuangazia rasilimali kwenye kesi ambazo ni rahisi kutatua, hasa kesi za magari yaliyoibwa, kwa madhumuni ya kuongeza kiwango cha mafanikio cha wakala.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
hypothesis: Kongamano lilianza kutoa fedha kwa mapendekezo ya ujasiri mwaka 2005 na ilisema FBI inapaswa kuwapa watumiaji kumi kwa ajili ya pornography ya watu wazima.
reference: Bunge lilianza kufadhili kikundi chenye nia chafu katika mwaka wa kifedha wa 2005 na kuaini kuwa FBI lazima itoe makachero kumi kwa ponografia ya watu wazima.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
hypothesis: Robin Uthappa alifanya maonyesho ya juu ya maonyesho, 70 waliondoka kwa maonyesho ya 41 tu kwa kuathiri maonyesho ya 11 na maonyesho ya 2.
reference: Robin Uthappa alifanya alama za juu za fursa, pointi 70 katika mipira 41 kwa kufikia nne 11 na sita 2.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
hypothesis: Waendeshaji wa kati, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, walifanya vizuri na wamefanya ushirikiano wa maelfu.
reference: Wachezaji wa kati wa kriketi, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, walicheza vizuri na kushirikiana katika masafa mia moja.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
hypothesis: Rais wa Marekani George W. Bush alikuja Singapore asubuhi 16 Novemba, kuanza safari ya wiki ya Asia.
reference: Rais wa Marekani George W. Bush alifika Singapori asubuhi ya Novemba 16, hivyo kuanza ziara ya Asia ya wiki moja.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
hypothesis: Alikutana na Makamu wa Waziri Mkuu wa Singapore, Wong Kan Seng, na kujadili masuala ya biashara na ugaidi na Waziri Mkuu wa Singapore, Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: Alisalimiwa na Naibu Waziri Mkuu wa Singapori Wong Kan Seng na wakajadili masuala ya biashara na ughaidi na Waziri Mkuu wa Singapori Lee Hsien Loong.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
hypothesis: Waziri Mkuu Stephen Harper amekubali kutuma 'Clean Air Act' ya serikali kwa Kamati ya kila chama kwa ajili ya uchunguzi, kabla ya kusoma mara ya pili, baada ya mkutano wa dakika 25 wa Jumatatu na rais wa NDP Jack Layton katika PMO.
reference: Waziri Mkuu Stephen Harper amekubali kutuma ‘Mkataba wa Hewa Safi’ wa serikali kwa kamati ya vyama vyote kwa ukaguzi, kabla ya kusomwa kwake kwa mara ya pili, baada ya mkutano wa Jumanne wa dakika 25 na kiongozi wa NDP Jack Layton kwenye PMO.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
hypothesis: Layton aliomba mabadiliko ya bajeti ya mazingira ya wakimbizi wakati wa mkutano na Waziri Mkuu, kuomba "kuandika tena na kamili" ya bajeti ya mazingira ya chama cha wakimbizi.
reference: Layton alikuwa ameomba mabadiliko ya mswada wa kimazingira wa wahafidhina wakati wa mkutano na PM, akiomba “uandishi upya wa undani na mkamilifu” wa mswada wa kimazingira wa chama cha Wahafidhina.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
hypothesis: Rais wa Marekani, George W. Bush, amepokea taarifa hiyo.
reference: Rais wa marekani George W. Bush alikaribisha tangazo hilo.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
hypothesis: Msemaji wa Bush Gordon Johndroe alielezea ahadi ya Korea Kaskazini "kwa hatua kubwa kwa lengo la kufikia ukosefu wa nyuklia wa peninsula ya Korea."
reference: Msemaji wa Bush Gordon Johndroe alitaja ahadi ya Korea Kaskazini kama “hatua kuu kuelekea lengo la kufikia uondoaji wa kuaminika wa silaha za kinyuklia katika rasi ya Kikorea.”

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
hypothesis: Nishati huchukuliwa juu ya levee katika sehemu ya juu ya mita 100.
reference: Maji yanamwagika juu ya tuta katika sehemu ya futi 100 upana.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
hypothesis: "Hii [Wales] ana uongo kwa sisi tangu mwanzo. kwanza, kwa kufanya kama hii ilikuwa kwa sababu ya kisheria. pili, kwa kutafakari yeye alikuwa kusikiliza sisi, hadi uharibifu wake."
reference: "Yeye [Wales] kimsingi alindanganya tangu mwanzo. Kwanza kwa kufanya kama hii ni kwa sababu za kisheria. Pili, kwa kujifanya alikuwa anatusikiliza, hadi saana yake ifutwe."

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
hypothesis: Matokeo ya timu ambayo alikuwa anataka itakuwa kutokana na nguvu za kuongezeka kati ya mafuta ya dhahabu ya galaksi na mafuta ya dhahabu ya njia ya milki.
reference: Athari ambayo timu ilikuwa ikitafuta ingesababishwa na nguvu za mawimbi baina ya dutu nyeusi za galaksia na dutu nyeusi za Kilimia.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
hypothesis: Sheria hii inasema kwamba mafuta ya dhahabu karibu na galaksi ni karibu na galaksi katika aina ya halo, na ni iliyoundwa na viungo vingi vya kidogo.
reference: Nadharia hii inasema kuwa dutu nyingi yenye giza inayozingira galaksi iko karibu na galaksi kwa aina ya mwangaza, na inatengenezwa kwa chembechembe nyingi ndogo.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
hypothesis: Ripoti za televisheni zinaonyesha sigara ya kijani kilichotokea kutoka kwa kilimo.
reference: Ripoti kwenye televisheni zinaonyesha moshi mweupe unaotoka kwenye mmea huo.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
hypothesis: Katika mahojiano, alisema tofauti mpya ilikuwa "kila wasiwasi na wasiwasi kwa sababu ya kiwango cha juu cha mauti."
reference: Katika mahojiano, alisema aina mpya ilikuwa "ya kusumbua sana na ya kutisha kwa sababu ya kiwango cha juu cha kufariki."

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
hypothesis: Baadhi ya wagonjwa wanaweza kuwa wamekamatwa na hatari katika hospitali, Dr. Moll anajua, na angalau wawili walikuwa wafanyakazi wa afya hospitalini.
reference: Huenda baadhi ya wagonjwa waliambukizwa mdudu huyo hospitalini, kama anavyofikiria Dkt. Moll, na angalau wawili walikuwa wafanyakazi hospitalini.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
hypothesis: Katika kipindi cha mwaka mmoja, mtu infected anaweza kuvutia 10 hadi 15 mawasiliano ya karibu.
reference: Katika mwaka mmoja, mtu aliyeambukizwa huenda akaambukiza wato 10-15 wa karibu.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
hypothesis: Hata hivyo, asilimia ya XDR-TB katika kundi lolote la watu wenye tuberculosis bado inaonekana kuwa chini; 6,000 kutoka kwa jumla ya watu 330,000 wamejitokeza wakati wowote katika Afrika Kusini.
reference: Hata hivyo, asilimia ya XDR-TB katika kikundi kizima cha watu wenye kifua kikuu bado inaonekana kuwa chini, watu 6,000 kati ya 330,000 walioambukizwa kwa wakati wowote maalumu katika Afrika Kusini.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
hypothesis: Satellite hizo, ambavyo wawili walikuwa na uzito wa zaidi ya kilo 1,000, na kusafiri kwa umbali wa kilomita 17,500 kwa saa, ziliathiri kilomita 491 juu ya ardhi.
reference: Setilaiti, ambazo zote mbili zilikuwa na uzani wa zaidi ya pauni 1,000, na kusafiri kwa takribani maili 17,500 kwa saa, ziligongana maili 491 juu ya Dunia.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
hypothesis: Wanasayansi wanasema maambukizi yaliyoathiriwa na mashambulizi hayo yalikuwa makubwa.
reference: Wanasayansi wanasema mlipuko uliosababishwa na mgongano huo ulikuwa mkubwa.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
hypothesis: Matokeo ya uchambuzi utakuwa kuwasilishwa kwenye tovuti ya umma.
reference: Matokeo ya uchambuzi wa uchoraji yatatumwa kwenye tovuti ya umma.

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
hypothesis: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, alichukuliwa katika Blue Ash, Ohio, mji mkuu wa karibu wa kilomita 15 kaskazini ya Cincinnati, yaliyopatikana juu ya ardhi pamoja na barabara, katika T-shirt na mavazi ya chini katika hali ya kuonekana sana ya matibabu.
reference: Dk. Malar Balasubramanian, mwenye umri wa miaka 29, alipatikana katika Blue Ash, Ohio, kitongoji kilichoko takriban maili 15 kaskazini mwa Cincinnati akiwa amelala chini kando ya barabara akiwa amevalia tishati na nguo za ndani katika hali iliyoonekana kuwa ya matumizi ya dawa nyingi.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
hypothesis: Hapa, walipata mwili wa Saroja Balasubramanian, wa miaka 53, iliyopatikana na mti wa damu.
reference: Hapo, walipata mwili wa Saroja Balasubramanian, aliyekuwa na umri wa miaka 53, umefunikwa kwa blanketi zilizokuwa na madoa ya damu.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
hypothesis: Polisi wamesema kuwa mwili ulikuwa ndani ya siku moja.
reference: Polisi walisema kwamba ilionekana kama mwili huo ulikuwa hapo kwa takriban siku moja.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
hypothesis: Mchakato wa kwanza wa ugonjwa huu ulifichuliwa mwishoni mwa Julai.
reference: Kesi za kwanza za ugonjwa huo msimu huu ziliripotiwa mwishoni mwa Julai.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
hypothesis: Uharibifu huo umesababisha serikali ya India kutimiza hatua kama vile kupanua wanyama katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa sana, kupanua maelfu ya rangi ya nyama na kupanua pesticides.
reference: Mkurupuko huo umechochea serikali ya India kuchukua hatua kama kuwatuma wawinda nguruwe katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa sana, na kusambaza maelfu ya mapazia ya mbu na kunyunyiza dawa za kuua wadudu.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
hypothesis: Mwaka 1956, Słania alikwenda Sweden, ambapo miaka mitatu baadaye alianza kufanya kazi kwa Ofisi ya Post ya Sweden na kuwa mwakilishi wao mkuu.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
hypothesis: Kazi yake ni ya ubora na maelezo ya kutambuliwa kwamba yeye ni moja ya baadhi ya "jina la nyumbani" kati ya filatelists.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
hypothesis: Baada ya barabara hiyo ilitengenezwa mwaka 1963, mafuriko ya msimu ambayo itakuwa kuenea sediment katika mto yamekamatwa.
reference: Baada ya bwawa kujengwa mwaka wa 1963, mafuriko ya msimu ambayo yangeenea kote yalisimamishwa.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
hypothesis: Hii sediment ilikuwa muhimu kwa ajili ya kuunda sandbars na masoko, ambayo ilitumika kama mahali pa ya hewa.
reference: Mashapo yalikuwa muhimu kwa kuunda mafungu ya mchanga na pwani, ambazo zilitumika kama makao ya wanyamapori.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
hypothesis: Kwa matokeo, aina mbili za samaki zilifungwa, na mawili nyingine zilifungwa hatari, ikiwa ni pamoja na humpback chub.
reference: Kama matokeo, spishi mbili za samaki zimetoweka, na nyingine mbili zimekuwa katika hatari, zikiwemo humpback chub.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
hypothesis: Ingawa kiwango cha maji itaongezeka tu baada ya miguu kadhaa baada ya mafuriko, maafisa wanatarajia itakuwa na kutosha kurejesha sandbar zilizoondolewa.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
hypothesis: Hakuna alama ya tsunami ilitolewa, na kulingana na shirika la geophysics la Jakarta, hakuna alama ya tsunami ilitolewa kwa sababu moto huo haikufanya mahitaji ya magharibi ya 6.5.
reference: Hakuna ilani ya tsunami iliyotolewa, na kulingana na uwakala wa jeofizikia wa Jakarta, hakuna ilani ya tsunami itakayotolewa kwani mtetemeko haukufikia ukubwa unaohitajika wa 6.5.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
hypothesis: Ingawa hakuna hatari ya tsunami, wakazi walianza kuanguka na kuanza kuondoka kwa biashara na nyumba zao.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
hypothesis: Matokeo ya mwisho ya uchaguzi wa rais na bunge wa Namibia imeonyesha kuwa rais wa mwisho, Hifikepunye Pohamba, imechaguliwa tena kwa kiasi kikubwa.
reference: Matokeo ya mwisho ya uchaguzi wa rais na wabunge wa Namibia yameonyesha kwamba rais aliye mamlakani, Hifikepunye Pohamba, amechaguliwa tena kwa kiasi kikubwa.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
hypothesis: Maandiko yao ya joto si ya kawaida kama makazi makubwa ya ardhi ambayo mara nyingi huhifadhi joto ya kawaida, lakini ni ya kawaida na hizi ni makazi ya dhahabu katika ardhi," alisema Glen Cushing wa timu ya astrogeology ya Marekani Geological Survey (USGS) na ya Chuo Kikuu cha Northern Arizona katika Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: Tabia yazo ya kijoto si thabiti kama mapango makubwa katika Dunia ambayo mara nyingi hudumisha halijoto sawa kwa kadiri fulani, lakini inapatana nazo kuwa mashimo marefu ardhini," alisema Glen Cushing wa Timu ya Falakiolojia ya Utafiti wa Jiolojia wa Marekani (USGS) na wa Chuo Kikuu cha Arizona Kaskazini kilichoko Flagstaff, Arizona.

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
hypothesis: Ugonjwa wa ugonjwa wa ugonjwa wa ugonjwa wa ndege, H5N1, ulifikishwa kuwa amefungwa na mti wa kufa, iliyopatikana Jumatatu, katika marshmalland karibu na Lyon katika mashariki ya Ufaransa.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: Spika wa awali Newt Gingrich, gavana wa Texas Rick Perry na Mbunge Michelle Bachmann walimaliza katika nafasi za nne, tano, na sita mtawalia.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
hypothesis: Baada ya matokeo yaliyotokea, Gingrich alijibu Santorum, lakini alikuwa na maneno ngumu kwa Romney, kwa niaba yake matangazo ya kampeni yanayotolewa katika Iowa dhidi ya Gingrich.
reference: Baada ya matokeo kuingia, Gingrich alimpongeza Santorum, lakini alikuwa na maneno makali kwa Romney, ambaye matangazo hasi ya kampeni yalipeperushwa kwa niaba yake dhidi ya Gingrich.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
hypothesis: Perry alisema kwamba atakuwa "kurejea Texas kwa kuchunguza matokeo ya cacus leo usiku, kuamua kama kuna njia ya mbele kwa mimi katika mashindano haya", lakini baadaye alisema kwamba atakuwa katika mashindano na kucheza katika Januari 21 South Carolina primary.
reference: Perry alisema, "Nitarudi Texas ili kutathmini matokeo ya mkutano wa usiku wa leo, kuamua kama kuna njia yangu ya kusonga mbele katika mbio hizi", lakini baadaye akasema kwamba angebaki kwenye mbio na kushindana katika uchaguzi wa msingi wa Carolina Kusini mnamo Januari 21.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
hypothesis: Bachmann, ambaye alishinda Ames Straw Poll mnamo Agosti, aliamua kumaliza kampeni yake.
reference: Bachmann, aliyeshinda Kura ya maoni ya Ames Straw mnamo Agosti, aliamua kukomesha kampeni yake.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
hypothesis: Msichana huyo alikamatwa kwenye kituo cha matibabu cha Ronald Reagan UCLA, ambapo baadaye alikufa.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

hypothesis: Mfiase no, antibody cocktail biako a wɔfrɛ no ZMapp no daa adi sɛ ebetumi aboa nnipa pii, nanso nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe no kyerɛe sɛ ɛso nni mfaso pii wɔ owu ho.
reference: Aduru biako a ɛkotia kɔktee,ZMapp, mfiase no ɛmaa wɔnyaa anidaso, nanso nhwehwɛmu ada no adi sɛ ɛntumi nsi owuo ano.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
hypothesis: Wɔ PALM sɔhwɛ no mu no, ZMapp yɛɛ adwuma sɛ adansedi, a ɛkyerɛ sɛ nyansahufo de dii dwuma sɛ nnyinaso na wɔtoto nneɛma abiɛsa a aka no ho.
reference: Wɔ PALM sɔhwɛ mu no, ZMapp tumi bɔ ban, kyerɛ sɛ abɔdemu nyansapɛfo de dii dwuma sɛ nnyinasode na wɔde ayaresa abiɛsa nkae no totoo ho.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics gye United States Olympic Committee krataa no toom na wogye di sɛ Olympic abusua no hia koraa sɛ wɔhyɛ yɛn atletifo nyinaa ho ban wɔ ahobammɔ mu.
reference: USA Gymnastics foa United States Olympic badwakuo no lɛtɛ no so na wɔgye tom sɛ ɛho hia sɛ Olympic abusua no hwɛ sɛ wɔn agodifo no nyinaa bɛnya beae papa banbɔ wɔ.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
hypothesis: Yegye asɛm a USOC ka no atom sɛ, sɛ yɛde nsakrae a ɛho hia ba yɛn ahyehyɛde no mu sen sɛ yɛde yɛn agokansie begyae agokansie no a, ebetumi aboa yɛn akwakoraa ne mmerewa ne yɛn akuw ne wɔn agokansie no yiye.
reference: Yɛne USOC's asɛm a wɔkae no yɛ adwene sɛ ɛsɛ deɛ agodifo no ne akuo, wɔn sopɔɔto, no pɛ no wɔdi ho dwuma yiye denam kɔ a wɔbɛkɔ anim na nsesae ntease wom akɔ so wɔ yɛn kuo no mu, sene adodin krataa a wɔtwe sensɛn.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics gye nhwehwɛmu a ɛnyɛ adwuma a ebetumi ama yɛahu sɛnea Larry Nassar ho nnipa a wɔagyina hɔ no de akokoduru kyerɛkyerɛɛ mu no mu a, anka wɔrenhu no bere tenteenten yi, na ɛma nsakrae a ɛho hia ne nea ɛfata biara ba mu.
reference: USA Gymnastics foa so sɛ nhwehwɛmuyɛfo a ɔgyina brane a ɔbɛma yɛahunu sɛnea ɔtitia ɔfa biara ɔnya so sɛnea wɔakyerem wɔ akokoɔduru so wɔ wɔn a wɔagyina Larry Nassa ano a na anka ɔbɛtumi afa ne ho adi a anka ɛnna adi bere tenten na wɔagye nsesae biara ɛho behia atom.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
hypothesis: USA Gymnastics ne USOC wɔ botae koro no ara  sɛ wɔbɛma gymnastics ne nneɛma foforo a ɛtete saa ho nyɛ den sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a atleta betumi adi wɔn dae akyi wɔ ahobammɔ, anigye ne ahobammɔ mu.
reference: USA Gymnastics ne USOC no wɔ botae ko — na ama banbɔ aba agodi te sɛ gymnastics ne nkae no mu sɛnea ɛsɛ na ama agodifo atumi adi wɔn adaeso no akyi wɔ banbɔ kwan so,kwan ɛyɛ pa ne beae a biribiara kɔ kama.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
hypothesis: Wɔ 1960 mfe no nyinaa mu no, Brzezinski yɛɛ adwuma maa John F. Kennedy sɛ n'afotufo ne afei Lyndon B. Johnson aban no.
reference: Afe 1960 mu no nyinaa, Brzezinski yɛɛ adwuma maa John F. Kennnedy sɛ ne futufo ɛne afei Lyndon B. Johnson amanmmuo.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
hypothesis: Bere a wɔpaw no wɔ afe 1976 mu no, otuu Carter fo wɔ amannɔne ho, na akyiri yi ɔyɛɛ National Security Advisor (NSA) wɔ afe 1977 kosi 1981 mu, dii Henry Kissinger ananmu.
reference: Bere a wɔreyiyi nkorɔfo wɔ 1976 mu no ɔtuu Carter fo wɔ amannɔne nsɛm ho, na afei ɔbɛyɛɛ Ɔman mu no nyinaa Banbɔ Futufo (NSA) ɛfiri 1977 kɔsi 1981, na ɔbɛdii Henry Kissinger ade.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
hypothesis: Bere a ɔyɛ NSA no, ɔboaa Carter ma ɔhwɛɛ wiase nsɛm so, te sɛ Camp David Apam no, 1978; US China abusuabɔ a ɛkɔɔ so wɔ afe 1970 mfe no awiei; Iran Agyenkwa no, a ɛde Iran asraafodɔm ho nsɛmnsɛm bae, 1979; ne Soviet ko a ɛkɔɔ so wɔ Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Sɛ NSA, ɔboaa Carter wɔ diplomatike nsɛm ho a ɛfa wiase mu nsɛm ho, te sɛ Camp David Accords, 1978; maa US–China nkitahodi kɔsii 1970’s mfe no awieei; Iranian Ɔman anibutu, a ɛkɔfaa Iran hɔteegyi bae, 1979; ɛne Soviet a wɔbɛpuee mu wɔ Afghanistan wɔ, 1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
hypothesis: Ná Ryan Gosling ne Emma Stone wɔ sini no mu, na wonyaa nkontaabu wɔ nneɛma atitiriw nyinaa mu.
reference: Sini no a, a Ryan Gosling ne Emma Stone wom na wɔyɛɛ sɛ wɔbɛbɔ wɔn aba so afa atitire mu.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
hypothesis: Gosling ne Stone nyaa nkontaabu wɔ agodibea pa ne agodibea pa mu.
reference: Wɔbɔɔ Gosling ne Stone din sɛ agofomma a wɔbɔ wɔn ho mmɔden yiye.

source: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.
hypothesis: Nhoma foforo a wɔpaw wɔn no bi ne: Nea Ɛsen Biara, Ɔkyerɛkyerɛfo, Sinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing ne Original Screenplay.
reference: Nkae a wɔbɔɔ wɔn din no bi yɛ Mfonin a ɛyɛ pa ara, Kwankyerɛfo, Sinimatografi, Afade yɛ, Sini-asiesie, Ɔregyenaa Sokɔɔ, Proahyen Design, Nnyegyeeɛ Asiesie, Sɛnea ɔde Nnyegyeeɛ no Frafra ne ɔregyinaa Sikireeplee.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
hypothesis: Nnwom mmienu a ɛwɔ sini no mu, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) ne City of Stars, nyaa nnwom a wɔtoo din sɛ nnwom a edi kan. Lionsgate studio nyaa nnwom 26 a ɛboro studio foforo biara so.
reference: Nnwom abien a ɛwɔ sini no mu, Ɔdihyen ( Agyimifoɔ no a wɔso Daeɛ) ne Kuropɔn a Nsromma, na wɔbɔɔ wɔn din sɛ nnwom a ɛyɛ ɔregyinaa a ɛyɛ paa. Wɔbɔɔ Lionsgate studio no mprɛ 26— a ɛkyɛn studio nkae biara.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
hypothesis: Kwasida anwummere no, United States Ɔmanpanyin Donald Trump, wɔ amanneɛbɔ bi a ɔde maa ne atesɛm nkrataa kyerɛwfo mu no, kaa sɛ US asraafo bɛfi Syria.
reference: Bere a na bere kɔ wɔ Kwasiada , United States manpanin Donal Trump, denam ɔtwerɛfo a ɔde nsɛm to dwa so no de too gua sɛ US asraafo rebɛfiri Syria.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
hypothesis: Wɔbɔɔ amanneɛ bere a Trump ne Turkey Ɔmanpanyin Recep Tayyip Erdoğan bɔɔ nkɔmmɔ wɔ telefon so no.
reference: Saa nkaebɔ yi kɔɔ so bere a Trump ne Turkey manpanin Recep Tayyip Erdoğan ka saa wɔ foon so.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
hypothesis: Turkey nso bɛhwɛ ISIS atuatewfo a wɔkyeree wɔn no so a, sɛnea amanneɛbɔ no kyerɛ no, Europa aman no apo sɛ wɔbɛsan akɔ wɔn kurom.
reference: Turkey nso bɛhwɛ ISIS akofo a wɔakyere wɔn no so, nkaebɔ no de too gua, Europe aman ampene so sɛ wɔmmera wɔn nkyi.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
hypothesis: Ɛnyɛ eyi nko na ɛma yehu sɛ na dinosauro bi wɔ ntaban, nkyerɛkyerɛ bi a agye ntini dedaw, na mmom ɛma yehu nneɛma pii a nsoromma mu nneɛma a ɛwɔ hɔ no rentumi nyɛ, te sɛ kɔla ne nsoromma abiɛsa a ɛwɔ hɔ no.
reference: Wei nsi no pi nko ara sɛ anyɛ hwee koraa dinosaurs wɔ ntakra, biribi a atene, nanso ne nankɛse a ɛwɔ hɔ mma, te sɛ ahosuo ne afaafa-abiɛsa nhyehyɛe.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
hypothesis: Nyansahufo ka sɛ na aboa yi nhwiren no kɔkɔɔ kɔkɔɔ wɔ atifi fam, na na ne fã a ɛwɔ fam no nhwiren anaa karotenoid.
reference: Abɔdemunyansapɛfo ka sɛ na saa mmoa yi ntakra ɛyɛ chestnut-brown wɔ soro a ɛyɛ hoyaa anaasɛ carotenoid-colored a ɛwɔ ase.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
hypothesis: Nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe no ma yehu sɛnea nnomaa nam nnomaa so bae.
reference: Adida wei nso ma yɛhunu kwan a nnomaa ntakra bae.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
hypothesis: Esiane sɛ dinosauro ntaban no nni ɔfasu a wɔasiesie no yiye a wɔfrɛ no rachis nti, nhwehwɛmufo no kae sɛ ebia rachis no yɛ ade foforo a ɛkɔɔ so wɔ adannandi mu.
reference: Esiane sɛ dinosaur ntakra nni shaft a anyini awie, a yɛfrɛ no rachis, nanso enni ntakra nnoɔma nkae — barbɔ ne barbules — nhwehwɛmufo kaa sɛ rachis no baa akyire yi wɔ nnoɔma nkae no ho.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Nhwehwɛmufo no kae sɛ, ɛwom sɛ eyi yɛ akekantwɛre bi atutenae de, nanso nea wɔyɛe no ma yehu sɛ akekantwɛre no yɛ ɔpanyin atutenae, na ɛnyɛ aberewa atutenae.
reference: Sɛnea ntakra no si teɛ no kyerɛ sɛ wɔamfa anni dwuma wɔ hyɛn mu na mmom ne hyɛe anaa nwunu nhyehyɛe mu anaa ne kyerɛ mu. Nhwehwɛmufoɔ yi susuu sɛ, ɛwom sɛ wei yɛ dinasour a ɔsua no tua de, ɛkyerɛ n’atabu na ɛnyɛ chick's down.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Nhwehwɛmufo no kyerɛe sɛ, ɛmfa ho sɛ eyi yɛ aboa bi a ne nan ase ayɛ fɛw no, nea wɔayi no kyerɛ sɛ ne nan ase ayɛ fɛw, na ɛnyɛ sɛ ne nan ase ayɛ fɛw.
reference: Nhwehwɛmufoɔ yi susuu sɛ, ɛwom sɛ wei yɛ dinasour a ɔsua no tua de, ɛkyerɛ n’atabu na ɛnyɛ sɛ ɔbɛtumi de abɔ ne ho ban.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
hypothesis: Kurow a ɛwɔ Gaziantep, Turkey no, kar a wɔde bɔpae toopae anɔpa bi kum polisifo baanu, na nnipa bɛboro aduonu pirapiraa.
reference: Kaa mu topae too wɔ polisi asoe a ɛwɔ Gaziantep, Turkey nnora anɔpa na ekumm apolisifo nnipa baanu na wɔn a wɔpirae no boro aduonu.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
hypothesis: Wohui sɛ nsoromma a ɛwɔ saa nsoromma no mu nyinaa, sɛnea owia ne nsoromma no yɛ adwuma no, saa ara na owia no nso yɛ adwuma: Nea ɛma nsoromma a ɛwɔ saa nsoromma no mu nyinaa yɛ adwuma ne sɛnea wɔn ho hyerɛn, sɛnea wɔn ho hyerɛn, ne nea ɛkeka ho.
reference: Wɔhunuu sɛ Awia yɛ adwuma wɔ tebea ko ara mu te sɛ nsroma nkae no: Nsroma dwumadi nyinaa wɔhunuu sɛ deɛ ɛhyɛ ne kutupa yɛ n wɔn luminosity, wɔn ntwaho na ɛnyɛ biribiara.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
hypothesis: Wɔde hann ne nsrahwɛ no bom yɛ adwuma de hu nsoromma bi Rossby dodow, a ɛne plasma a ɛretwam no wɔ abusuabɔ.
reference: Wɔde luminosity no ne ntwaho no di dwuma de kyere nsroma Rossby nɔma, a ɛfa sɛnea plasma no ɛtene no ho.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
hypothesis: Sɛ Rossby akontaabu no yɛ ketewa a, saa ara na nsoromma no nyɛ den wɔ magnetic reversals ho.
reference: Sɛna Rossby no sua no, saa na nsroma no magnɛtek no a ɛsane kɔ ne nkyi no dwumadi wɔ fam.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
hypothesis: Wɔ akwantu no mu no, Iwasaki hyiaa nsɛnnennen mpɛn pii.
reference: Akwantu no bi mu no, Iwasaki nyaa asɛm mpɛn pii.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
hypothesis: Ná aguamammɔfo awia no, na ɔkraman bi tow hyɛɛ no so wɔ Tibet, na oguan fii aware mu wɔ Nepal, na wɔkyeree no wɔ India.
reference: Piratefo wiaa no, rabid nkraman to hyɛɛ ne so wɔ Tibet, guan firii aware mu wɔ Nepal na wɔsan kyeree no wɔ India.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
hypothesis: 802.11n gyinapɛn no yɛ adwuma wɔ 2.4Ghz ne 5.0Ghz taa ahorow nyinaa so.
reference: 802.11n nostandaad yɛ adwuma wɔfirkwɛnsi a ɛyɛ 2.4Ghz ne 5.0Ghz so.

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
hypothesis: Eyi bɛma atumi ne 802.11a, 802.11b ne 802.11g ayɛ baako wɔ akyi, gye sɛ ɔfã no wɔ radio mmienu.
reference: Wei bɛma kwan ama asane akɔ akyi a ɛne 802.11a, hyia802.11b ne 802.11g,sɛ ɛkɔ ba sɛ base siteehyin no wɔ radio abien.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
hypothesis: 802.11n ntɛmntɛm yɛ ntɛm sen nea edi kan a wɔde bɛyɛ 600Mbit/s.
reference: Ne mmirika a ɛyɛ 802.11n yɛ deɛ ɛho yɛ hare sene deɛ edii anim no a ne maximum theoretical throughput ɛyɛ 600Mbit/s.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
hypothesis: Duvall, a ɔware na ɔwɔ mma baanu a wɔn mfe akɔ anim no, anhu Miller yiye.
reference: Duvall, a wɔaware a wɔwɔ mma abien a wɔanyinini, annya biribi a ɛwɔ nkɛntɛn so kɛse wɔ Miller so, a na asɛm no fa ne ho.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
hypothesis: Bere a wobisaa Miller sɛ ɔnkyerɛw asɛm no mu no, ɔkae sɛ: "Mike kasa pii wɔ asɛnni no ase... na mereyɛ me ho sɛ merente nea ɔreka no ase".
reference: Bere a ɔbisaa anom asɛm no, Miller kaa sɛ, “ Mike kasa pii bere a asenni no gu so rekɔ so no.... Na mereyɛ ahoboaboa nti na mente deɛ ɔreka no ankasa.”

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
hypothesis: Hu kae sɛ: "Yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden sɛ yebeyi carbon dioxide a ɛrefi wiase nyinaa nneɛma a ɛwɔ asase so nyinaa mu no bi afi afe 2005 mu akodu afe 2020", na Hu kae sɛ: "Yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden sɛ yebeyi carbon dioxide a ɛrefi wiase nyinaa nneɛma a ɛwɔ asase so nyinaa mu no bi afi afe 2005 mu akosi afe 2020.
reference: Hu kaa sɛ“ Yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden sɛ yɛbɛte mframa a nnipa home fi ne mu a ɛfiri mu ba no a ɛyɛ GDP nkyɛmu baako a ɛyɛ nea ɛnnnuru 2020 fiti 2005 deɛ no.”

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
hypothesis: Wankyerɛw akontaabu biara, na ɔkae sɛ wɔde bɛyɛ adwuma wɔ China sikasɛm mu.
reference: Wankyerɛ mu pɔtee ahe a ɔbɛyi afiri mu, ɔka sɛ wɔbɛyɛ wei na ɛbɛgyina China sikasɛm so.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
hypothesis: Hu hyɛɛ aman a wɔrenya nkɔso nkuran sɛ "wɔnkwati ɔkwan dedaw a ɛne sɛ wobedi ho awu na akyiri yi wɔasiesie wɔn ho".
reference: Hu tu aman a afei na wɔretu mpɔn fo sɛ ” ɛsɛ sɛ ɔkwati wɔbɛsɛe adeɛ deɛ edi kan ansa na wɔahwɛ asiesie no akyire yi”.

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
hypothesis: Ɔde kaa ho sɛ, "Ɛnsɛ sɛ wɔka kyerɛ wɔn sɛ wɔmfa asɛyɛde a ɛboro wɔn nkɔso, asɛyɛde, ne wɔn tumi so nyɛ adwuma".
reference: Ɔde kaa ho sɛ “ɛnsɛ sɛ ɔyɛ, na ɔfa asodi a ɛkɔ akyi sene nkɔanim siteegyi, asodi ne deɛ ɔtumi yɛ. ”

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
hypothesis: Iraq Study Group no yii wɔn amanneɛbɔ no adi wɔ GMT awia nnɔn 12.00 nnɛ.
reference: Iraq adesua kuw de wɔn amannebɔ too gua 12.00 GMT nnɛ.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
hypothesis: Ɛbɔ kɔkɔ sɛ obiara ntumi nka sɛ adwuma biara a wɔbɛyɛ wɔ Iraq wɔ saa bere yi mu no bɛma ɔsom mu akodi, awudisɛm a ɛrenya nkɔanim, anaa ɔbrasɛe a ɛrekɔ so no agyae.
reference: Ɛbɔɔ kɔkɔ sɛ obiara ntumi nsi sectarian ako a ɛrekɔ so wɔ Iraq saa bere wei mu no, basabasayɛ a ɛrenya nkɔanim anaasɛ ɛkɔ basabasayɛ so.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
hypothesis: Amanneɛbɔ no fi ase kyerɛ sɛ ɛsɛ sɛ wɔyɛ nhyiamu a emu da hɔ na wonya adwene wɔ United States amanne a ɛfa Middle East ho no ho.
reference: Amannebɔ no de adesrɛ na efi ase sɛ ɔma dibeeti ho kwan na wɔnya nteaseɛ wɔ Uinited States a ɛfa Middle East nhyehyɛe ho.

source: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.
hypothesis: Amanneɛbɔ no ka nsɛm a ɛho hia paa wɔ Atumfoɔ no amammerɛ a ɛwɔ hɔ nnɛ wɔ Iraq ho no mu biara ho, na ɛhyɛ yɛn nkuran sɛ yɛntwe yɛn ho mfi ho ntɛm ara.
reference: Amannebɔ no hia paa ɛma mprenpren nhyehyɛe a ɛfa Iraq ho na ɛkamfo kyerɛ sɛ wɔnyɛ nsesae wɔ kwan a wɔnam so no.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
hypothesis: N'afotu 78 no mu nea edi kan ne sɛ, afe yi awiei no, ɛsɛ sɛ wɔyɛ amanyɔsɛm foforo de bɔ nsase a ɛwɔ Iraq no ho ban fi atamfo nsam na wɔne n'afipamfo nya abusuabɔ foforo.
reference: Deɛ edi nkamfo 78 mu no ne ɛsɛ sɛ wɔtu diplomatic initiative ho anamɔn ansa na afe yi akɔ awiei na wɔde abɔ Iraq ahyeɛ ho ban de atia amanmmɔefo na wɔsan ne wɔn a wɔbɛn no no hyɛ diplomatic nkitahodi mu kena.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
hypothesis: Ɔsenani a seesei ɔyɛ Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner kaa ne ho asɛm sɛ ɔrebɛdi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan.
reference: Mprempren mmarahyɛbaguani ne Argentine Ɔbaa a ɔdi kan Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner de gyina a ɔregyina sɛ ɔman panin too gua nnora anwummere wɔ La Plata, kuro a ɛyɛ kilomita 50 (maale 31) ɛde firi Buenos Aires.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
hypothesis: Mmea Kirchner kaa ne botae sɛ ɔbɛsɔre akɔpɔn ɔmanpanyin wɔ Argentine Theatre, beae koro no ara a ɔde fii ne ɔsatu a ɔyɛe wɔ Senate mu wɔ afe 2005 mu no ase sɛ Buenos Aires mantam no muni.
reference: Owurayere Kirchner de n’adwene a wayɛ sɛ ɔbɛgyina sɛ ɔmanpanin no too gua wɔ Argentine Theatre, baabi korɔ no ara ɔfirii ne mmarahyɛ bagua ntoabɔ no ase afe 2005 sɛ obi ɔka Buenos Aires mansin delegation no ho.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
hypothesis: Akyinnyegye no bae esiane sɛ Hurricane Katrina akyi no, wɔde nneɛma a wɔde boa nkurɔfo ne wɔn a wɔsan kyekye wɔn ho no bɔɔ ho kyim; na ebinom a wɔyɛ sika ho ahwɛyiye de fɛw ahyɛ "Bush New Orleans Deal" din.
reference: Deɛ akɔ fa nkyinwahyew a ɛfa ka wɔbɔe de siesiee nneɛma wɔ mframa gyampadurudu Katrina ho; a fiscal conservatives binom aka sɛ ɛyɛ "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

source: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.
hypothesis: Amanamanmufo de wɔn ani ato wɔn ho so sɛ wɔbɛsan asiesie adan a wɔasan asiesie no ho, na wɔde wɔn adwene asi so sɛ wobesiesie adan a wɔasan asiesie no ama Washingtonfo.
reference: Nnipa fawohidi a ɛfa siesie mmɔdemmɔ ho no de ani akyerɛ sɛnea wɔde kɔtraagye ma wɔn a wɔwɔ Washington .

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
hypothesis: Nnipa bɛboro ɔpepem anan kɔɔ Roma kɔhwɛɛ ɔboda no.
reference: Nnipa bɛboro ɔpepem nnan na wɔkɔɔ ayi no bi wɔ Rome.

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
hypothesis: Nnipa a na wɔwɔ hɔ no dɔɔso araa ma enti na ɛnyɛ obiara na obetumi akɔ asie no wɔ St. Peter Square.
reference: Nnipa wɔkɔɔ no na wɔdɔɔso ara ma na ɛnyɛ obiara na wɔtumi nya kwan kɔ ayi no ase wɔ St.Peter's Square hɔ.

source: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.
hypothesis: Wosii television so nneɛma akɛse pii wɔ mmeae ahorow wɔ Roma sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a nkurɔfo no bɛhwɛ afahyɛ no.
reference: Wɔde akasamfonin akɛseɛakɛseɛ sisii mmeae mmeae wɔ Rome na ama nnipa tumi ahwɛ dwumadi no.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
hypothesis: Wɔyɛɛ nneɛma a ɛte saa wɔ nkurow pii mu wɔ Italy ne wiase no mu, titiriw wɔ Poland, na nnipa pii hwɛɛ nea wɔyɛe no.
reference: Nkuro ahorow mu wɔ Italy ne wiase afanan ahorow no, ne titire ne Poland no, wɔhyehyɛɛ biribi a ɛtete saa, na nnipa pii na wɔhwɛɛ bi.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
hypothesis: Abakɔsɛm akyerɛwfo aka sɛ bere bi a atwam no, na FBI de nnwinnade di dwuma wɔ nsɛm a ɛyɛ mmerɛw sɛ wobeyi afi mu, titiriw kar a wɔayi afi mu ho nsɛm mu, sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a dwumadibea no bɛkɔ so anya nkɔso.
reference: Abakɔsɛm ho animdefo akasa atia FBI no nhyehyɛeɛ wɔ sɛnea wɔsɛe sika wɔ nsɛm a ano sie nyɛ den ho no, ne titire ne kaa wɔawia ho nsɛm, a wɔn adwene sɛ wɔbɛma asoe no nkunimdi no akɔ soro.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
hypothesis: Wɔ afe 2005 mu no, Ɔman Nhyiam no fii ase de sika maa ɔbrasɛe ho nhyehyɛe no, na ɛkyerɛɛ mu sɛ ɛsɛ sɛ FBI de adwumayɛfo 10 yɛ aguamansɛm a wɔde ma mpanyimfo.
reference: Mmarahyɛbagua no fii ase sɛ wɔrefa obscenity initiative no ka wɔ afe 2005 abd wɔkaa sɛ FBI no nhyɛda nyi nnipa 10 nsi hɔ mma mpaninfoɔ nnwamansɛm.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
hypothesis: Robin Uthappa nyaa nnipakan no mu akoten sen biara, na ɔde nnɔnhwerew 11 ne nnɔnhwerew 2 bɔɔ nnɔnhwerew 41 pɛ mu.
reference: Robin Uthappa bɔɔ ne ho mmɔden paa hyɛɛe, run 70 wɔ bɔɔlo 41 pɛ muna ɔbɔɔ 11 ahorow nnan ne nsia ahorow 2.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
hypothesis: Mid-order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar ne Rahul Dravid yɛɛ wɔn ade yiye na wonyaa mmirika ɔha.
reference: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar ne Rahul Dravid, dii agoru yiye na wɔdii nkonim bɔɔ mu.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
hypothesis: Nanso, bere a India dii nkonim no, India bɔɔ mmirika 36 pɛ, na ɔhweree mmirika 7 de wiee mmirika no.
reference: Nanso bere a wɔhweree kapitin wicket no India tumi yɛɛ runs 36, hweree wickets no 7 de mmɔden bɔ no baa awiee.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
hypothesis: U.S. Ɔmanpanyin George W. Bush duu Singapore anɔpa November 16 no, na ofii Asia nsrahwɛ a ɛkɔɔ so nnawɔtwe biako no ase.
reference: U.S. manpanin George W. Bush bɛpuee mu wɔ Singapore wɔ Obudu 16, na ɛyɛ nnawɔtwe a na ɔrebɛdi wɔ Asia no ahyɛase.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
hypothesis: Singapore Ɔsafohene Wong Kan Seng hyiaa no, na ɔne Singapore Ɔsafohene Lee Hsien Loong susuw aguadi ne amumɔyɛ ho nsɛm ho.
reference: Deɛ ɔbɛhyiaa no yɛ Singapore Mansoafo Panin Abadiakyi Wong Kan Seng na wɔbɔɔ aguadi ne awurukasɛm ho nsɛm ho nkɔmmɔ na wɔne Singapore Mansoafo Panin Lee Hsien Loong na ɛtwetwee nkɔmmɔ no.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
hypothesis: Bere a Bush dii nnawɔtwe wɔ mmirikatu no mu no, ɔkaa aguadi a ɛrekɔ so wɔ Asia no ho asɛm kyerɛɛ nnipakuw bi.
reference: Bere a wɔdii nkogu wɔ midtɛɛm abato mu, Bush kaa sɛnea wɔrebɛtrɛ aguadi mu wɔ Asia no mu ho asɛm.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
hypothesis: Ɔmampanyin Stephen Harper penee so sɛ ɔde aban no 'Clean Air Act' bɛkɔ amanyɔ kuw bi anim akɔhwehwɛ mu, ansa na wɔrekenkan no a ɛto so abien, wɔ NDP kannifo Jack Layton a ɔne no hyiae bɛyɛ simma 25 wɔ PMO hɔ no akyi.
reference: Mansoafo panin Stephen Harper ate ase sɛ ɔde aban no 'Clean Air Act' ɛma amannyɔ akuo kɔmitii ama wɔasusu ho, ansa na wɔakan no mprɛ a ɛtɔ so abien, wɔ Benada bere a wɔhyiam sima 25 a wɔne NDP kanifoJack Layton hyiaam wɔ PMO no.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
hypothesis: Bere a Layton ne Ɔmampanyin no hyiae no, obisaa sɛ wɔnyɛ nsakrae wɔ atetesɛm no mu.
reference: Layton asrɛ sɛ wɔnyɛ nsakrae wɔ conservatives no bill a ɛfa atenae ho wɔ nhyiam a wɔne PM no yɛeɛ no ase no, na ɔsrɛ sɛ Conservative amannyɔku no bill a ɛfa atenae ho no“ wɔntwerɛ no yiye na wɔnwie” .

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
hypothesis: Efi bere a Federal Aban no de sika kɔfaa Mersey ayaresabea a ɛwɔ Devonport, Tasmania, no, amantam aban ne mmarahyɛ badwafo bi aka sɛ saa mmara yi yɛ biribi a wɔde yɛ ɔsatu a ɛbɛkɔ so wɔ November mu.
reference: Ɛfiti bere a Aban no baa mu sɛ ɔrefa Mersey ayaresabea a ɛwɔ Devonport, Tasmania,siteeti aban no ne ɔman no mu MPfoɔ binom akasa atia saa ade yi ɛrekɔ ɔman no abato bere no mu a wɔbɛto no Obubuo mu no.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
hypothesis: Nanso Ɔmampanyin John Howard kae sɛ mmara a wɔde mae no yɛ sɛ wɔbɛbɔ ayaresabea no ho ban na Tasmanian aban no amfa AUD ɔpepem 45 ammɔ ho ban.
reference: Nanso Masnsofo panin John Howard aka sɛ na boatae no ne sɛ wɔreyɛ saa na Tasmanian aban no amma no ante amma fam, ɛno nti wɔmaa no ɔpepem AUD$45.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
hypothesis: Sɛnea atesɛm krataa a edi kan no kyerɛ no, ɛpo no bo a ɛwɔ po so kyerɛ sɛ ɛbɔɔ tsunami bi, na wɔkae sɛ ɛbɔɔ tsunami bi wɔ Pago Pago ne Niue mpɔtam.
reference: Sɛnea nsɛm aba foforo kyerɛ no, sɛnea po no akɔ soro no kyerɛ sɛ wɔyɛɛ tsunami no. Tsunami dwumadi bi kɔɔ so wɔ beae a ɛbɛn Pago Pago ne Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
hypothesis: Wɔankyerɛw sɛ nnipa pii hweree tumi no wɔ Tonga, nanso wɔhweree tumi no bere tiaa bi, na wɔkae sɛ ɛno amma Tonga atumfoɔ no antumi annye tsunami ho kɔkɔbɔ a PTWC de mae no antom.
reference: Wɔmmɔɔ adesɛe kɛseɛ anaa pira biara ho amanne wɔ Tonga, nanso anyinam kanea nni hɔ, na wei amma Tonga mpaninfoɔ nsa antumi anka kɔkɔbɔ a PTWC no de maae na ɛfa tsunami no ho no.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
hypothesis: Ɛwom sɛ wɔayi kɔkɔbɔ no de, nanso wɔtoo sukuu 14 wɔ Hawaii a ɛwɔ mpoano anaa baabi a ɛbɛn hɔ wiei Wukuda no nyinaa.
reference: Sukuu ahorow du nnan a ɛwɔ Hawii a ɛwowɔ anaa ɛbɛn mpoano na wɔtoo mu Wukuada no nyinaa ɛwom sɛ wɔayi kɔkɔbɔ a wɔde maae no afiri hɔ de.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
hypothesis: U.S. Ɔmanpanyin George W. Bush gyee saa amanneɛbɔ no toom.
reference: U.S. Mampanin George W. Bush gyee amannebɔ yi too mu.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
hypothesis: Bush kasafo Gordon Johndroe kaa bɔ a North Korea hyɛe no ho asɛm sɛ "ɛyɛ anammɔn kɛse wɔ botae a ɛne sɛ wobesiesie Korea nsupɔw no yiye".
reference: Bush kasamafo Gordon Johndroe North Korea pledge “ kwan paa a ɔnam so duru botae na ama wɔn nsa aka verifiable denuclearization ɛwɔ Korean peninsula."

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
hypothesis: Atlantic Hurricane bere no mu ahum a ɛto so du a wɔfrɛ no Subtropical Storm Jerry, na ɛbɔɔ wɔ Atlantic Po no mu nnɛ.
reference: Mframa a ɛtɔ so du a ɛyɛ Atlantic Hurricane season, sɔbtrɔpikaa mframa Jerry, wɔyɛɛ wɔ Atlantic Ocean mu nnɛ.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
hypothesis: National Hurricane Center (NHC) ka sɛ saa bere yi Jerry nsɛe asase no.
reference: Ɔman mu Mframagyampaturudu Asoe (NHC) ka sɛ Jerry ho nyɛ hu mma ɔman no.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
hypothesis: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers bu akontaa sɛ osu a emu yɛ den bɛyɛ sentimita 6 no betumi asɛe nsu a na asɛe no dedaw no.
reference: Ngyiniɛs a wɔwɔ U.S. Corps bu akonta sɛ osu a ɛtɔ sɛɛe ade no kan no ɛbɛboro so nkyisi no 6.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
hypothesis: Ɔmantam a ɛto so akron no, bere a Hurricane Katrina sisii no, asorɔkye a ɛkɔɔ so ara boroo mita 20 no, saa bere no, asorɔkye a ɛbɛn hɔ no abobɔ ano.
reference: Ward no a ɛtɔ so nkron , a ɛmaa nsuo no yi kɔɔ soro kɔduu fiiti no 20 wɔ mframagyampaturudu Katrina mu no, mprenpren ɛda sisi sɛnea leeve a ɛbɛn hɔ no wɔ soro no.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
hypothesis: Asubɔnten no so nsu retwam wɔ baabi a ɛtrɛw bɛyɛ mita 100.
reference: Nsuo rebu fa levee no so wɔ ɔfa a ne fiiti no yɛ100

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
hypothesis: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden daa n'abam adi wɔ sɛe no ho bere a ɔne Wikinews kasae bosome a etwaam no.
reference: Commons Administreta Adam Cuerden daa n’ayawdi adi de fa nnyifirim no ho no bere a ɔne Wikinews kasae bosome a etwaam mu no.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
hypothesis: "Efi mfiase pɛɛ na [Wales] dii atoro kyerɛɛ yɛn. Nea edi kan, ɔyɛe te sɛ nea esiane mmara kwan so nti na ɔreyɛ saa. Nea ɛto so abien, ɔyɛe te sɛ nea ɔretie yɛn, kosii sɛ oyii n'abrabɔ fii hɔ".
reference: “Ɔno [Wales] dii atorɔ kyerɛɛ yɛn firi ahyɛase. Deɛ edi kan bere ɔyɛɛ ne ho sɛ ɛnam mmara kwan so. Deɛ ɛtɔ so abien ɔyɛɛ ne ho sɛ ɔretie yɛn, kɔsii ne art no popa no so.

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
hypothesis: Ɔman no animtiaabu no nti, seesei wɔrebɔ mmɔden sɛ wɔbɛkyerɛw mmara bi a ɛfa ɔbea ne ɔbarima nna ho nsɛm ho ama saa wɛbsaet no a ɛwɔ nkrataa ɔpepem pii a wɔama ho kwan no.
reference: Kuro no abufuw na ɛkɔfaa mmɔden a wɔrebɔ sɛ wɔbɛtwerɛ nhyehyɛe foforo a ɛfa nna ho nsɛm ɛma site ɛkuro miidia ɔpepem a wɔama ho tumi krataa obiara nsa tumi sɔ so no.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
hypothesis: Adwuma a wɔyɛe no fã kɛse no ara yɛ nea wɔaka ho asɛm, nanso wɔyɛɛ nhyehyɛe no sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a wɔde nneɛma a wɔyɛe wɔ Sagittarius nsoromma mu no bɛyɛ ho mfonini.
reference: Adwuma no mprɛ pii na ɛyɛ theoretical, nanso wɔkyerɛw dwumadi sɛnea ɛbɛsimulate observation a wɔde Sagittarius galaxy na ayɛ.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
hypothesis: Nea na kuw no rehwehwɛ no, ɛbɛyɛ sɛ asorɔkye a ɛrekɔ so wɔ nsoromma mu ne Milky Way nsoromma mu no na ɛde aba.
reference: Nsunsuanso a na kuo rehwɛ kwan na tidal forces no na na ɛbɛkɔ akɔfa aba na ɛbɛda galaxy's dark mata no ne Milky Way's dark mata no ntam.

source: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.
hypothesis: Sɛnea ɔsram tumi twe asase, na ɛde asorɔkye ba no, saa ara na Milky Way tumi twe Sagittarius.
reference: Te sɛ nea bosome de ahoɔden ba asase so, na ɛkɔ tides ba, saa ara na Milky way de ahoɔden ba Sagittarius galaxy no so.

source: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.
hypothesis: Nyansahufo no tumi kae sɛ sum mu nneɛma tumi ka sum mu nneɛma foforo a ɛte saa ara.
reference: Nyansahunufo no tumi de too gua sɛ dark mata no ɛka dark mata afoforo wɔ kwan koro no ara so te sɛ nea rɛgula mata no yɛ no.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
hypothesis: Nyansapɛ yi kyerɛ sɛ sum mu nneɛma dodow no ara a ɛbɔ nsoromma kuw bi ho ahyia wɔ nsoromma kuw bi mu, na ɛyɛ nketewa nketewa pii.
reference: Saa theory yi ka sɛ dark mata dodoɛ no ara ɛwɔ galaxy no ho no wɔ galaxy a ɛte sɛ halo no, na ɛyɛ ɛwowɔ particles nketewa.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
hypothesis: TV amanneɛbɔ kyerɛ sɛ wusiw fitaa fi afifide no mu reba.
reference: Tɛlɛvihyin bɔ amanne sɛ show white smoke a ɛfiri afifide mu.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
hypothesis: Amanaman mpanyimfo reka akyerɛ wɔn a wɔte afifide no ho no sɛ wɔntena wɔn afie mu, mfa mframa nsi hɔ, na wɔnnnom nsu mfi fononoo no mu.
reference: Mpatam hɔ mpaninfo rebɔ temanmufo wɔte bɛn plant no kɔkɔ sɛ wɔntena fie, nnunnum air-conditioners na ɛnsɛ ɔnom paapo nsuo.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
hypothesis: Sɛnea Japan nuklea dwumadibea no kyerɛ no, wɔahu radioaktiw cesium ne iodine wɔ saa afifide no so.
reference: Sɛnea Japan ahoɔdennneɛ asoe kyerɛ no, mfidie no ɛne radioactive caesium ne iodine.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
hypothesis: Aban no susuw sɛ eyi kyerɛ sɛ ebetumi aba sɛ adaka a wɔde uranium a wɔde rehyew nneɛma wɔ hɔ no apue na ɛrehyew.
reference: Mpaninfo no ka sɛ kɔnteena a na uranium fango wom wɔ beae hɔ no apae na retu gu.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
hypothesis: Ɔbenfo Tony Moll huu yare a wɔfrɛ no Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) wɔ South Africa mpɔtam wɔ KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Dr. Tony Mol hunuu Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) ɛwɔ South African mantam wɔ KwaZulu-Natal.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
hypothesis: Wɔ ɔkasa bi mu no, ɔkae sɛ yare foforo no "yɛ nea ɛhaw adwene paa na ɛhaw adwene esiane owuo dodow a ɛrekɔ so no nti".
reference: Nkɔmmɔ twetwe, ɔkaa sɛ variant foforo no “ wɔ soro paa” ɛha adwene na ɛyɛ hu esiane owuo ɛwɔ soro no nti.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
hypothesis: Wɔ afe biako mu no, obi a wanya yare no betumi anya nnipa 10 anaa 15 a ɔne wɔn bɔe no yare.
reference: Afe biako ntam no, nnipa yare no aka no de bɛsae nnipa 10 kɔsi 15 a wɔbɛn no pa ara.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
hypothesis: Nanso, ɛte sɛ nea XDR-TB ho nnipa dodow a wɔwɔ mmoawammoawa mu no da so ara yɛ kakraa bi; nnipa 6,000 wɔ South Africa a wɔn dodow yɛ 330,000 a wɔyare wɔ bere pɔtee biara mu no mu.
reference: XDR-TB ɔha nkyekyɛmu a ɛwɔ kuo no nyinaa mu no a wɔwɔ nsamanwa da so ara wɔ fam; nnipa 330,000 mu 6,000 na yare no aka wɔn bere bi mu wɔ South Africa.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
hypothesis: Asatellites no nyinaa so duru boro kilogram 1,000, na na wɔretwa kwantenten bɛyɛ kilomita 17,500 wɔ dɔnhwerew biako mu, na wɔhwehwɛɛ asase atifi bɛyɛ kilomita 491.
reference: Ahunmu mfiri abien a emu duru bɛboro "pound" apem biako (1,000 pounds) na ɛtwa ne ho bɛyɛ akwansin mpem du-ason ne ahanum (17,500) dɔnhwere biara pem wɔn ho hyia pem akwansin ahannan aduokron-biako wɔ asase so wɔ wim.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
hypothesis: Nyansahufo ka sɛ atoyerɛnkyɛm no nti, atoyerɛnkyɛm no yɛɛ kɛse.
reference: Nyansahufo kae se, atopae a ɛhyia to bɔm no ano yɛ peme.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
hypothesis: Wɔda so ara rebɔ mmɔden sɛ wɔbɛhu sɛnea atoyerɛnkyɛm no kɛse te ne sɛnea ɛbɛhaw asase no.
reference: Wɔda so rehwɛhwɛ sɛnea asehwɛ kɛse no teɛ ne sɛnea aka asase no afa.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
hypothesis: United States Strategic Command a ɛwɔ U.S. Department of Defense adwumayɛbea no reyɛ nneɛma a asɛe no ho nhwehwɛmu.
reference: United States asrafopanyin dwumadie bea a ɛwɔ U.S na na hwehwɛ fi ahorow a ɛbae asasewoso no akyi mu.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
hypothesis: Wɔbɛkyerɛw nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe no ho asɛm wɔ Intanɛt dwumadibea bi so.
reference: Sɛ wɔto hama hu sɛnea tupae no sɛe nneɛma wiei a, wɔde bɛgu abɛɛfo ahoma ntentan so.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
hypothesis: Ohio mpanyimfo ka sɛ wɔde owudi a emu yɛ den bɛto ɔyaresafo bi a na ɔyɛ adwuma wɔ Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania Mmofra Yareɛbea no so bere a wohui sɛ ne maame awu wɔ ne kar kotoku mu no.
reference: Mpaninfo a wɔwɔ Ohia ka sɛ wɔbɛbɔ dɔkota bi a ɔyɛ adwuma wɔ Mmɔfra ayaresabea wɔ Pittsburgh,Pennsylvania no kwaadu bere wɔhunu sɛ wɔadi ne maame awu de no ahyɛ ne kaa akyi Wukuada.

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
