hypothesis: Wɔhuu Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, a wadi mfe 29, wɔ Blue Ash, Ohio, kurow bi a ɛwɔ Cincinnati atifi fam bɛyɛ kilomita 15 mu sɛ ɔda fam wɔ ɔkwan no nkyɛn baabi a ɔhyɛ T-shirt ne ne ntade mu wɔ tebea bi a ɛte sɛ nea wɔde nnuru pii ahyɛ mu.
reference: Wɔhunuu Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, wɔ Blue Ash, Ohio, a ɛyɛ mpatam bi a ɛyɛ maale 15 wɔ Cincinnati atifi sɛ ɔda fam wɔ kwan ho a ɔhye T-shirt na ɔhyɛ ade wɔ n’ase a na ayɛ sɛ obi a wafa aduru kɛse paa bi.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
hypothesis: Ɔka kyerɛɛ asraafo no sɛ wɔnkɔ ne Oldsmobile Intrigue a na ɛwɔ akyirikyiri bɛyɛ mita 500 no so.
reference: Ɔkyerɛɛ mpaninfo kwan kɔɔ Oldsmobile Intrigue a ɛyɛ tuntum no mu a na ɛwɔ fiiti no 500.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
hypothesis: Ɛhɔ na wohuu Saroja Balasubramanian a wadi mfe 53 no amu a wɔde ntama a mogya ahyɛ mu no.
reference: Ɛhɔ na wɔhunuu Saroja Balasubramanian, 53 sɛ wɔde kuntu bi a na mogya ayɛ no twɔnn akyekyere no.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
hypothesis: Polisifo kae sɛ ɛda adi sɛ afunu no atena hɔ bɛyɛ da koro.
reference: Polisifo ka sa ayɛ sɛ deɛ amu no ada hɔ bɛyɛ da koro.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
hypothesis: Wɔbɔɔ amanneɛ sɛ yare no ho nsɛm a edi kan bae wɔ afe yi mu wɔ July awiei mu.
reference: Wɔbɔɔ yare no amannebɔ sa bere yi mu wɔ Kitawonsa awiee.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
hypothesis: Apuru na wɔde yare no ba, na ɛno akyi no, ntontom na ɛfa mu ba nnipa so.
reference: Yare no wɔ mprako mu, na ɛnam so tumi sae nnipa denam ntontom so.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
hypothesis: Ɔyaredɔm no ama India aban no afa akwan horow te sɛ, wɔde wɔn a wɔkyekyere mprako wɔ mmeae a ɔhaw no ano yɛ den mu, wɔkyekyɛ ntokuru nketewa mpempem pii, ne nnua a wɔde sɛe mmoawammoawa.
reference: Yare a etuu atese no maa India aban no tu anammɔn pɛɛ wɔn a wɔbɛkyere mprako no wɔ mmeae a yare no atu ate se no, wɔakyeyɛ ntontom nnan mpempem ne nnuro a wɔde supree wɔn.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
hypothesis: Afei nso, aban no ahyɛ ɔyaredɔm mmoawa ɔpepem pii ho bɔ, na ɛbɛboa ama wɔatumi asiesie apɔwmuden dwumadibea ahorow ama afe a ɛreba no.
reference: Aban no ahyɛ encephalitis a ɛwowɔ ntoa nkumaa bi mu ho bɔ , a ɛbɛboa ama wɔaboaboa apomuden asoe no ano ama afeda.

source: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.
hypothesis: Nhyehyɛe a wɔayɛ sɛ wɔde nnuru bɛkɔ mmeae a ɛhaw no kɛse wɔ abakɔsɛm mu afe yi mu no twentwɛn so esiane sika a enni hɔ nti ne ɛho botae a enni hɔ wɔ yare afoforo ho nti.
reference: Nhyehyɛe a wɔyɛɛ sɛ wɔde nnuro bɛkɔ mmeae atu atese no twetwɛnn kakra esiane sikasɛm nti ne yare no a wɔamma ɛho anhia wɔn paa kɛse te sɛ yare nkae no nti.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
hypothesis: Wɔ 1956 mu no, Słania tu kɔɔ Sweden, na mfe abiɛsa akyi no, ofii ase yɛɛ adwuma wɔ Swedish Post Office, na ɔbɛyɛɛ wɔn animdefo panyin.
reference: 1956 mu Słania ti kɔɔ Sweden, na akyi yi ɔfii ase yɛɛ adwuma Swedish Poos Ɔfese na ɔbɛyɛɛ wɔn engraver panin.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
hypothesis: Ɔyɛɛ nkrataa bɛboro 1,000 maa Sweden ne aman foforo 28.
reference: Ɔyeyɛɛ setampo no bɛboro 1,000 maa Sweden ne aman ahorow.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
hypothesis: Nea ɔyɛe no yɛ adwuma a wonim no yiye na emu nsɛm ho hia araa ma ɔyɛ nnipa kakraa bi a wɔfrɛ wɔn "abusuafo din" wɔ wɔn a wɔyɛ philatelists mu no mu biako.
reference: Na n’adwuma no sɔ ani ara ɔka “nnipa kakra a wɔbɔ wɔn din no ho” wɔ wɔn a na wɔyeyɛ setaampo no mu. Ebinom ahyɛ da de wɔn ani asi sɛnea wɔbɛboaboa ne dwumadi nko ara no so.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
hypothesis: Ne nsɔwano a ɛto so 1,000 ne "Sweden Ahemfo Nnwuma Kɛse" a David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl yɛe wɔ afe 2000 mu a ɛwɔ Guinness World Records Nhoma mu no.
reference: David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl wɔ 2000 ka sɛ ne setampo a ɛtɔ so 1,000 no yɛ fɛ “Adwuma sronn a ɛfiri Sweden Hene” na ɛwɔ Guinness Book of rɛkɔd a wɔyɛ Wiase nyinaa twerɛtohɔ wom no.

source: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.
hypothesis: Afei nso, na ɔyɛ nnwinnade wɔ aman pii mu, na nnansa yi na ɔyɛe a, na ɔyɛ adwuma no bi te sɛ Ɔmampanyin no mfonini a ɛwɔ Canada $5 ne $100 nnwinnade foforo no anim.
reference: Wɔyeyɛɛ adwinni totoo amanaman sika so, ɛho nhwɛso a ɔyɛɛ no nansa yi deɛ Mansoafo Panin no mfoni a ɛda Canadian $5 sika foforo no so ne bills a ɛyɛ $100 no so no.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
hypothesis: Bere a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no, wɔde Gibson kɔɔ ayaresabea nanso ankyɛ na owui.
reference: Akwanhyia no akyi no,wɔde Gibson kɔɔ ayaresabea nanso ɛno akyi ankyɛ koraa na ɔwui.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
hypothesis: Ɔdefo a wadi mfe 64 no anyɛ hwee wɔ akwanhyia no mu.
reference: Truck drɔba a na wadi mfe 64, ne ho anka wɔ akwanhyia no mu.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
hypothesis: Wɔfaa kar no ankasa fii baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no wɔ saa da no ara bɛyɛ 1200 GMT.
reference: Ɛbɔɔ bɛyɛ 1200 GMT da no ara akwanhyia no siiɛ no wɔfaa hyɛn firiii faako akwnahyia no siiɛ no.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
hypothesis: Obi a na ɔreyɛ adwuma wɔ garaje bi a ɛbɛn baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no kae sɛ: "Na mmofra retwɛn sɛ wobetwa kwan no, na na wɔn nyinaa teɛteɛm na wɔresu".
reference: Nipa bi na ɔreyɛ adwuma wɔgaraagye bi a ɛbɛn baabi akwanhyia no siiɛ no kaa sɛ; “ Na mmɔfra bi retwɛn sɛ wɔbɛtwa kwan no mu na wɔreteatea mu na na wɔresu.”

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
hypothesis: Wɔn nyinaa fii baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no san tuu mmirika.
reference: Wɔn nyinaa guan firii baabi na akwanhyia no asi no.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
hypothesis: Nneɛma foforo a wɔaka ho asɛm wɔ Bali dwumadibea no mu no bi ne wiase kwae a aka no ho banbɔ, ne mfiri a wɔde bɛboa aman a wɔrenya nkɔso no ama wɔatumi anya nkɔso wɔ akwan a ɛho ntew so.
reference: Nnɛma ahorow a ɛda pono so wɔbɛssusu ho wɔ Bali ne sɛnea wɔbɛbɔ kwae a aka wiase no ho ban, wɔne wɔn ho wɔn bɛkyekyɛ tɛknogyi na ama aman atutu mpɔn wɔ akwan ɛnsɛe nneɛma pii so.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
hypothesis: Amanaman Nkabom no ani da so nso sɛ wɔbɛhyehyɛ ntoboa bi a wɔde bɛboa aman a wiase ahohuru ama ato wɔn no ma wɔatumi agyina ɔhaw no ano.
reference: U.N. no hwɛ kwan wɔn nsa bɛka sika de asɔ aman a wiase nsesae akɔfa ɔhaw abrɛ na ama wɔadi ɔhaw ɛde abrɛ wɔn yi so.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
hypothesis: Wobetumi de sika no akɔ afie a nsu nni mu, nsu a wɔde di dwuma yiye, ne nnɔbae ahorow a wɔde di dwuma yiye mu.
reference: Wɔde sika no bɛhyɛ afa a ɛyɛ adan a nsuo no ntumi nyiri mfa no, nsuo ho ntotoe papa na wɔaduadua nnɔbae ahorow pii.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
hypothesis: Fluke kyerɛwee sɛ mmɔden a ebinom bɔe sɛ wɔbɛka mmea ho asɛm wɔ mmea apɔwmuden ho no anyɛ yiye.
reference: Fluke kyerɛɛw sɛ mmɔden a ebinom bɔe sɛ wɔbɛma mmea akasa a ɛfa mmea apomudenno anyɛ yiye.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
hypothesis: Ɔbaa ne ɔbarima bi de nkakrankakra maa no nkakrankakra, na wɔhyɛɛ no nkuran sɛ wɔmfa nyinsɛn ho aduru nyɛ nnuru a ɛho hia wɔ ayaresa mu.
reference: Ɔde saa asɛm yi too gua bere a ne nsa kaa amannebɔ firii mmea ne mmarima hɔ sɛ aduru a wɔde si nyinsɛn ano yɛ aduru bi a ɛho hia yiye paa.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
hypothesis: Bere a wɔde wɔn a wɔapirapira no kɔɔ ayaresabea no, bere a ɔko no gyaee no, nneduafo a aka no mu bɛyɛ 40 tenaa adiwo hɔ, na wɔampene so sɛ wɔbɛsan akɔ wɔn mpia mu.
reference: Bere a ntɔkwa no to twaae bere a wɔde apirafo no kɔɔ ayaresabea, nneduafo no a wɔaka akyi no bɛyɛ 40 na wɔyɛɛ sɛ wɔnkɔ wɔn cells no mu bio,

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
hypothesis: Adwumayɛfo no bɔɔ mmɔden sɛ wobesiesie tebea no, nanso nneduafo no ahiade nteɛ.
reference: Wɔn a wɔne afoforɔ kasa ma ntease yɛ adwuma no yɛɛ sɛ wɔbɛdi tebea no dwuma, nanso nea nneduafo no rehwehwɛ no mu nna hɔ.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
hypothesis: Efi anadwo nnɔn 10:00 kosi nnɔn 11:00 no, nneduafo no hyehyɛɛ ogya wɔ adiwo hɔ.
reference: Ɛbɔɔ bɛyɛ anwummere 10:00-11:00 MDT, nneduafo no de ogya too beae hɔ.

source: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.
hypothesis: Ankyɛ koraa na asraafo bi a wɔde basabasayɛ ho nneɛma hyɛɛ wɔn nsa bɛhyɛn dan no mu, na wɔde nusu guan hyɛɛ nneduafo no mu.
reference: Ankyɛ koraa na adwumayɛfo a wɔakwdare wɔ sɛnea wɔsi basabasayɛ ano no wuraa yaade no mu na wɔde tear gas dii dwuma de dii nneduafo no so nkunim.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
hypothesis: Awiei koraa no, asraafodɔm no kyekyeree ogya no anadwo 11:35.
reference: Dumgyafo tumi dumm gya no bere a ɛbɔɔ anwummere 11:35.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
hypothesis: Bere a wosii ɔtare no wɔ afe 1963 mu no, wogyaee nsu yiri a na ɛbɔ wɔ asubɔnten no mu no.
reference: Bere a wɔsii dam no afe 1963 no, nsuo a bere ano bere ano a ne sediment no ɛbɛtrɛ akɔ asubɔnten mu no gyae.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
hypothesis: Ná ɛho hia sɛ wɔhyehyɛ asau ne mpoano, na ɛno na ɛma mmoa tenaa hɔ.
reference: Na sediments no hia na wɔatumi ayeyɛ sandbars ne beaches a na ɛyɛ bea a mmoa de yɛ wɔn atenae.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
hypothesis: Ɛno nti, apataa ahorow abien afi hɔ, na ebi abien nso wɔ hɔ a asiane wom, a humpback chub ka ho.
reference: Ne saa nti, mpataa abien na wɔn ho akɔ atwee, na abien nso na wɔn ase ahye a humpback chub ka ho.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
hypothesis: Ɛwom sɛ nsu a ɛwɔ asase so no bɛsɔre wɔ nsuyiri no akyi bɛyɛ mita kakraa bi deɛ, nanso mpanyimfo no hwɛ kwan sɛ ɛbɛdɔɔso ama wɔatumi asan asiesie anwea a ɛwɔ nsu no mu no.
reference: Ɛwom so sɛ nsuo ba soro bere nsu ayire no de, mpanimfo gye di sɛ ɛbɛyɛ sɛ ɛma sandbars a ahohoro asi ne dada mu.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
hypothesis: Wɔamfa tsunami ho kɔkɔbɔ biara amma, na Jakarta asasewosow ho dwumadibea no kyerɛ sɛ, wɔremma tsunami ho kɔkɔbɔ biara mma efisɛ asasewosow no anyɛ kɛse a ɛboro 6.5.
reference: Wɔmɔɔ tsunami ho kɔkɔ biara, na sɛnea Jakarta geophysics asoɛ no kyerɛ no, wɔmmɔ tsunami biara ho kɔkɔ esiane sɛ asase woso no nnuru magnitude 6.5 ahwehwɛde no ho.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
hypothesis: Ɛwom sɛ na tsunami ho asiane biara nni hɔ de, nanso nnipa a wɔte hɔ no fii ase bɔɔ hu, na wofii ase gyaw wɔn nnwuma ne wɔn afie hɔ.
reference: Ɛmfa ho sɛ asaasewosow a esii wↄ po mu biara nni hɔ no, temanmufo no fii ase bɔɔ hu na wɔguan gyaa wɔn nnwuma na wɔfifii wɔn afie mu.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
hypothesis: Ɛwom sɛ Winfrey fii ase sui de, nanso ɔmaa emu daa hɔ pefee sɛ ɔbɛsan aba.
reference: Ɛwom sɛ na Winfrey werɛ aho wɔ ne nkradi a etwa to no mu, ɔmaa n’akyitaa fo tee ase sɛ ɔbɛsan aba.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
hypothesis: "Eyi renyɛ adepa. Eyi yɛ ti biako a etwa to ne ti foforo a etwa to".
reference: “ Wei ɛnkɔyɛ nkradie a ɛtwa to. Wei yɛ briri emu to na ebue biribi foforo nso kwan.”

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
hypothesis: Namibia manpanyin ne ɔmanpanyin abatoɔ no awiei nsunsuanso no kyerɛ sɛ wɔasan apaw ɔmanpanyin a ɔda hɔ yi, Hifikepunye Pohamba, wɔ mmirika kɛse mu.
reference: Nsunsuanso a etwa to a efiri Namibia ɔmanpanin ne mmarahyɛbagua abato no kyerɛ sɛ ɔmanpanin a ɔte agua so no Hifikepunye Pohamba adi nkunim na mma ɔde dii nkunim no dɔɔso paa yiye.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
hypothesis: Ɔfã a wodi tumi a wɔfrɛ no South West Africa People's Organization (SWAPO) nso nyaa mmaransɛm no mu dodow no ara.
reference: Amannyɔku a ɛredi tumi a ɛyɛ South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), tumi nyaa mmarahyɛbagua nkongua dodow no ara wɔ abato no mu.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
hypothesis: Amanamanmufo ne Afghanistanfo asraafo kɔɔ mpɔtam hɔ sɛ wɔmmɛhwɛ saa beae no so, na wɔsomaa amanamanmufo wimhyɛn foforo sɛ wɔnkɔboa wɔn.
reference: Coalition ne Afghan asraafo kɔ beae hɔ kɔgyee hɔ bɔɔ so na ɔsomaa coalition afoforo wimhyɛn sɛ ɛnkɔ hɔ nkɔ boa.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
hypothesis: Ná atoyerɛnkyɛm no asi wɔ mmepɔw so, na wogye di sɛ atamfo gya na efii mu bae.
reference: Nkwanhyia no sii wɔ mmeae a na ɛhɔ yɛ mmepɔ mmepɔ, na wɔgye di ɛno na ɛkɔ faa gya hyehyeɛ no baae.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
hypothesis: Bere a wɔrehwehwɛ baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no, na wim tebea ne asase no yɛ den.
reference: Mmɔden wɔrebɔ sɛ wɔbɛhunu beae a nkwanhyia no sii no nyɛ yiye esiane wim tebea a ɛnyɛ papa nti.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
hypothesis: Ayaresafo aboafo a wɔfrɛ wɔn Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres ne Wiase Nyinaa Akwahosan Ahyehyɛde no ka sɛ ɛno ne yare a ɛyɛ hu sen biara a wɔayɛ ho kyerɛwtohɔ wɔ ɔman no mu.
reference: Medical charity Mangola no, Medecines Sans Frontieres ne Wiase Apomuden Ahyehyɛde no ka sɛ ɛyɛ biribi esen biara a asi wɔ ɔman no mu.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
hypothesis: Medecines Sans Frontiere ananmusifo Richard Veerman kae sɛ: "Angola rekɔ ne yare a ɛyɛ hu sen biara no mu, na tebea no da so ara yɛ bɔne wɔ Angola", ɔkae.
reference: Kasamafo ma Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman kaa sɛ: “ Angola rekɔ baabi a ɛyɛ hu a na asɛm da so ara nnyɛ wɔ Angola,ɔno na ɔkae.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
hypothesis: Ná agorɔ no fi ase anɔpa nnɔn du, na na ewim yɛ fɛ, na na osu a ɛretɔ anɔpa a ɛretɔ ntɛmntɛm no akyi no, na ɛyɛ da pa a ɛsɛ sɛ yedi rugby.
reference: Akansi no fii ase anɔpa nnɔndu (10:00am) na wim yɛ kama pa agye nsu kakra a pete anɔpa tutuutu no. Na da no yɛ kama 7’s rugby.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
hypothesis: Afrika Anafo fam a wɔyɛ nkonimdifo wɔ nkonimdi no mu no fii ase wɔ ɔkwan a ɛfata so bere a wodii nkonimdi 26 - 00 wɔ Zambia a ɔyɛ nkonimdifo a ɔto so 5 no so.
reference: South Africa man no bɔɔ wɔ ho mmɔden mfitiase pɛɛ, ɛno nti ɛma wɔhyɛɛ aduonu asia (26) de dii nkonim a Zambia man no antumi ante ɛka no mu biako mpo.

source: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.
hypothesis: Nanso bere a na South Africa ne wɔn nuanom mmea a wɔwɔ anafo fam no redi agorɔ no, na wɔn ani nnye ho koraa.
reference: Akansi no mu yɛ den wɔ South Africafo fam ne wɔ nuammanom a wɔwɔ anafo fam no bɔ wɔ ho mmɔden tu mpɔn bere a na akansi no kɔ anim no.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
hypothesis: Wɔn ahohyɛso a edi mũ, sɛnea wɔde bɔmm di dwuma, ne kuw mu adwuma a wɔyɛe no maa wɔn ho dwiriw wɔn, na na ɛda adi pefee sɛ kuw yi na ɛsɛ sɛ wɔko tia.
reference: Ɔkwan a bɔɔlobɔfo fa so danedane bɔɔlo no, bɔ wɔn bea ho ban wɔ agoprama no so, sɛnea wɔn nnyinaa bɔɔmu yɛ adwuma wɔ agoprama no so no, na ɛyɛ sononko koraa ɛma no da adi sɛ wɔn na wɔbɛdi nkonim wɔ akansi no awie.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
hypothesis: Amsterdam kurow ne Anne Frank Ahorow Nhyiam Asa no mpanyimfo ka sɛ nnua no wɔ mmoawammoawa bi mu, na ɛde asiane ba ɔman apɔwmuden so, efisɛ wɔka sɛ asiane wom sɛ ɛbɛhwe ase.
reference: Mpaninfo a wɔwɔ Amsterdam ne Anne Frank misiɔm ka sɛ yare wɔ nnua no mu na ɛde yare brɛ ɔmanfo nyinaa na wɔka sɛ na ɛyɛ hu sɛ ɛbetu atese.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
hypothesis: Ná wɔahyehyɛ sɛ wobekum no Dwoda, nanso wɔagye no nkwa bere a asɛnnibea no de asɛnnennen sii gyinae no.
reference: Wɔayɛ nhyehyɛe sɛ wɔntwa wɔ Benada, nanso wɔtwe sensenn bere kɔɔto buae putupru mu.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
hypothesis: Wɔfrɛɛ amoa no mu biara sɛ "Anuanom Baason" na ne ntini bɛyɛ mita 100 kosi 250 (328 kosi 820).
reference: Abodan no ano nyinaa, wɔtoo din " Nuammaanom Nson No", kɛseɛ yɛ mita 100 kɔsi 250 (fiit 328 kɔsi 820) wɔ trɛ mu.

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
hypothesis: Anuanom a wɔwɔ asase so no ahu sɛ awia ne anadwo asorɔkye no nsesa, na ɛma yehu sɛ ɛbɛyɛ sɛ wɔyɛ amoa.
reference: Infrared imfoni kyerɛ sɛ tɛmperekya a ɛda nso firi anadwo ne adekyee no kyerɛ sɛ ɛbɛtumi ayɛ bodan.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
hypothesis: "Wɔdwo sen asase a atwa wɔn ho ahyia awia ne anadwo.
reference: Ɛhɔ yɛ nwonu kyɛn beae hɔ wɔ adekyee na wim yɛ nwonu anadwo.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
hypothesis: Wɔn ho nyɛ den te sɛ amoa akɛse a ɛwɔ asase so a wɔtaa yɛ wɔn ho ahometew no, nanso ɛne sɛ wɔyɛ amoa a emu dɔ wɔ fam no hyia", sɛnea United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team ne Northern Arizona University a ɛwɔ Flagstaff, Arizona no muni Glen Cushing kae no.
reference: Glen Cushing a ɔwɔ United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Kuo na ɛwɔ Northern Arizona Suapɔn mu wɔ l Flagstaff, Arizona kaa sɛ; “Wɔn thermal no su nsesa te abodan akɛse wɔ asase so a daa ne tɛmperekya no gyina faako, nanso ɛne no hyia wɔ ntokuro akɛse a ɛwɔ fam no” .

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
hypothesis: Wɔ France no, amanne biara mu no, na nnipa a wɔpaw wɔn no nni nimdeɛ pii: Wɔn a wɔpaw wɔn no twe wɔn ho fi wɔn ho wɔ ɔdan bi mu, na wɔde krataa bi a wɔde akyerɛkyerɛ wɔn a wɔpɛ sɛ wɔpaw wɔn no gu nhoma mmobɔwee bi mu.
reference: Wɔ France, aba a wɔto wɔ tech-kwan so no wɔ fam: wɔn a wɔto aba no te wɔn ho wɔ booth no mu, de krataa wɔaprente a ɛkyerɛ deɛ wɔpɛ no de hyɛ envelope mu.

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
hypothesis: Bere a mpanyimfo no hu sɛ ɔpawfo no yɛ onipa bɛn no, ɔpawfo no de nkrataa no gu nkotoku no mu na ɔkyerɛw ne nsa gu nkrataa no so.
reference: Sɛ mpaninfo no hunu atofo no nipa ko a, atofo de envelope no hyɛ abato adaka no na ɔde wɔn nsa hyɛ abato roll no ase.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
hypothesis: France mmaransɛm mmara de mmara a emu yɛ den di dwuma.
reference: French abato mmara no wɔ nhyehyɛe ketee ɛfa proceedings ho.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
hypothesis: Efi afe 1988 reba no, ɛsɛ sɛ wɔde nhyiamu nnua no di dwuma wɔ ɔkwan bi so a ɛbɛma afifidefo ne ahwɛfo ahu sɛ nkotoku biara nni hɔ bere a wɔredi toto no, na wɔmmfa nkotoku biara nka ho, gye wɔn a wɔkan wɔn ho na wɔama wɔn tumi no nko ara.
reference: Ɛfiri 1988, na abato nnaka no ɛyɛ deɛ wohwɛ mu a wohunu deɛ ɛwom sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a bɛhwɛadefo bɛhunu sɛ envelope biara nnim ansa na wɔrefi aba to ase ne afei wɔamfa envelope biara anka ho gye deɛ wɔakenkan ne atofo a mmara ma kwan no.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
hypothesis: Wɔn a wɔpɛ sɛ wɔpaw wɔn ho no betumi asoma wɔn ananmusifo ma wɔahu nea ɛrekɔ so wɔ nhyiam no ase.
reference: Wɔan a wɔgyina maa wɔtoo wɔn so aba no bɛtumi ama ananmusifo abɛhwɛ deɛ ɛrekɔ so no nyinaa. Anwummere no, atuhoamafo kenken abato no bere a wɔhwɛ deɛ ɛrekɔ so no yiye bere a wɔredi akwankyerɛ pɔtee bi so.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
hypothesis: ASUS Eee PC, a wodii kan yii no adi wɔ wiase nyinaa de hwɛɛ sikasɛm ne dwumadi ho nneɛma no, bɛyɛɛ asɛmti kɛse wɔ 2007 Taipei IT Month mu.
reference: Ɛnkyɛɛe na ASUS Eee PC, daa world-wide ɛma cost-saving ne functionality faktɛs, bɛyɛɛ asɛmti kɛse paa wɔ 2007 Tapei IT Bosome.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
hypothesis: Nanso bere a ASUS nsa kaa Taiwan Sustainable Award a China Republic's Executive Yuan de mae wɔ afe 2007 mu no, kɔmputa a wɔde di dwuma wɔ kɔmputa so de, wɔbɛsesa koraa.
reference: Nanso consumer market a ɛwɔ laptop kɔmputa so no bɛda nso na asesa bere wɔbɔɔ ASUS no aba so wɔ 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award a ɛfiri Executive Yuan a ɛwɔ Republic of China.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
hypothesis: Intanɛt dwumadibea no Intanɛt dwumadibea no kyerɛkyerɛ dwumadi no mu sɛ "ɔ sukuu dedaw radio agodibea a wɔabɔ ho ban foforo a ɛyɛ nwonwa!"
reference: Siteehyin no wɛbsaet kyerɛkyerɛ dwumadi no mu sɛ “ sɛ old sukuu radio theater a geeky spin foforo a na ɛyɛ nwonwa.

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
hypothesis: Wɔ ne nna a edi kan mu no, na Intanɛt dwumadibea a agye din TogiNet Radio nkutoo na wɔde dwumadi no di dwuma.
reference: Wɔ ne nna edi nkan mu no, dwumadi no kɔɔ so wɔ ntanɛte radio so bere tenten wɔ radio no site a ɛyɛ TogiNet Radio, site wɔn ani ku radio so kasa ho.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
hypothesis: Wɔ afe 2015 awiei no, TogiNet de AstroNet Radio sii hɔ sɛ baa dwumadibea.
reference: 2015 awiee, TogiNet tee AstroNet Radio sɛ siteehyin no fa no bi.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
hypothesis: Mfiase no, na wɔyɛ amateur voice actors wɔ East Texas.
reference: Dwumadi no de sini twafo a wɔde nne di dwuma na edii dwuma, a wɔn a wɔwɔ Texas Apuei fam nim

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
hypothesis: Wobu akontaa sɛ adwotwa no kɔɔ so anadwo no nyinaa, esiane sɛ na mmarahyɛfo nni hɔ wɔ Bishkek mmɔnten so nti.
reference: Nneɛma wɔfom fa buu so anadwo fa yi, esiane sɛ na banbɔfo nni Bishkek sitiriit.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
hypothesis: Ɔhwɛfo bi kyerɛe sɛ Bishkek kɔ "ahokyere" mu, bere a nkurɔfo akuwakuw tu mmirika wɔ mmɔnten so na wɔresɛe nnwumakuw a wɔtɔn nneɛma wɔ hɔ no.
reference: Bɛhwɛadrni biako bi ka sɛ na Bishkek reyɛ akɔyɛ sɛ baabi a “basabasayɛ rekɔ so”, bere nnipa too wɔn ho guu mmɔten so fomm nkrɔfo sotɔɔ mu nneɛma.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
hypothesis: Bishkekfo pii kae sɛ mmara a ɛnteɛ no fa nnipa a wofi anafo fam no ho.
reference: Wɔn a wɔtete Bishkek bɔɔ ayɛkyerɛfo a wɔfiri anafo wɔ basabasayɛ no ho.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
hypothesis: South Africa adi All Blacks (New Zealand) so nkonim wɔ rugby union Tri Nations mu wɔ Royal Bafokeng Stadium wɔ Rustenburg, South Africa.
reference: South Africa ahyɛ All Black (New Zealand) wɔ rugby union Tri Nations match wɔ Royal Bafokeng Stadium ɛwɔ Rustenburg, South Africa.

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
hypothesis: Nsrahwɛ a etwa to no yɛ nkonimdi a wɔde pon biako na ewiee, 21 kosi 20, na All Blacks no dii nkonimdi mpɛn 15.
reference: Sokɔɔ a etwa to yɛ pɔint-biako, 21 kɔ si 20, na ɛmaa All Black nkunim a wɔdi toatoaa so 15 ba awiee.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
hypothesis: Wɔ Springboks no fam no, na wɔadi nkonimdi mpɛn anum.
reference: Ɛdema Springboks, ɛkɔ wiee match-nnum a wɔdi streak totoaa so.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
hypothesis: Ná ɛyɛ All Blacks a wonyaa nkonimbo no nnawɔtwe abien a atwam ni no nsa ano ko a etwa to.
reference: Na ɛyɛ akansi a etwa to ma All Blacks na wɔadi kan adi nkunim nnawɔtwe abien a na atwam no.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
hypothesis: Nnawɔtwe a edi hɔ no, wobedi nkonimdi no wɔ Ellis Park wɔ Johannesburg, bere a Springboks ne Australia redi agorɔ no.
reference: Akansi a etwa to no bɛkɔ so wɔ Ellis Prama so wɔ nnawɔtwe a edi hɔ wɔ Johannesburg, bere a Springboks no ne Australi bɛsi akan.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
hypothesis: Asasewosow bi a ano yɛ den sɔree Montana atɔe fam wɔ Dwoda anɔpa 10:08.
reference: Asasewoso a ano nyɛ den maa Montana atɔefo ho dwirii wɔn wɔ Dwoada anwwumere 10:08.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
hypothesis: United States Geological Survey (USGS) ne ne National Earthquake Information Center anhu sɛ nneɛma asɛe ntɛm ara.
reference: United States Geological Survey (USGS) ne Ɔman mu Asasewosow Nsɛm ho Asoe nsa nkaa amannebɔ sɛ biribi asɛe.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
hypothesis: Asasewosow no sii wɔ Dillon atifi apuei fam bɛyɛ kilomita 20 ne Butte anafo fam bɛyɛ kilomita 65.
reference: Na asasewoso no gyina 20 km (maale 15) wɔ Dillon atifi-atifiapue ne 65 km (maale 40) wɔ Butte anafo.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
hypothesis: Wɔahu sɛ nnomaa nsamanwaw a ɛkum nnipa a wɔfrɛ no H5N1 no afa wuram mmoadabi a wɔahu no Dwoda da a etwaam wɔ sare so baabi a ɛbɛn Lyon wɔ France apuei fam no mu.
reference: Nkekae a ɛfi nnomaa kɔ nnipa mu no, H5N1, ada adi sɛ aka daabodaabo a wɔawuwu, wɔhunuu no Dwoada wɔ marshland a ɛbɛn Lyon wɔ France apue.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
hypothesis: France yɛ ɔman a ɛto so ason wɔ European Union a wonya yare yi; edi Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece ne Italy akyi.
reference: France ne kuro a ɛtɔ so nson wɔ European Union a yaremmoawa no kaa wɔn; a edi Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece ne Italy so.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
hypothesis: H5N1 ho nsɛm a wosusuw sɛ ɛrekɔ so wɔ Croatia ne Denmark no nnya mmae.
reference: wɔate sɛ H5N1 yare no abɛpue mu wɔ Croatia ne Denmark a wɔnsii pi.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
hypothesis: Ná Chambers abɔ Onyankopɔn sobo wɔ "asase so nnipa ɔpepem pii wu, sɛe, ne awudisɛm ho".
reference: Chambers asaman Onyankopɔn wɔ “ awuwuawu, ɔsɛe ne awurukasɛm wɔ wɔn a wɔtete Asase so ɔpepem pii mu no.

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
hypothesis: Chambers, a onnye nni sɛ Onyankopɔn wɔ hɔ no, ka sɛ n'asɛm no yɛ "abamammɔ" na "obiara betumi abɔ obiara sobo".
reference: Chambers, ɛyɛ agnostic, ka sɛ nsaman no yɛ “nni nnyinaso” na “obiara tumi saman obi”.

source: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
hypothesis: Nsɛm a Camille Saint-Saens kyerɛw wɔ Franse opera no mu no fa obi a "ɔdɔ nnubɔne ne Japan na ɛma n'asetena yɛ papa" ho.
reference: Asɛm no sɛnea French opera, Camille Saint-Saens,de too gua no, a”wɔde n’aseta nyinaa sii hɔ maa nnubɔne ne Japan.”

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
hypothesis: Nea enti a wɔyɛ saa ne sɛ, nnwontofo no nom nnubɔne wɔ pon so, na sini no ankasa hyɛ nnipakuw no nkuran sɛ wɔnka ho.
reference: Wei nti, agofo no nom kanabisi wɔ prama so, na theatre no mpo hyɛ bɛhwɛadefo nkuran sɛ wɔmfa wɔn ho nhyɛ mu.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
hypothesis: Newt Gingrich, Texas amrado Rick Perry, ne Congresswoman Michele Bachmann a na ɔsan yɛ Ɔmampanyin wɔ Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛn
reference: Newt Gingrich a ɔyɛ Fie hɔ Kasamafo dada, Texas gɔvna Rick Perry ne congresswoman Michele Bachmann tɔɔ so nnan,nnum ne nsia.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
hypothesis: Bere a aba no bae no, Gingrich kamfoo Santorum, nanso ɔkaa Romney ho nsɛm a ɛyɛ den, efisɛ wɔmaa ɔsatu ho dawuru ahorow a ɛho ntew too gua wɔ Iowa tiaa Gingrich.
reference: Bere a nsunsuanso no bɛtɔɔ gua no Gingrichbɔɔ aba so Santorum, na ɔnhunu asɛm a ɔnka mfa Romney ho, a ɛnam so na wɔkekaa nsɛm a ɛnyɛ faa Gingrich ho wɔ ntoabɔ no mu.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
hypothesis: Perry kae sɛ "ɔbɛsan akɔ Texas akɔhwehwɛ nsrahwɛ a wɔyɛe anadwo yi, na wasusuw sɛ ɔkwan bi wɔ hɔ a mɛfa so adi nkonim wɔ mmirikatu yi mu anaa", nanso akyiri yi ɔkae sɛ ɔbɛkɔ so adi mmirika no na wakodi South Carolina mmirikatu no wɔ January 21 mu.
reference: Perry kaa sɛ ɔbɛsane “ akɔ Texas abɛhwɛ mmuae anadwo yi caucus, we hinaam so sɛ mɛtumi akɔ m’anim wɔ saa akansie yi mu”, nanso ɔka sɛ ɔbɛtoa so agyinam asi akan wɔ Ɔpɛpɔn 21 wɔ South Carolina primary no mu.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
hypothesis: Bachmann a odii nkonim wɔ Ames Straw Poll mu wɔ August mu no sii gyinae sɛ obegyae ne ɔsatu no.
reference: Bachmann a ɔdii nkunim wɔ Ames Straw Abato no mu wɔ Ɔsana asi gyinae sɛ ɔde ntoabɔ no bɛba awiee.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
hypothesis: Wɔde mfoniniyɛfo no kɔɔ Ronald Reagan UCLA ayaresabea, na ɛhɔ na owui.
reference: Wɔde deɛ ɔtwa mfoni no kɔɔ Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, na ɛhɔ na ɔkɔ gyae mu.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
hypothesis: Wɔ amanneɛbɔ bi mu no, Bieber kae sɛ: "Ɛwom sɛ na minni hɔ, na na minni ho dwuma tẽẽ wɔ akwanhyia a emu yɛ awerɛhow yi mu de, nanso m'adwene ne me mpaebɔ ka ɔbaa no abusuafo ho".
reference: Wɔbɔ amanne sɛ ɔwui wɔ ne mfe 20 mu. Nsɛm a ɔde too gua no mu no, Mieber kaa sɛ “ Ɛwom sɛ m’ankasa nka saa akwanhyia yi ho tee de, me nsusui ne me mpaebɔ ka abusua wɔn dehyeɛ ho aka no.

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
hypothesis: Anigyede ho nsɛm ho wɛbsaet TMZ te ase sɛ mfoniniyɛfo no gyinae ne kar wɔ Sepulveda Boulevard no fã foforo so na ɔbɔɔ mmɔden sɛ obetwa polisifo gyinabea no ho mfonini ansa na watwa kwan no na wakɔ so, ma enti California Highway Patrol polisifo a na wɔreyɛ akwantu gyinabea no hyɛɛ no sɛ ɔmfa no mmra, mprenu.
reference: TMZ wɛbsaet a ɛde agodi ho nsɛm to gua ka sɛ mfonitwafo no de ne kaa no sii Sepulveda Boulevard nkyɛn babi sɛ ɔretwi baabi polisi gyina no ,foni ansa na ɔretwa kwan no mu atoa so, ansa na California Highway Patrol polisi dwumayɛni no a ɔrehwɛ sɛ trafike gyina no so rehyɛ no sɛ, ɔnsan ntwa mu, mprɛnu.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
hypothesis: Sɛnea polisifo kyerɛ no, ɛbɛyɛ den sɛ obi a ɔde kar no baa mfoniniyɛfo no so no renni fɔ.
reference: Apolisifo kyerɛ sɛ drɔbani a ɔde kaa bɔ mfonitwafo no anhwɛ ɔmmɔ ne kwaadu biara.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
hypothesis: Esiane sɛ wɔdi agyiraehyɛde 18 pɛ da biara nti, aman pii ntumi nni agyiraehyɛde no so.
reference: Bere aka mɛdaas du nnwɔtwe na ɛhɔ hɔ da mu no nyinaa no, aman pii nsa nkaa mɛdaa podium biara.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
hypothesis: Wɔn mu bi ne Netherlands, a Anna Jochemsen dii nkonimdi a edi kan wɔ mmea mu wɔ Super-G no mu, ne Finland a Katja Saarinen dii nkonimdi a ɛto so du wɔ ade koro no ara mu.
reference: Wɔn a wɔka ho ne Netherlands,a Anna Jochemsen tɔɔ so nkron wɔ mmaa standing clas ɛwɔ Super-G nnora ɛne Finland ɛnna Katja Saarinen tɔɔ so du wɔ dwumadi korɔ no ara mu.

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
hypothesis: Australiafo Mitchell Gourley dii dwuma a ɛto so du wɔ mmarimaa Super-G no mu. Czechfo Oldrich Jelinek dii dwuma a ɛto so dunsia wɔ mmarimaa Super-G no mu.
reference: Australia Mitchell Gourleytɔɔ so du biako wɔ mmarimma standing Super-G no mu. Czech kansifo Oldrich Jelinek tɔɔ so du nsia wɔ mmarimma sitting Super-G no mu.

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
hypothesis: Ná Arly Velasquez a ofi Mexico no di kan wɔ mmarima a wɔtete Super-G no mu. Ná Adam Hall a ofi New Zealand no di kan wɔ mmarima a wɔtete Super-G no mu.
reference: Arly Velasquez a ɔfiri Mexico tɔɔ so du nnum wɔ mmarimma sitting Super-G no mu. New Zealand's Adam Hal tɔɔ so nkron wɔ mmarimma standing Super-G no mu.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
hypothesis: Poland mmarima a wɔn ani afura Maciej Krezel ne animdefo Anna Ogarzynska dii Super-G no mu aduonu abiɛsa. South Korea Jong Seork Park dii aduonu anan wɔ mmarima a wɔtete Super-G no mu.
reference: Poland mmarimma skier a wɔn ani afira Maciej Krezel ne tenenee Anna Ogarzynska tɔɔ so du abiɛsa wɔ Super-G no mu. South Koreani Jong Seork tɔɔ so aduonu nnan wɔ mmarimma sitting Super-G no mu.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
hypothesis: Sɛnea asɛnnibea no kyerɛ no, wɔantotow nneɛma a efi Amanaman Nkabom no atenae no mu yiye, na ɛmaa mmoawammoawa kɔɔ Artibonite Asubɔnten a ɛsen biara wɔ Haiti no mu biako no mu.
reference: ℇde fa asɛm a wɔde kɔɔ asɛnnibea ne sɛ, efi a ɛfi UN nsraban a w’ankora so yiye nti na ɛmaa efi wura asubɔnten Artibonite a ɛyɛ Haiti asubɔnten akɛse no mu biako.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
hypothesis: Haiti Asɛnnibea a Ɛhwɛ Atɛntrenee ne Demokrasia Ho Nsɛm So no de nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe a ɛkyerɛ sɛ Nepalfo a wɔwɔ Amanaman Nkabom no mu a wɔhwɛ ma asomdwoe ba no de yare no baa Haiti a na wɔnnim.
reference: Beaea ɛhwɛ atɛntrenne ne dodow amammui a ɛwɔ Haiti man no mu no ayɛ nhwehwɛmu bi a ɛkyerɛ sɛ Nepal UN banbɔfo no de yare no bɔ wura Haiti man no mu abre a wɔn ani nna.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
hypothesis: Danielle Lantagne a ɔyɛ Amanaman Nkabom ho nimdefo a ɔhwɛ yare no so no kae sɛ ɛbɛyɛ sɛ asomdwoe asraafo na wɔde yare no bae.
reference: Danielle Langtagne, a ɔyɛ UN yare no mu ɔbenfo kae se, ɛda adi sɛ, banbɔfo no na ɛde yare no bae.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
hypothesis: Ná ɔyarefo no akɔ Nigeria, baabi a Ebola mmoawa bi ato no.
reference: Ɔyarefo no akɔ Nigeria, ɛyɛ beae a Ebola yare no bi apuepue hɔ.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
hypothesis: Ayaresabea no adi nhyehyɛe a wɔde di atiridiinini ho dwuma no so, a emu bi ne sɛ wɔde ɔyarefo no tetew ne ho fi afoforo ho sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a afoforo rentumi nnya atiridiinini.
reference: Ayaresabea no adi nheyɛe a wɔde di nsayare ano si no so, a de wɔde ɔyarefo no firi nnipa afoforo mu na yare noasane wɔn no ɛka ho.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.
hypothesis: Ɛwom sɛ ogyaw dwumadi no wɔ afe 1993 mu de, nanso ɔkɔɔ so ara nyaa dɔla ɔpepem pii afe biara.
reference: Ɛwom sɛ ɔfirii show no mu 1993 de ɔkɔɔ so kuraa abodin executive producer no mu, na afe biara ne nsa ka dɔla ɔpepem pii sɛ ne mfasode ‘rɔyaatisi’.

source: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
hypothesis: Kan no, China atesɛm krataa Xinhua bɔɔ amanneɛ sɛ wɔafa wimhyɛn bi.
reference: Nsɛm ho amannebɔ adwumako ɛde Xinhua dii kan de too gua sɛ wɔbɛfa wimhyɛn bi nnommum.

source: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
hypothesis: Akyiri yi amanneɛbɔ bi kyerɛe sɛ wɔde bɔmb hunahunaa wimhyɛn no, na wɔsan de no kɔɔ Afghanistan, na wosii fam wɔ Kandahar.
reference: Akyi yi ɛbɛtɔɔ gua sɛ wɔde topae hunahunaa wɔn na ɛsane de n’ani kyerɛɛ mu wɔ Afghanistan na ɛkɔ sii Kandahar.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
hypothesis: Amanneɛbɔ a edi kan no kyerɛ sɛ wɔanni ho kwan sɛ wimhyɛn no bɛsi fam wɔ Ürümqi akyi no, wɔsan de no kɔɔ Afghanistan.
reference: Amannebɔ a edi kan bɛtɔɔ gua no kyerɛ sɛ wimhyɛn sane ne n’ani kyerɛɛ mu wɔ Afghanistan bere a anka ɛregyina putupuru mu wɔ Ürümqi nanso wɔamma no kwan wɔ hɔ.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
hypothesis: Ahyɛn akwanhyia abu so wɔ Iran, a ɛwɔ ahyɛnsode a ɛrenyin a wɔhwɛ so yiye wɔ amannɔne ne asraafo dwumadi nyinaa mu.
reference: Wimhyɛn ho akwanhyai nnyɛ nna wɔ Iran, akyɛ paa na wɔnnyɛ nsiesie wɔ civil ne asraafo dwumadie mu.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
hypothesis: Ansa na nnawɔtwe yi reba no, polisifo helikopta bi sɛee nnipa baasa, na wɔn mu baasa nso pirapirae.
reference: Nnawɔtwe yi mfiase no, apolisifo helicopter kɔpemm na ekumm nnipa baasa na baasa nso na wɔpirapirae.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
hypothesis: Bosome a etwaam no, Iran nyaa wimhyɛn akwanhyia a ɛyɛ hu sen biara wɔ mfe pii mu bere a wimhyɛn bi a ɛrekɔ Armenia sɛee, na ekum nnipa 168 a na wɔwɔ hɔ no.
reference: Bosome a etwaam mu no Iran hunuu akwanhyia wɔnhunuu bi da wɔ mfefe pii mu bere a wimhyɛn bi a ɛrekɔ Armenia kɔ nyaa akwanhyia na ekumm nnipa 168 a na wɔwom.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
hypothesis: Ɔsram koro no ara mu no, wimhyɛn foforo twaa kwan bi so wɔ Mashhad, na ekum nnipa 17.
reference: Saa bosome korɔ no ara mu no wimhyɛn foforo twi firii kwan so wɔ Mashhad na ɛkɔ pemm ban maa nnipa du nson wuwui.

source: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.
hypothesis: Aerosmith asiesie nnwonto a aka no wɔ wɔn nsrahwɛ no mu.
reference: Aerosmith atwa kɔnsɛɛte no mu wɔ wɔn ntoabɔ no mu.

source: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.
hypothesis: Ná wɔahyɛ da ayɛ United States ne Canada nsrahwɛ kosi September 16.
reference: Na roack band no bere aso sɛ ɛkɔ kyinkyin wɔ Unites States ne Canada kɔsi Ɛbɔ da a ɛtɔ so 16.

source: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.
hypothesis: Murray fii ase dii nkonim wɔ set no mu bere a mmarima baanu no dii dwuma biara wɔ set no mu no.

source: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
hypothesis: Odwontofo Sanju Sharma fii anwummere no ase, na Jai Shankar Choudhary nso dii akyi. Odwontofo Raju Khandelwal kaa ne ho.

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
hypothesis: Lakkha Singh nso yii chhappan bhog bhajan no adi.

source: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.
hypothesis: Wɔ Tokyo Game Show ho dwumadi titiriw a wɔyɛe Dwoda no, Nintendo panyin Satoru Iwata yii nneɛma a wɔde bedi dwuma wɔ Nintendo Revolution console foforo no so adi.
reference: Nintendo baanodani Satoru Iwata anodisɛm a ɔde too gua wɔ Yawoada wɔ Tokyo Agodi Dwumadi ase no, ɔdaa controller design ɛma adwumaku no Nintendo Revolution console a ɛyɛ foforo no adi.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
hypothesis: Ɛte sɛ television remote a wɔde di dwuma no, wɔde nneɛma abien a wɔde si hɔ a ɛbɛn television no so na ɛyɛ adwuma de hu baabi a ɛwɔ wɔ amansan a emu yɛ duru mu.
reference: Ɛsɛ tɛlɛvison remote, controller no de sensors abien a wɔde to tɛlɛvison no nkɛyɛn na akyekyɛm mmiɛnsa.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.
hypothesis: Giancarlo Fisichella nyaa ne kar so tumi, na ankyɛ na ofii ase wiee mmirikatu no.
reference: Giancarlo Fisichella antumi ankora ne kaa ne so na ɔde akansi no baa awiee bere na ɔfirii ase nkyɛee no.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
hypothesis: Ná n'adamfo Fernando Alonso di anim wɔ mmirikatu no fã kɛse no ara mu, nanso ankyɛ koraa na owiee mmirikatu no, na ɛbɛyɛ sɛ n'anim kɔbere a edi anim no ayɛ basaa.
reference: Deɛ a ɔne no wɔ ku no mu Fernando Alonso na ɔdi kan mprɛ pii wɔ akansi no mu na egyaae wɔ pit-stop akyi bere tiwa bi akyi, a ɛbɛyɛ badly tucked wɔ wheel a anim nifa so nti.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.
hypothesis: Sɛnea atesɛm krataa bi kyerɛ no, ɔkae sɛ: "Ɔyɛ obi a n'ani gye paa, na ɔto nnwom nso yiye.
reference: Ɔkaa sɛ ɛnne a ɛfri new conference no ase no kyerɛ sɛ “ Ɔyɛ kama na ɔto nnwom yiye nso”.

source: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."
hypothesis: Bere biara a yefii ase suaa eyi ho ade no, m'ani gyei paa".

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
hypothesis: Bere a wɔde sii hɔ no, simma abiɛsa akyi no, kamera bi a ɛwɔ hyɛn no mu no daa no adi sɛ nsu a wɔde bɔ nneɛma ho ban no bi atetew afi adaka no mu.
reference: Wɔdaa no adi sima 3 mu no, kamera daa insulation ahorow sɛ afiri fango tank no ho.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.
hypothesis: Nanso, wonnye nni sɛ wɔsɛee hyɛn no.
reference: Nanso wɔnhunu sɛ ɛno na asɛe shuttle no.

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
hypothesis: Mfe anum akyi no, mframa bi fi ase bɔ, na simma biako akyi no, mframa no di bɛyɛ kilomita 70 wɔ dɔnhwerew biako mu. Afei osu no ba, nanso na ɛyɛ den, na na ɛso yɛ den araa ma ehintiw wo honam te sɛ ntɛtɛw, na asukɔtweaa fii soro bae, na nkurɔfo bɔɔ hu, teɛteɛɛm, na wɔhwehwɛɛ wɔn ho hyiae.
reference: Dwumadi no kɔɔ so sima nnum mu no, mframa fii ase faae, sima bɛyɛ biako akyi, na mfram no aduru 70km/h... afei osu no tɔe, nanso na ano yɛ den ara ma ɛka wo a ɛte sɛ nea paneɛ awɔ wo no,afei asukɔtwea te guui, nkorɔfoɔ bɔɔ hu na wɔfirii ase teateaamu na wɔbubu faa so.

source: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.
hypothesis: NHK nso kaa sɛ Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuklea tumidi gyinabea a ɛwɔ Niigata mantam mu no reyɛ adwuma pɛpɛɛpɛ.
reference: NHK nso bɔ amanne sɛ Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear pawa plant a ɛwɔ Niigata yɛɛ adwuma sɛnea ɛte no ara.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
hypothesis: Wɔka sɛ afie bɛyɛ 9,400 a ɛwɔ mpɔtam hɔ no nni nsu, na bɛyɛ 100 nni anyinam ahoɔden.
reference: Wɔbɔ amanne sɛ afi bɛyɛ 9400 na na ɛwɔ mantam no mu a na wɔnni nsu na bɛyɛ 100 na ɔnni anyinam nkanea.

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
hypothesis: Akwan bi asɛe, wɔagyae keteke adwuma wɔ mmeae a ɔhaw no ato hɔ no, na wɔde Noto Airport a ɛwɔ Ishikawa mantam mu no ato mu.
reference: Akwan no bi asɛe, ketekwan dwuma pii na ɛyeyɛɛ basaa mmeae a ɛhɔ aka no na Noto Wimhyɛn gyinabea a ɛwɔ Ishikawa no wɔato mu.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
hypothesis: Amanneɛbɔ bi kyerɛ sɛ wɔn a wowuwui no dodow yɛ awotwe, na amanneɛbɔ ahorow a wɔde mae no si so dua sɛ nnipa bɛyɛ 30 na wɔapirapira; nanso yennim wɔn dodow a etwa to.
reference: Amannebɔ bi kyerɛ sɛ nnipa nnwɔtwe na awu, na amannebɔ kyerɛ sɛ nnipa bɛduru 30 na wɔapira[ira nanso yɛnhuu nɔma no ankasa.

source: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.
hypothesis: Nhwehwɛmufo a wɔwɔ suapɔn no mu kae sɛ, sɛ nnuru abien no bom yɛ adwuma a, ɛma ɛyɛ krystal a ebetumi ama nkotodwe no ankɔ so nyɛ adwuma yiye.
reference: Nhwehwɛmufoɔ a wɔwɔ suapɔn no mu no kaa sɛ , “Compound abien no ɛne biako bi ka bom yɛ crystals a ebetumi asi sɛnea asabo yɛ adwuma no ho”.

source: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.
hypothesis: Nhwehwɛmufo no huu sɛ, sɛ wɔde melamine ne cyanuric acid ka ho a, ɛyɛ krystal a ɛba nkate mu.
reference: Nhwehwɛmuyɛfo kyerɛ sɛ crytal a ɛwɔ ɔkra dwonsɔ mu no yɛ melamine ne cyanuric acid na ɛbɛfra.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
hypothesis: Nanso wɔde yɛn nneɛma no mu ɔha mu nkyem 80 tuaa tow wɔ Central America aman so. Yɛhwɛ wo so yiye.
reference: Nanso yɛn nneɛma yɛde kɔ Central American aman so no yɛtua toɔ denam tarrifs so.

source: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.
hypothesis: Ɛte sɛ nea ntease nnim; na ɛnyɛ nea ɛteɛ koraa.
reference: Ntease nni wei mma me, pɛpɛɛpyɛ nyɛ adwuma.

source: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.
hypothesis: Mmea a wɔte hɔ no mu nsupɔwfo baanan anwie wɔn mmirika no, na nsupɔwfo 117 a na wɔwɔ Giant Slalom no mu 45 anwie wɔn mmirika no.
reference: Skiers nnan a wɔwɔ mmea aku no mu na wɔatumi anwie wɔn mmirakatu no naa skierfo 117 na wɔwɔ Giant Slalom no mu 45 na wɔnnya baabi anni wɔ akansi no mu.

source: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.
hypothesis: Crown Office a ɛhwɛ nsɛm ho nsɛm nyinaa so no aka akyerɛ atesɛm krataafo sɛ, anyɛ yiye koraa no, wɔrenka ho asɛm bio kosi sɛ wobedi n'asɛm.
reference: Crown Ɔfese, a ɛhwɛ kwaadu bɔ nyinaa so, ama nsɛnkyerɛwfo ate ase sɛ wɔnkaa hwee bio anyɛ kɔsi wɔbɛbɔ kwaadu ansa.

source: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.
hypothesis: Sɛnea amanneɛbɔ no kyerɛ no, saa krataa no bɛfa nsase ho akasakasa no ho, a na Palestina pɛ sɛ egyina nsase a na ɛwɔ hɔ ansa na afe 1967 Mfinimfini Apuei Ko no reba no so.

source: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

source: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.

source: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.
hypothesis: Ebetumi aba sɛ nsoromma no na ɛma nsu kɔ asase so ne abɔde a ɛwɔ nkwa a ebetumi ama nkwa atena nkwa mu.
reference: Comets bɛtumi ayɛ baabi nsu firi ɛba asase yi so ne organic matter ɛbɛtumi ayɛ protens na aboa nkwa.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
hypothesis: UGqr. Ehud Ur, onguprofesa wezonyango kwiYunivesithi yaseDalhousie eHalifax, eNova Scotia yaye onguSihlalo weClinical and Scientific Division yeCanadian Diabetes Association walumkisa ngelithi uphando lusekuqaleni kwalo.
reference: Ugqirha Ehud Ur, unjingalwazi wezonyango eYunivesithi yasee-Dalhousie e-Halifax, e-Nova Scotia ekwangusihlali wesebe lezophononongo kunye nesayensi kwi-Canadian Diabetes Association, ulumkise ngokuba uphando lusaqala.

source: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
hypothesis: Njengabanye abaphengululi, uyakuthandabuza ukuba unokuphiliswa kusini na isifo seswekile, echaza ukuba ezi ziphumo azisebenzi kubantu abasele benesifo seswekile sohlobo 1.
reference: Njengezinye iingcali, uyathandabuza ukuba ingaba isifo seswekile siyanyangeka na, esazi ukuba ezi zinto azinanto kwenza nabantu esele benesifo seswekile sohlobo 1.

source: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
hypothesis: NgoMvulo, uSara Danius, unobhala osisigxina weKomiti yeNobel yeNcwadi kwiSweden Academy, wabhengeza esidlangalaleni ngexesha lenkqubo kanomathotholo kwiSveriges Radio eSweden ukuba ikomiti, ekungakwazi ukufikelela kuBob Dylan ngokuthe ngqo malunga nokufumana uMvuzo weNobel weNcwadi ka-2016, iyekile imizamo yayo yokufikelela kuye.
reference: NgoMvulo, uSara Danius, unobhala osisigxina weKomiti yeNobel yoNcwadi kwiSweden Academy, uxele esidlangalaleni ngexesha lenkqubo kanomathotholo kwiSveriges Radio eSweden ikomiti, engakwazanga ukumfumana ngqo uBob Dylan ngokuthe ngqo ngokuphumelela i-2016 Nobel Prize kuLwazi, iinzame zayo zokufikelela kuye.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
hypothesis: UDanius wathi, "Okwangoku asenzi nto. Ndifowunele ndaza ndathumela ii-imeyile kumncedisi wakhe osondeleyo ndaza ndafumana iimpendulo ezinobubele. Okwangoku, oko kwanele".
reference: UDanius uthe, "Ngalo mzuzu asenzi nto. Ndinxebelelene ndathumela i-imeyile koyemtu ophangela kufuphi naye ndafumana iimpendulo ezinobuhlobo kakhulu. Okwangoku, oku kwanele."

source: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
hypothesis: Ngaphambilana, i-CEO yeRing, uJamie Siminoff, wathi inkampani yaqala xa ucingo lwakhe lwalungavakali kwivenkile yakhe egaraji yakhe.
reference: Ngaphambili, Igosa Eliphezulu lakwaRing, uJamie Siminoff, wathi le nkampani yaqala xa ibheli kwivenkile yakhe esegaraji yayingasebenzi, ingenzi ngxolo.

source: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.
hypothesis: Wathi wakha ucango lwe-Wi-Fi.
reference: Uye wakha intsimbi yomnyango we-WiFi, wathi.

source: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.
hypothesis: USiminoff wathi ukuthengisa kuye kwanda emva kokubonakala kwakhe ngowama-2013 kwisiqendu seShark Tank apho iphaneli yomboniso yenqabile ukuxhasa ukuqala.
reference: USiminoff uthe ukuthengisa kwandisiwe emva kokubonakala kwakhe ngo-2013 kwisiqendu seShark Tank apho iphaneli yokubonisa yenqabile ukuxhasa ngemali ukuqala kwayo.

source: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
hypothesis: Ngasekupheleni kuka-2017, uSiminoff wabonakala kwisiteshi seTV sokuthenga iQVC.
reference: Ngasekupheleni kuka-2017, uSiminoff kwitshaneli yokuthenga kwiTV enguQVC.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
hypothesis: URing waphinda walungisa ityala kunye nenkampani yokhuseleko ekhuphisanayo, iADT Corporation.
reference: U-Ring waye waliphelisa ityala elisemthethweni nenkampani yokhuseleko ekhuphisanayo , i-ADT Corporation.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
hypothesis: Ngoxa isinye isitofu sokugonya esivavanyiweyo sibonakala sinako ukunciphisa ukufa okubangelwa yiEbola, ukuza kuthi ga ngoku, akuzange kuboniswe ngokucacileyo ukuba akukho mayeza afanelekileyo ukunyanga usulelo olukhoyo.
reference: Ngeli lixa iyeza elisalingwayo libonakala likucutha ukubulawa yiEbola,kude kube ngoku, akukho machiza abonakalise ekulungele ukunyanga usuleleko osele lukhona.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
hypothesis: Kwizilingo zePALM, i-ZMapp yasebenza njengesixhobo sokulawula, oko kuthetha ukuba izazinzulu zazisebenzisa njengesiseko kwaye zathelekisa ezinye iindlela ezintathu zonyango.
reference: Kuvavanyo kwe PALM, ZMapp wasebenza njengesilawuli, into ethetha ukuthi ososayensi bayisebenzisa njenge siseko baze bayithelekisa nezinye ezintathu zamachiza.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
hypothesis: I-USA Gymnastics ixhasa ileta yeKomiti yeOlimpiki yaseUnited States kwaye iyamkela imfuneko engathethekiyo yosapho lweOlimpiki yokukhuthaza indawo ekhuselekileyo yabo bonke abadlali bethu.
reference: I-USA Gymnastics iyayixhasa ileta evela kwiKomiti yeOlimpiki eUnited States, yaye iyayamkela imfuneko yokuba intsapho yezeOlimpiki kufuneka ikhuthaze iimeko zokhuseleko kubo bonke abadlali bethu.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
hypothesis: Siyavumelana nesibhengezo se-USOC sokuba iminqweno yabadlali bethu kunye neeklabhu, kunye nemidlalo yabo, inokusetyenziselwa ngcono ngokuqhubela phambili notshintsho olunentsingiselo ngaphakathi kombutho wethu, kunokuchithwa kwesatifikethi.
reference: Siyavumelana nengxelo ye-USOC yokuba umdla weembaleki zethu kunye neeklabhu, kunye nemidlalo yabo, inokuncediswa ngcono ngokuqhubela phambili notshintsho olunentsingiselo kumbutho wethu, endaweni yokumiselwa ngokusesikweni.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
hypothesis: I-USA Gymnastics ixhasa uphando oluzimeleyo olunokukhanyisa indlela ukusetyenziswa kakubi komlinganiselo ochazwe ngenkalipho ngabasindileyo bakaLarry Nassar okunokuthi kungabonakali ngayo ixesha elide kwaye kubandakanya naluphi na utshintsho oluyimfuneko nolufanelekileyo.
reference: I-USA Gymnastics iyaluxhasa uphando oluzimeleyo oluza kubhenca ukuba ukuxhatshazwa okukhulu ngohlobo oluchazwe ngamaxhoba kaLarry Nassar kuye kwaqhubeka njani kangangexesha elide yaye iza kwamkela naluphi utshintsho olufanelekileyo.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
hypothesis: I-USA Gymnastics kunye ne-USOC zinenjongo enye  yokwenza umdlalo we-gymnastics, kunye nezinye, ukhuselekile kangangoko kunokwenzeka ukuze abadlali balandele amaphupha abo kwindawo ekhuselekileyo, entle kwaye enamandla.
reference: I-USA Gymnastics kunye ne-USOC banenjongo efanayo-yokwenza umdlalo wejiminastiki, nabanye, bakhuseleke kangangoko kunokwenzeka ukuba iimbaleki zilandele amaphupha azo kwindawo ekhuselekileyo, efanelekileyo nexhotyisiweyo.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
hypothesis: Ebudeni beminyaka yoo-1960, uBrzezinski wasebenzela uJohn F. Kennedy njengomcebisi wakhe waza kamva wasebenzela urhulumente kaLyndon B. Johnson.
reference: Kuwo onke ama-1960, u-Brzezinski wasebenzela uJohn F. Kennedy njengomcebisi wakhe emva koko ulawulo luka-Lyndon B. Johnson.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
hypothesis: Ngexesha lokukhethwa kuka-1976 wancoma uCarter kwimigaqo-nkqubo yangaphandle, emva koko wakhonza njengoMcebisi woKhuseleko lweSizwe (NSA) ukusuka ngo-1977 ukuya ku-1981, ethatha indawo kaHenry Kissinger.
reference: Ngexesha lonyulo luka-1976 wayecebisa uCarter kwimicimbi yamazwe angaphandle, emva koko waba Ngumcebisi Wokhuseleko Lelizwe (NSA) ukususela ngo-1977 ukuya ku-1981, ethatha isihlalo sikaHenry Kissinger.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
hypothesis: Njenge-NSA, wancedisa uCarter ekujongeni nemicimbi yehlabathi, njengesiVumelwano saseCamp David, 1978; ukuzinzisa ubudlelwane base-US China bacinga ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yoo-1970; i-Iranian Revolution, ekhokelela kwingxaki ye-Iran, 1979; kunye nokuhlaselwa kweSoviet e-Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Njengomiselwe ukuba yi-NSA, wancedisa uCarter ekucombululeni iingxaki zehlabathi, ezifana ne-Camp David Accords, ngo-1978; ukwenza i-US neTshayina zisebenzisane ngendlela eqhelekileyo ebudeni bokuphela kweminyaka yoo-1970; Ukubhukuqwa kolawulo lwase-Iran, nto leyo eya khokhela ekubanjweni kwabantu ngo-1979; kunye nokuhlaselwa kwe-Afghanistan yi-Soviet Union ngo-1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
hypothesis: Le filimu, eneRyan Gosling noEmma Stone, yafumana izikhundla kuzo zonke iindidi eziphambili.
reference: Imuvi, ekudlala kuyo uRyan Gosling no-Emma Stone, iye yanconyelwa imbasa kuzo zonke iikhathegori eziyintloko.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
hypothesis: UGosling noStone bafumana izikhundla ze-Best Actor kunye ne-Actress ngokulandelanayo.
reference: UGosling kunye no-Stone batyunjwe ngengabadlali beqonga ababalaseleyo ngokulandelelana.

source: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.
hypothesis: Amanye amabhaso aquka iBest Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing kunye Original Screenplay.
reference: Amanye amagama atyunjiweyo abandakanya uMfanekiso oGqwesileyo, uMlawuli, iCinematografi, uyilo lweempahla, ukuhlelwa kwefilimu, Amanqaku oqobo, uyilo lweMveliso, ukuHlela kwesandi, ukuXuba isandi kunye nokuDlala ngokuQala.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
hypothesis: Iingoma ezimbini zefilimu, i-Audition (The Fools Who Dream) kunye neSixeko seenkwenkwezi, zafumana izikhundla kwi-Best Original Song. I-Lionsgate studio yafumana izikhundla ezingama-26  ngaphezulu kunayo nayiphi na enye i-studio.
reference: IIngoma ezimbini zemuvi, iAudition (The Fools Who Dream) kunye neCity of Stars, zifumene ukunconywa ngeyona ngoma iphambili kweziyilwe ukususela ekuqaleni. iLionsgate studio ifumene uncomelo oluyi-26o - ngaphezulu kwayo nayiphi na enye studiyo.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
hypothesis: Ngasekupheleni kweCawa, uMongameli waseMerika uDonald Trump, kwingxelo eyenziwe ngoMphathiswa Weendaba, wabhengeza ukuba imikhosi yaseMerika iza kumka eSiriya.
reference: Ngengokuhlwa yangeCawa, umongameli we-United States uDonald Trump, kwingxelo ekhutshwe ngunobhala wezamaphepha, uchaze ukuba amajoni e-US aza kumka e-Syria

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
hypothesis: Esi saziso senziwe emva kokuba uTrump enencoko yefowuni noMongameli waseTurkey uRecep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: Ingxelo ikhutshwe emva koba u-Trump ethethe emnxebeni noMongameli wase-Turkey u-Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
hypothesis: I-Turkey iya kuthatha nokukhusela amajoni e-ISIS athinjisiweyo, athi, ngokutsho kwesibhengezo, amazwe aseYurophu ala ukuwabuyisela ekhaya.
reference: ITurkey iya kuthathela kuyo ukujonga amajonii e-ISIS abanjiweyo ngokutsho kwengxelo, amazwe aseYurophu awavuma ukuwabuyisa.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
hypothesis: Oku akuqinisekisi nje kuphela ukuba ubuncinane ezinye ii-dinosaurs zazinamaphiko, ingcamango esele isasazeke ngokubanzi, kodwa kunika iinkcukacha eziqhelekileyo ezingenakwenziwa ziifosili, ezinjengombala nokulungiswa kwemilinganiselo emithathu.
reference: Lena ayingqini nje ukuba ezinye iidayinaso zazinamaphiko, itheory esele isasaziwe, kodwa inikeza ingcombolo amathambo nje awanako kona ukunikeza ,into enjengombala, ukumila nokulungelelana okuvelela amacala amathathu.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
hypothesis: Izazinzulu zithi iimpaphe zalo zilwanyana zazinombala omdaka onjengekastani phezulu, zinombala omdaka okanye onombala we-carotenoid ezantsi.
reference: . Izazinzulu zithi esi silwanyana sasinombala omdaka nge-chestnut ngaphezulu kunye nombala ongaphantsi olombala okanye we-carotenoid.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
hypothesis: Kwakhona oku kufunyanisiweyo kusinceda siqonde indlela iimpaphe eziye zavela ngayo kwiintaka.
reference: Okufumanekileyo kunikeza imbono ekutshintsheni kwamaphiko entaka.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
hypothesis: Ngenxa yokuba iintsiba ze-dinosaur azinawo umhlathi ophuhliswe kakuhle, obizwa ngokuba yi-rachis, kodwa zinezinye iimpawu zeentsiba  iimbambo kunye neembambo  abaphandi bafumanisa ukuba i-rachis mhlawumbi yaba luphuhliso olwenzekileyo olwenziwe kamva kunezinye iimpawu.
reference: Kuba iintsiba zedinosaur zingena kumila okukwakhekileyo, eluthiwa yirachis, kodwa zinazo ezinye iimpawu zeentsiba — ibarbs nebarbules — abaphandi baqikelele intoyokuba irachis yakhekhe kunezinye iintsiba ezi.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Abaphandi bathi, nangona lo ngumsila wedinosaur encinane, lo mzekelo ubonisa iintsiba zabantu abadala, kungekhona ezentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho zeentshontsho.
reference: Ubume beentsiba bubonisa ukuba zazingasetyenziswa kubhabho kodwa endaweni yokulawula ubushushu okanye ukubonisa. Abaphandi bacebise ukuba, nangona lo ingumsila wedayinaso encinci, isampulu ibonisa iintsiba zabantu abadala hayi intshontsho phantsi.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
hypothesis: Abaphandi bathi, nangona lo ngumsila wedinosaur encinane, lo mzekelo ubonisa iintyatyambo zabantu abadala kungekhona iintyatyambo zentsana.
reference: Abaphandi bacebise ukuba, nangona lo ingumsila wedayinaso encinci, isampulu ibonisa iintsiba zabantu abadala hayi intshontsho phantsi.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
hypothesis: Ukuqhushumba kweemoto kwikomkhulu lamapolisa eGaziantep, eTurkey izolo kusasa kwabulala amapolisa amabini kwaza kwalimala abantu abangaphezu kwamashumi amabini.
reference: Ibhombu yemoto eqhume kwikomkhulu lamapolisa eGaziantep, eTurkey ngentseni izolo ibulale amapolisa amabini kwaye yenzakalise abantu abangaphezulu kwamashumi amabini.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
hypothesis: Iofisi kaRhuluneli ithi abali-19 kwabaxhwalekileyo ngamapolisa.
reference: I-ofisi yerhuluneli ithe abalishumi elinethoba kwabonzakeleyo ngamapolisa.

source: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.
hypothesis: Amapolisa athi asola umxhasi weDaesh (ISIL) ukuba unoxanduva lokuhlaselwa.
reference: Amapolisa athi arhanela ugqirha we-Daesh (ISIL) otyholwa ngohlaselo.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
hypothesis: Bafumanisa ukuba ilanga lisebenza ngemigangatho esisiseko efanayo nezinye iinkwenkwezi: Umsebenzi wazo zonke iinkwenkwezi kule nkqubo wawuqhutywa kukukhanya kwazo, ukujikeleza kwazo, yaye akukho nto yimbi.
reference: Bafumanise ukuba iLanga lisebenza ngemigaqo efanayo nezinye iinkwenkwezi: Ukusebenza kwazo zonke iinkwenkwezi zelilizwe zifunyaniswe ukuba zibenza ngokugqama kwazo, ukujikeleza kwazo, futhi akukho okunye.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
hypothesis: Ukukhanya kunye nokujikeleza kusetyenziswa kunye ukufumanisa inombolo yeRossby yenkwenkwezi, enxulumene nokuhamba kweplasma.
reference: Ukukhanya kunye nokujikeleza zisetyenziselwa kunye ukumisela inombolo yeRossby yenkwenkwezi, ehambelana nokuhamba kwe plasma.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
hypothesis: Okukhona lincinci inani likaRossby, kokukhona inkwenkwezi ingasebenzi ngokunxulumene nokuguqulwa kwemagnethi.
reference: Lingalincinci inani le-Rossby, kuya kuba kuncinci ukusebenza kweenkwenkwezi ngokubhekisele kukubuyiswa ngemva yimagnethi.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
hypothesis: Ebudeni bohambo lwakhe, uIwasaki wadibana neengxaki izihlandlo ezininzi.
reference: Ehambhweni lwakhe, u-Iwasaki wadibana neengxaki kwamaxesha amaninzi.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
hypothesis: Waphangwa ziintlola, wahlaselwa eTibet yinja enomsindo, waphunyuka emtshatweni eNepal waza wabanjwa eIndiya.
reference: Wakhuthuzwa zi-pirates, wahlaselwa eTibet yinja enomgada, wabaleka umtshato eNepal waya kubanjwa eIndiya.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
hypothesis: Umgangatho we-802.11n usebenza kuzo zombini ii-2.4Ghz kunye nee-5.0Ghz.
reference: I-802.11n linqanaba elisebenza ku-2.4Ghz naku-5.0Ghz yefrikwensi

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
hypothesis: Oku kuya kuvumela ukuba ihambelane ngasemva ne-802.11a, 802.11b kunye ne-802.11g, ukuba isikhululo sesiseko sine-radio ezimbini.
reference: Oku kuza kwenza ukuba isebenzisane ne-802.11a, 802.11b kunye ne-802.11g, logama nje isitishi esisiseko sineeradiyo ezimbini.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
hypothesis: Isantya se-802.11n sikhawuleze kakhulu kunesandulela sayo kunye nomthamo ophezulu we-theoretical we-600Mbit/s.
reference: Isantya se-802.11n sikhawuleze kakhulu kunesabangaphambili abaphumeleleyo be-600Mbit / s.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
hypothesis: UDuvall, otshatileyo onabantwana ababini abakhulileyo, akazange amchukumise kakhulu uMiller.
reference: UDuvall, otshatile enabantwana ababini abadala, akazange ashiye umbono omkhulu kuMiller, owayebaliselwe ibali.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
hypothesis: Xa wayecelwa ukuba aphawule, uMiller wathi, "UMike uthetha kakhulu ebudeni bentetho... ndandilungiselela ngoko ndandingayiva ngokwenene into awayeyithetha".
reference: Uthe ebuzwa izimvo zakhe, u-Miller uthe "u-Mark uthethe kakhulu engxoxweni…Bendizilungiselela ngoku andimvanga ukuba ebesithini."

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
hypothesis: "Siza kuzama ukunciphisa ukukhutshwa kwecarbon dioxide kwiyunithi nganye ye-GDP ngomda ophawulekayo ngo-2020 ukusuka kwinqanaba lika-2005", utshilo uHu.
reference: "Ziyakukwenza inzame zokunciphisa I-carbon dioxide ngokwe unit ye-GDP eqaphelekayo ngo 2020 ukusuka kwizinga lika 2005," utshilo u-Hu.

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
hypothesis: Akazange abeke inani lokuncitshiswa, esithi kuya kwenziwa ngokusekelwe kwimveliso yezoqoqosho yaseTshayina.
reference: Akakhange abeke nani ekuza kunqunyulwa kulo, esithi luya kwenziwa ngokusekelwe kumphumo wezoqoqosho lwaseTshayina.

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
hypothesis: Wongezelela esithi "kodwa, akufuneki bacelwe ukuba bathabathe izibophelelo ezingaphaya kwesigaba sabo sophuhliso, uxanduva namandla abo".
reference: Wongeze wathi "akufuneki, nokuba, bacelwe ukuba bathathe uxanduva oludlula kwinqanaba labo lokukhula, uxanduva kunye namandla abo."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
hypothesis: Iqela lokuFunda ngeIraq lazisa ingxelo yalo nge-12:00 GMT namhlanje.
reference: Iqela Lemfundo lase-Iraq likhuphe ingxelo yalo ngo-12.00 GMT namhlanje.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
hypothesis: Ilumkisa Akukho mntu unokuqinisekisa ukuba naluphi na uhlobo lwesenzo eIraq ngalo mzuzu luya kuyeka imfazwe yamahlelo, ubundlobongela obunyukayo, okanye ukuguqukela kwidubedube.
reference: Ilumkisa ngokuba akukho mntu onokuqiniseka ukuba nantoni na eyenziwayo ngoku eIraq iza kwazi ukuphelisa ukulwa kwamahlelo, ubudlobongela obandayo, ukukweyela ebugxwayibeni.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
hypothesis: Ingxelo iqala ngesikhokelo sengxoxo evulekileyo kunye nokwakhiwa kwemvisiswano eUnited States malunga nomgaqo-nkqubo we-Middle East.
reference: Ingxelo iqala ngesicelo sokuba kuthethwe phandle nokuba kuvanwe eMerika malunga ngepolisi yoMbindi Mpuma.

source: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.
hypothesis: Le ngxelo igxininisa kakhulu phantse kuzo zonke iinkalo zomgaqo-nkqubo wangoku we-Executive kwi-Iraq kwaye ikhuthaza utshintsho olukhawulezileyo kwikhondo.
reference: Lengxelo ibalileke kakhulu ngandlela zonke zepolisi ekhoyo yabongameleyo e Iraq kwaye inyanzelisa utshintsho olukhawulezileyo.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
hypothesis: Enye yeengcebiso zayo ezingama-78 kukuba ngaphambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka kufuneka kuthathwe inyathelo elitsha lobudlelane ukuze kuqinisekiswe imida yaseIraq ngokuchasene nezongenelelo ezinobutshaba nokubuyisela ubudlelwane bobudlelane nabamelwane bayo.
